clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Derek, Today was a bad day for the country. And I won't sugar coat it, today was also a bad day for the Democratic Party. Let me explain. Today the Senate voted on a six-month continuing resolution. It passed, giving Donald Trump six more months to continue doing what he's doing: tearing down our agencies, firing federal workers, cutting Medicaid, closing Social Security offices, laying off veterans. Let me be clear: I voted against this bill and fought as hard as I could to convince my colleagues to do the same. But it narrowly passed with a 54 to 46 vote. And by doing so, Congress gave Trump six more months to continue down this destructive path. We and the Congress gave up our authority, gave up our power to allow him to continue to do this because we feared something worse if we refused. Now I made it clear, I think that was the wrong judgment. I strongly oppose this CR, but nevertheless, it passed. Why is this a bad day for the country? We have to step back and understand what our Founders did when they established the Constitution and our set of checks and balances. Our founders understood that, as Madison said, “Men were no angels.” If they were angels, there would be no need for government. So, we needed a government. But we also needed to make sure that that government divided up power so that no one could become too powerful. Understanding the nature of human nature, that the accretion of power can corrupt human nature. They split up the power between the different branches of government – between the executive, the legislative, and the judiciary, and that worked well for 200 years. Until it started to break down. Until institutions started to – on their own – give up some of their authority. Now, the founders expected that we would jealously guard our own institutions. That ambition would be made to check ambition. So the ambition of people in the legislative branch would check the ambition of people in the executive branch. And the ambition of people in the judicial branch would be a check on both the other branches. But that has broken down in favor of the ambition of a president of one’s own party. And so we have seen Republicans in the House and Senate willing to give up their authority to this president because they think this president will do their will. Or because they fear the president will punish them for dissenting. The perfect test case was in this CR: Republicans giving up the power of Congress to stop this administration from wrecking the economy with its destructive tariffs. Why on earth would Congress give up that power? Because they don't want to have to vote on it themselves. Because they're afraid that if they do vote on it and they affirm what Donald Trump is doing, they will pay a price with their voters. So they say, we would just rather not have that power anymore. We will give it to you, Donald Trump. That is a bad day for the United States, and a bad day for the balance of power. We are ceding our authority. We are concentrating it further in the executive. And if there was any executive that could not be trusted with any more power, it is Donald Trump. The Supreme Court too has given up its authority by handing the president what he wanted, which was a decision giving him absolute immunity from prosecution, putting him above the rule of law. So again I will say: it's a bad day for the United States of America. But it's also a bad day for the Democratic Party. We are in the minority in the House. We're in the minority in the Senate. We don't control the White House. We certainly don't control the majority opinion on the Supreme Court. The only hope that we have of standing up to this president, of pushing back against the destructive actions he's taking is if we stay together. In the House, Democrats stayed together. We did not stay together in the Senate. Now I understand many of my colleagues who voted the other way than I did today firmly hold the conviction that voting for it was the lesser of two evils. And look, we are all peering through the glass darkly. We are all trying to imagine the future, if this passes or if this fails. But one thing is very clear, and that is without unity, without common agreement between Democrats in the House and in the Senate and amongst ourselves, we have no power to stop this president. This must not happen again. But it will take more than Democratic unity in the Congress to stop this president from tearing up our country. It will require much more. It will require all of us, it will require that reporters told not to write stories by their newspaper for fear of the president's reaction, choose to speak publicly, risk firing or resignation. That subscribers make their views known when a newspaper gives up its editorial independence. It will require customers to make their views known when corporations cater to the president. It will require universities to stick together when the president goes after one university, to understand that all universities are in the same boat. It will require prosecutors to quit before they bring false charges against political enemies of the president. It will require all of us. It will require you in your personal capacity, to speak out in your workplace, in your home with your neighbors. It will require all of us to defend our First Amendment rights, our right to choose who will govern us, and place limits on the power of those who do. It will require all of us. 92 years ago, on the 53rd day into a new chancellorship, the German parliament decided to give up its authority to the new chancellor, to allow the new chancellor to govern by decree. Today is the 53rd day of the Trump administration. Now we have not decided to fully give up our power to this president, but we took a tragic step in that direction today. We must not take that step again. Thank you. — Adam Schiff +------------------------------------------------------------------------+ |[ ]Senator Adam Schiff is fighting back against Elon Musk, Donald Trump,| | and MAGA Republicans’ attempts to seize power. If you’re able, make a | |donation to fuel Adam’s fight for truth, accountability, and honesty in | | the U.S. Senate. | | | | [ ]DONATE | +------------------------------------------------------------------------+ 135 E. | |

| | | **Laura Ingraham just issued a GRAVE WARNING to Conservatives everywhere:**

\----------------------------
"If these midterms don't go the right way, Democrats are already planning to impeach President Trump. That is the truth. Investigations are going to start and they're going to be going to town on the Republican Party"
\----------------------------
| | [DO YOUR PART:
KEEP THE HOUSE, SAVE PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zptm4iob3j5vc2ilj90pf08nm70uteqh6vg20nj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o70s9h2bs "DO YOUR PART: KEEP THE HOUSE, SAVE PRESIDENT TRUMP")
---
Laura hit the nail on the head.

Democrats ALREADY initiated their coordinated scheme to sabotage President Trump's second term. A top House Democrat is already drafting _Articles of Impeachment_ , Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_ , and more than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration.

And if they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!

Luckily, we have a plan to stop them.

We're pacing about 20% BEHIND our first quarterly fundraising goal. As it stands, we still need AT LEAST 15,000 contributions before the end of March to help hold the line for our President in the midterm elections.

If there was ever a moment to pitch in a few bucks, that moment is right now. Our Conservative House Majority - and President Trump's agenda - hangs in the balance.

**_[We've asked you once before, but now we're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zc50ijgvsj295d47nr30p7t8l08cgs6vh820qsk0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o70s9h2bs "We’ve asked you once before, but now we’re PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority")_**

| [DO YOUR PART:
KEEP THE HOUSE, SAVE PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zun24o8v9psgu4g8iklvvco9jhd5vrhmvqi48rc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o70s9h2bs "DO YOUR PART: KEEP THE HOUSE, SAVE PRESIDENT TRUMP")
---
We know we're asking a lot.

But Democrats in every zip code in America are on their knees PRAYING Conservatives abandon President Trump and Republicans!

If we allow them to tear down our House Majority in the midterm elections, we might as well just wave the white flag now.

It's absolutely imperative that never happens.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Adding you to my first survey batch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I’m excited to launch the VERY FIRST SURVEY of my campaign.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z4h5ds51j0v74k7f7ag4iqjurfr1qafgrl24cmqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o72cjh2bs)
---
Hey,

This is Vivek Ramaswamy! Sorry to drop into your inbox again, but I have some good news: Now that I've been on the campaign trail for over a week, I wanted to check in with my best supporters on a few key issues.

**[I'm excited to launch the VERY FIRST SURVEY of my campaign.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zadgira4rbm3p0b699hvodkehug0t0u5qnr5ao08_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o72cjh2bs "I’m excited to launch the VERY FIRST SURVEY of my campaign.")**

I instructed my team to keep it short and sweet so this won't take you more than a few minutes. There are only five important questions - only answer what you want:
**Question 1:** How do you think the campaign is going so far?
**Question 2:** What do you think I can do better?
**Question 3:** Which part of my platform is your favorite?
**Question 4:** How can I best be a partner to the President?
**Question 5:** Do you have any other advice for me?

---
| | [**BEGIN MY SURVEY ->**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zse942hnhpglhgrfk5usr3rofbnra2pbd57aphmg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o72cjh2bs)
---

I am honored by the outpouring of support I've received in the first week of campaigning. If you were at one of my events, watched from home, sent out a prayer, endorsed me, or donated to this campaign - THANK YOU!

Supporters like you are the lifeblood of this movement.

That's why I'm personally asking you to fill out this first survey. Your feedback will help guide this campaign from the very start.

**[I look forward to hearing what you have to say!](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z5fhtq5o40cf0huolc2a8hcm5tfjhtboijp6lff8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o72cjh2bs "I look forward to hearing what you have to say!")**

Thank you,
Vivek

---
| | [**BEGIN MY SURVEY ->**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zvukirnj3i3cq2kml3s14s2rj9l98nj033ddc4gg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o72cjh2bs)
---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO

name: AMAC Action
subject: A ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9tr92748g6n6trnkdm0cqbt93auv8qaosvukq88_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o76clh2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zah215gh2jhofh15l747b1vasijssp0mncpgvdng_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o76clh2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zauu93tjfgtuou58a0411s6ofaqdot5k5j6rpvc0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o76clh2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6iceev35ob8eovmd4o35lv1bti2j92t3tk74f5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o76clh2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmevrv4vgsuieu01hkhtrur1cpsrmdb7pqj0lqn8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o76clh2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z321ter67hph9hicb6klp4n9d7acqcl59d81srqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o76clh2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvtb3ic3qqk0bvnd726mscdtmbvbqcf2o27i3jgg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o76clh2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z35h9le06t83u3a7oaic6v5ufifp16avq00l3340_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o76clh2bs)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z10orlcn49hdb7bknkrkcgmoghq21qrof5u8m4r0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o76clh2bs)
---
| | For Freedom,
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqu4v0er3bdvtk5s9h633h52vdbpntv8ga81jnn0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o76clh2bs)
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1f823bi6tjub4upvvreo2ek2j94oh6crhe1q3a0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o76clh2bs)
---
| | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi1add2sjbkudk952go1oa792quljor26kjmeb6g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o76clh2bs) **[So please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution right away.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp3o2dtfe1pp4pfgc9ob452pucnrja8p3pt640hg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o76clh2bs)** P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote.
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1ucld40qa0ncommn29d2vvmr52nt20uidhda16o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o76clh2bs)
---
_**_**[Support AMAC Action](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z51ov8di44qghkheo5cp9halsuoqdn3oab94k7hg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o76clh2bs)**_**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.

No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,honest elections... none of it matters.Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. , I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions. The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. It means we can’t be bought. On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling billions to dark money “non-profit” groups to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting and banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 | Pop Acta Media | Trump Train News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
I’m rushing to you with three urgent updates about my Special Election to replace MIKE WALZ in FL-06:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkij767vdjmbb5eogh5ch6f0nnes7eo1t4766q9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o74sph2bs "Randy Fine")
---

Thank G-d...

I reached you just in the nick of time.

**It 's Randy Fine - I'm rushing to you with three urgent updates about my Special Election to replace MIKE WALZ in FL-06:**
1\. A radical anti-Israel group called to CENSURE ME right after I won my primary
2\. A far-Left blog just fired off a 1,200+ word HIT PIECE against me
3\. Election Day is on APRIL 1ST and I'm short of my final fundraising goal
Let me be real with you -

We have one of the slimmest House Majorities in ~100 years. If we lost this Special Election, the odds of Democrats assuming the Speaker's gavel and sabotaging President Trump's second term will SKYROCKET.

_**[That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Scalise ONE FINAL TIME before my Special Election to raise a million dollars to help win my seat, elect more strong Republicans, and deliver on President Trump's powerful agenda.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7qsu417mil7ev3r997pbgn1kt35c53ip5777kgo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o74sph2bs "That’s why I’m partnering with Majority Leader Scalise ONE FINAL TIME before my Special Election to raise a million dollars to help win my seat, elect more strong Republicans, and deliver on President Trump’s powerful agenda.")**_

_I 'm personally asking: Would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks for this noble cause?_ **[**YES >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6lcjrm43bd7s2l836l79u4nchjrvri1m61hs358_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o74sph2bs)_[**NO >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqh429uqo1kvrteoqb6ftpm52r5d2rou8hjfd688_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o74sph2bs)**
Look, the Democrat Machine has spent a fortune slandering my name, lying about my record, and making me sound like a monster.

So here's who I really am:

I'm a proud father of two... I'm a proud Jew who will forever stand with our ally Israel... And I'm a Trump-endorsed Conservative so you know you can trust me.

I'm 100% confident I can defeat the Democrat Machine and win this Special Election - but only with support from fellow Patriots like you.

Remember: My Special Election is right around the corner. I could REALLY use your support right away.
| | [PITCH IN A FEW BUCKS](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlul10ne7o733j704h8mv8q37j56mdpvqe06nbi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o74sph2bs "PITCH IN A FEW BUCKS")

For G-d and country.
_- Randy_

**RANDY FINE**
Trump-Endorsed Candidate for FL-06

---

As your Majority Leader - my first order of business is checking in with our best supporters. I just launched my NEW MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. _**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9ovjm0u2psvpbhecfj0f727rka9q53uh1l11d0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64o74sph2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link. ")**_

**Your input will help me better understand what we're doing well and where we can improve.**

subject: Defeat DEI Survey
body:
DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlct482tbrnv8jtuop315e50d292qoqbfutn08f8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64p70chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqa7kktaom59tk3jinqk4v2aqg6rc9tjcgpdbob8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64p70chh2bs).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqcjgdhuj55ssmvdd2hnv5p2h2ves0b6e2fgi11g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j64p70chh2bs)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

name: AMAC Action
subject: A ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoo53juqi833a170dllgl74iiurj4sevuv336nd0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6cpr2cjh2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmbditdli466u9mgbdqbjh263kv714djcmid0rvg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6cpr2cjh2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb7ikjr6ors2irk1r11ge4mpe4t6957m1225smc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6cpr2cjh2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp7gu0f9bhlq9ujjgbjhd6kq2c1g7d5g9gnbm5oo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6cpr2cjh2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z48kle8km2sq09ckukgvhi8ncia2r5vgkf3ec1eo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6cpr2cjh2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsfdrvqviv58oob7t8r6rtedheen100d0d20d4p0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6cpr2cjh2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlfqksjmdn3tlnts6lbl48ng54rtvk40b9guek8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6cpr2cjh2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. subject: Defeat DEI Survey
body:
DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zknct57ld2obipf8eeqr7ggtoekb1v7f0rv3br1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6cpr2cjh2bs).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhmquhjuoo5ulmf866gb37ipinupfmje8pt2vs0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j62or6cph2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Defeat DEI Survey
body:
DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications.

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0ic6aassp46lnpl7e14gesge355a07bq45i19p0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j62or6cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z90h4k2sj10hqeminq95cbc49b60bjsaso05ola0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j62or6cph2bs).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0f55u13p60vmibeia7fiq9o7luip64vcmfkq9kg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j62or6cph2bs)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans
---

“If these midterms don’t go the right way, Democrats are already planning to impeach President Trump...”

---
Laura hit the nail on the head.

Democrats ALREADY initiated their coordinated scheme to sabotage President Trump's second term. A top House Democrat is already drafting _Articles of Impeachment_ , Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_ , and more than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration.

And if they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!

Luckily, we have a plan to stop them.

We're pacing about 20% BEHIND our first quarterly fundraising goal. As it stands, we still need AT LEAST 15,000 contributions before the end of March to help hold the line for our President in the midterm elections.

If there was ever a moment to pitch in a few bucks, that moment is right now. Our Conservative House Majority - and President Trump's agenda - hangs in the balance.

**_[We've asked you once before, but now we're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8ev4589sr9u9lsjorh1e47n0dnkjndseh07udcg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j62or6cph2bs "We’ve asked you once before, but now we’re PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority")_**

---
We know we're asking a lot.

But Democrats in every zip code in America are on their knees PRAYING Conservatives abandon President Trump and Republicans!

If we allow them to tear down our House Majority in the midterm elections, we might as well just wave the white flag now.

It's absolutely imperative that never happens.

- House Republicans

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

name: AMAC Action
subject: Elon Musk is right
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z173lmrprmnheqgrjhpsaoh53qhc4fgak9ffkd78_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6apb6chh2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgk52nevobc1rb6m3gt38fadlivi5qrmgkti6ol8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6apb6chh2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0o6o8o9ajvjb1darrkgr05954m97vcoq7jt8ju8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6apb6chh2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi14sfo5d6hs88lgt76mr2qgsqu2jap84ct8o3vg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6apb6chh2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk4jkso709vm04mvkprosbq4h60i39o2429ram9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6apb6chh2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgrjenn3g9mhfoq34d8soseumo1lquqn9h7gfjb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6apb6chh2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z93843doajs2i71vs0c9u099gtfk2flictdf20a0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6apb6chh2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zilfqr4h1ocd8ur8fkpv85ip6j0hrtlla4hppq3g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6apb6chh2bs)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi4ovr83hkg9sdql50k3qla379idl3eio5r92juo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6apb6chh2bs)
---
| | For Freedom,
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za5m06i3i5oo839oo7b4otie3qau1dlnp6lfcfco_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6apb6chh2bs)
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z82jdq29mt7kt0vedkt84jtg6hd2fid7cmvbjcg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6apb6chh2bs)
---
| | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgg7gaj5j75hmcj1pccgq69g7sd2l647crkotts8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6apb6chh2bs) **[So please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution right away.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuarpbephidc9iq2vpo4j28l15c6tcck3sln8bro_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6apb6chh2bs)** P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote.
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zka6v9tt4jge0sui33uj0m56p2bbf4gt92pl5pfo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6apb6chh2bs)
---
_**_**[Support AMAC Action](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuk4ure6a52btbftd7lrgekok77l8bd7ji9cc338_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6apb6chh2bs)**_**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Merit vs. DEI
body:
DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6f46eljacqv7jfgma36kg0d9mtnjj94bi86skfo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j66ob2chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh5t9ounp1a7bimhul2839vq71h8dmevlpl18fu8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j66ob2chh2bs).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh5vv840b2836k25bjbkgd0q8ui01gjh0gm849vo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j66ob2chh2bs)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Randy Fine [SPECIAL ELECTION CANDIDATE]
subject: Thank G-d… I reached you just in the nick of time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m rushing to you with three urgent updates about my Special Election to replace MIKE WALZ in FL-06:

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd40hcb2q9teanlaaol2dl498ou5sjod27v0hl98_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6epj6c3h2bs "Randy Fine")
---

Thank G-d...

I reached you just in the nick of time.

**It 's Randy Fine - I'm rushing to you with three urgent updates about my Special Election to replace MIKE WALZ in FL-06:**
1\. A radical anti-Israel group called to CENSURE ME right after I won my primary
2\. A far-Left blog just fired off a 1,200+ word HIT PIECE against me
3\. Election Day is on APRIL 1ST and I'm short of my final fundraising goal
Let me be real with you -

We have one of the slimmest House Majorities in ~100 years. If we lost this Special Election, the odds of Democrats assuming the Speaker's gavel and sabotaging President Trump's second term will SKYROCKET.

_**[That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Scalise ONE FINAL TIME before my Special Election to raise a million dollars to help win my seat, elect more strong Republicans, and deliver on President Trump's powerful agenda.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsefbsl1jrvuf3fo6mvb3cfogtrmi0nhov3m8t20_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6epj6c3h2bs "That’s why I’m partnering with Majority Leader Scalise ONE FINAL TIME before my Special Election to raise a million dollars to help win my seat, elect more strong Republicans, and deliver on President Trump’s powerful agenda.")**_

_I 'm personally asking: Would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks for this noble cause?_ **[**YES >>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqfp2bjvv30ujr55g69sj1lfu3j1peeia036fl00_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6epj6c3h2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs0fdb8au3h77iip1rdpts9q9d4b9tht8904bssg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6epj6c3h2bs)**
Look, the Democrat Machine has spent a fortune slandering my name, lying about my record, and making me sound like a monster.

So here's who I really am:

I'm a proud father of two... I'm a proud Jew who will forever stand with our ally Israel... And I'm a Trump-endorsed Conservative so you know you can trust me.

I'm 100% confident I can defeat the Democrat Machine and win this Special Election - but only with support from fellow Patriots like you.

Remember: My Special Election is right around the corner. I could REALLY use your support right away.
| | [PITCH IN A FEW BUCKS](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj77qe08uq29b231if6r75h0gmh7olno8oqlmloo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6epj6c3h2bs "PITCH IN A FEW BUCKS")
---

For G-d and country.
_- Randy_

**RANDY FINE**
Trump-Endorsed Candidate for FL-06

| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztqffnbsn17lqf7150jdqhodpufe4frclnbbi5f0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6epj6c3h2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

As your Majority Leader - my first order of business is checking in with our best supporters. I just launched my NEW MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. _**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn4dpffemgv5ub9ucm1a0stejr3eqcvt458iurhg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6epj6c3h2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link. ")**_

**Your input will help me better understand what we're doing well and where we can improve.**
---
| | | [TAKE THE SURVEY ->](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrbm1fsbcgtah3vcg9udnqbv2ig2heaei9avk12o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j6epj6c3h2bs)
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 3.14.2025
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-cdhykuy-didthutlhu-yu/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cdhykuy-didthutlhu-r/) **March 14, 2025**** _A note from Chairman Schimming:_** This week has been a tough one for Democrats. Judge Brad Schimel defeated Susan Crawford in their debate on Wednesday night and [recent polling](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cdhykuy-didthutlhu-y/) shows Schimel neck-and-neck with Crawford, while Kinser is closing the gap with Underly. The Democrats are clearly struggling, unable to find a message, and now they're scrambling, throwing more money into the race attacking Elon Musk who isn't even on the ballot! With just 18 days away from the election, our team is in full swing. Our communications team is calling out Crawford and Underly for their lies and false narratives. The field team is focused on GOTV--hosting events, knocking on doors, making calls, and sending postcards. Our Election Integrity team is preparing for the war room and training and scheduling election observers. Additionally, we are assisting our Farm Team candidates to win at the local level as well. The momentum is on our side. While the Democrats falter, struggling to get their base motivated, Republican energy is surging. We must stay focused. Together, we must elect Brad Schimel, Brittany Kinser, and pass the voter ID Constitutional Amendment. Our focus is on defeating Democrats. If we stay focused, stay energized, and keep pushing--especially by encouraging everyone we know to vote early, starting March 18th--we can be successful!Keep up the fight! Chairman Brian Schimming **In Case You Missed It****[Decriminalizing Fentanyl- and all drugs? See what else Crawford's backers support ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cdhykuy-didthutlhu-j/)**
While decriminalizing fentanyl would scare any regular Wisconsin voter, it doesn't scare Susan Crawford. When Crawford isn't lying about Schimel's tough-on-crime record, she's earning the support of dangerously liberal groups that advocate for pragmatic ideas like decriminalizing all drugs, defunding the police, or opposing ICE.**[Susan Crawford Turns to a Socialist to Save her Campaign](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cdhykuy-didthutlhu-t/)**
As if Susan Crawford and the Democrats weren't already completely out of touch with Wisconsin voters, they're now desperately turning to the far-left extremist Bernie Sanders to try and revive their sinking campaign. Newsflash: Bernie's radical ideas are unpopular in Wisconsin and won't be saving Crawford's doomed bid for office.**[Will Rebecca Cooke ever get tired of losing?](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cdhykuy-didthutlhu-i/)**
"Two-time loser Rebecca Cooke is making a third attempt at running for Congress after losing to Derrick Van Orden. 2026 will be no different -- Western Wisconsin voters will reject two-faced Cooke's radical far-left views," stated Chairman Brian Schimming.[**Democrats Fail to Understand Fundamental Science**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cdhykuy-didthutlhu-d/)
For Democrats nationwide, fundamental science has become highly complicated; for Wisconsin parents and school students, it's easy. Every time Susan Crawford talks about "fundamental rights," voters are asking where she draws the line with Title IX and protecting girls.[**Debate Rapid Response to Attack on Musk**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cdhykuy-didthutlhu-h/)
In case you missed it, Susan Crawford and the WisDems are plotting to use the Wisconsin Supreme Court to dismantle all commonsense policies. When it boils down to it, Crawford's attacks on Musk are just an attack on common sense - and the call to Wisconsin voters' November referendum to put Wisconsin and America First. Shocked? Just look at her backers.[**Get the Facts Right**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cdhykuy-didthutlhu-k/)
Dangerous Democrat Susan Crawford has doubled down on her claim that she makes sure to "get the facts right" from the bench. Unfortunately for Crawford, the receipts show she's just another soft-on-crime Democrat who coddles criminals. For someone claiming she makes sure to get the facts right, Crawford has a stunning track record of making the wrong decision.
# **Worth the Read**

clean_body: No images? March 14, 2025 A note from Chairman Schimming: This week has been a tough one for Democrats. Judge Brad Schimel defeated Susan Crawford in their debate on Wednesday night and shows Schimel neck-and-neck with Crawford, while Kinser is closing the gap with Underly. The Democrats are clearly struggling, unable to find a message, and now they're scrambling, throwing more money into the race attacking Elon Musk who isn't even on the ballot! With just 18 days away from the election, our team is in full swing. Our communications team is calling out Crawford and Underly for their lies and false narratives. The field team is focused on GOTV--hosting events, knocking on doors, making calls, and sending postcards. Our Election Integrity team is preparing for the war room and training and scheduling election observers. Additionally, we are assisting our Farm Team candidates to win at the local level as well. The momentum is on our side. While the Democrats falter, struggling to get their base motivated, Republican energy is surging. We must stay focused. Together, we must elect Brad Schimel, Brittany Kinser, and pass the voter ID Constitutional Amendment. Our focus is on defeating Democrats. If we stay focused, stay energized, and keep pushing--especially by encouraging everyone we know to vote early, starting March 18th--we can be successful!Keep up the fight! Chairman Brian Schimming In Case You Missed It While decriminalizing fentanyl would scare any regular Wisconsin voter, it doesn't scare Susan Crawford. When Crawford isn't lying about Schimel's tough-on-crime record, she's earning the support of dangerously liberal groups that advocate for pragmatic ideas like decriminalizing all drugs, defunding the police, or opposing ICE. As if Susan Crawford and the Democrats weren't already completely out of touch with Wisconsin voters, they're now desperately turning to the far-left extremist Bernie Sanders to try and revive their sinking campaign. Newsflash: Bernie's radical ideas are unpopular in Wisconsin and won't be saving Crawford's doomed bid for office. "Two-time loser Rebecca Cooke is making a third attempt at running for Congress after losing to Derrick Van Orden. 2026 will be no different -- Western Wisconsin voters will reject two-faced Cooke's radical far-left views," stated Chairman Brian Schimming. For Democrats nationwide, fundamental science has become highly complicated; for Wisconsin parents and school students, it's easy. Every time Susan Crawford talks about "fundamental rights," voters are asking where she draws the line with Title IX and protecting girls. In case you missed it, Susan Crawford and the WisDems are plotting to use the Wisconsin Supreme Court to dismantle all commonsense policies. When it boils down to it, Crawford's attacks on Musk are just an attack on common sense - and the call to Wisconsin voters' November referendum to put Wisconsin and America First. Shocked? Just look at her backers. Dangerous Democrat Susan Crawford has doubled down on her claim that she makes sure to "get the facts right" from the bench. Unfortunately for Crawford, the receipts show she's just another soft-on-crime Democrat who coddles criminals. For someone claiming she makes sure to get the facts right, Crawford has a stunning track record of making the wrong decision. subject: I really want to hear from you, friend

body:

---

Hi Friend!

**The House GOP Trifecta is working hard, and to be quite frank, I'm proud of the progress we've made so far.**

But I want to hear from you, Friend. **[As one of the most important members of our team, I need your honest feedback on how we're doing.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9ad1s064dhq8rgo3a9rk38d1u4qv948k4gqgl78_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j61oj4c1h2bs "As one of the most important members of our team, I need your honest feedback on how we're doing.")**

_Are we living up to our promises? Are we tackling the issues that matter most to you? _

Your input is crucial in helping us refine our strategy and make sure we're delivering the results you deserve. That's why I'm giving YOU an exclusive opportunity to take our Progress Report Survey!
**[This is your chance to grade our work and tell us what you think we're doing right and where we need to improve.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zobqorqa7p01sklvomlav107grahjtq4qo14i4e8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j61oj4c1h2bs "This is your chance to grade our work and tell us what you think we're doing right and where we need to improve.")**

---

**We've made some big promises to the American people, and we're working hard to deliver on them. But we can't do it without your input and guidance.**

By taking this survey, you'll be giving me a report card on our performance so far.

**[I'll be personally reviewing the results of this survey and using them to inform our decision-making process. Your voice will be heard, and your opinions will be taken seriously, Friend.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6aoh7735cv9scoqp6jnaeidjok1uveqdgr0eik0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j61oj4c1h2bs "I'll be personally reviewing the results of this survey and using them to inform our decision-making process. Your voice will be heard, and your opinions will be taken seriously, Friend.")**

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I really want to hear from you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
A+ or C-?

|
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zh2hbpbgg5qj46ac032vf4uhh0dqi6gnqboj8qto_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j69p34cth2bs)
---

Hi Friend!

**The House GOP Trifecta is working hard, and to be quite frank, I'm proud of the progress we've made so far.**

But I want to hear from you, Friend. **[As one of the most important members of our team, I need your honest feedback on how we're doing.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfoj1qgkmfuqa1jlehs8vgjbr0ct0ke60g8c3kt0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j69p34cth2bs "As one of the most important members of our team, I need your honest feedback on how we're doing.")**

_Are we living up to our promises? Are we tackling the issues that matter most to you? _

Your input is crucial in helping us refine our strategy and make sure we're delivering the results you deserve. That's why I'm giving YOU an exclusive opportunity to take our Progress Report Survey!
**[This is your chance to grade our work and tell us what you think we're doing right and where we need to improve.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z57j8h4ssuk14nmkcpru4h9rfdiabr04gt87bnao_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j69p34cth2bs "This is your chance to grade our work and tell us what you think we're doing right and where we need to improve.")**

---
| | | [<< TAKE THE PROGRESS REPORT NOW >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zil3nvob94mg9pv4upt2pj26pdtftmkpoleiqg08_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j69p34cth2bs "TAKE THE PROGRESS REPORT NOW")
---

**We've made some big promises to the American people, and we're working hard to deliver on them. But we can't do it without your input and guidance.**

By taking this survey, you'll be giving me a report card on our performance so far.

**[I'll be personally reviewing the results of this survey and using them to inform our decision-making process. Your voice will be heard, and your opinions will be taken seriously, Friend.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7r3j916d37lu6bprlmjmcaoi965eksei2ss2kp8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1j69p34cth2bs "I'll be personally reviewing the results of this survey and using them to inform our decision-making process. Your voice will be heard, and your opinions will be taken seriously, Friend.")**

---

---

To Victory,

Elise Stefanik

| | |

| |
# _Weekly Update_
The hustle and bustle of the Indiana Statehouse was on full display during this past week.

Groups like the Girl Scouts of Central Indiana, the National Kidney Foundation and more spent time educating legislators on the important work they are doing around our city and state.

As a former Girl Scout, I cherished being able to connect with some of our state's young leaders. Our future is in good hands with them at the helm.

With us being two weeks removed from crossover, committees are also in full swing. **Committees I Served on This Week: ** **[Tax and Fiscal Policy](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8aa420df5785d18fe7831133f3a08650da64c2b9caecb480dfc090101cbd95384b23549cf492aff989b46bfc9483e8187be553ef18e3a148 "Tax and Fiscal Policy")
[Pensions and Labor](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8aa420df5785d18f0aa90debcf4286ad36d94e1e135fdaf3ec05074cec2559d5b6fa829c9d55cac28db40435b7f88445b50651ff02405328 "Pensions and Labor")
[Education and Career Development](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8aa420df5785d18fc45263ed783d00de8fa9dd96b5ae9974e014263d9db7498270f94de73f8350c47e88802732b48348c26fd98d3f7c4d1b "Education and Career Development")
[Utilities](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8aa420df5785d18f14f938faa62b695c0154d889844ad239b7cfa58af92e403e70905f69ea26234cbd12b8ce207bd877c072355ae5b9abb7 "Utilities")**
There is _less than a month left of committee meetings_ , with lots of important legislation still waiting to be heard. This time of session is crucial. We need to deliver results for Hoosiers in a short amount of time. It is so important that folks are staying engaged, paying attention and keeping your leaders accountable. **We work for you. **
**As we work through the last four weeks of committee, stay up to date on important legislation updates, stream committees and more on[iga.in.gov](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8aa420df5785d18f3e6206d0d589044e18c33f81c50069d286599c46a2e4c65da10a453a2bf876856de35a30325f49ff3ce2749e9ad3751f). ** **Make sure you are following my social media channels for daily updates about session and our District 46 community. **
---
#
* * *
---
| | |
# _**Kidney Screenings at the Statehouse**_
---
| |
---
Thank you to the National Kidney Foundation for offering free kidney screenings for folks in the Statehouse.

Outside of a photo opportunity with the famous Billy the Kidney, I also received a kidney screening and will be following up with my healthcare provider.

This event came to fruition because of the dedication of my friend Sen. Jean Breaux, who was a champion of the health of Hoosiers.

Sen. Breaux also served as the inspiration inspiration of my bill [SB 111](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8aa420df5785d18f00c60eb22cfc699e7146c554d1c499a1dcbd1c18645d4886922cb83a0ea6153afe044b553e08701fa2f16ceb286b9ba6 "SB 111"), which guarantees insurance coverage for living organ donors. This bill passed out of the Senate and is still awaiting a hearing in the House.

Too many folks are waiting on life-saving organ donations like kidneys. This bill will incentivize people to donate leading to better health outcomes for Hoosiers.
* * *
---
| | | |
---
| | [HB 1521](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8aa420df5785d18fd23b627c93ee973ce58f402cb7aa5fa54dd61a5714fc8c8f875d25ef13668a97d873cc97f55649c43a51cdefba3072d7 "HB 1521") may sound familiar to those of you who have been keeping up with my legislation this session as it is the sister bill for my bill, [SB 33](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8aa420df5785d18f91e0cb9ce1d4b5dd4c19c67e3ddb6edc848c7125529d6d1cb0d8ce62cfc4c163ab76d5482feef5187e301a23e2775960 "SB 33").

These bills, and the broad support from both chambers, are a great example of the bipartisanship that exists in the Indiana State Legislature on the vast majority of issues.

These bills in particular address the emerging industry of direct-to-consumer genetic testing kits (like 23andMe or Ancestry) and the data they collect.

When these direct-to-consumer genetic testing kits first hit mailboxes, we did not yet know all of the risks we could encounter down the road. Our DNA data is valuable, and it is our duty to protect the genetic privacy of Hoosiers.

I have been so fortunate to work with Rep. Kyle Pierce on this legislation over the last couple of years, and I am hopeful that the General Assembly will take the necessary steps to protect Hoosiers and their most private information.
---

* * *

|

#
* * *
---
| | | **_A Breakdown of Vouchers in our State_**
When our state is spending hundreds of millions of dollars per year on subsidizing private school tuition, it is important for Hoosiers to know where that money is going and how it is being used.

That information is, unfortunately, not always the most accessible or digestible.

**I am hoping to fix that. **

Below you will find some information about private school vouchers in our state, who is most benefiting from those dollars and how much the state is _actually_ spending on private education.
---
| | | [ ](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8aa420df5785d18f93189a07a589d58861fe9e7fc6a4252f227f2711075fec4b9962089af3d450778e5aaa082bea97e59978e4013dc79243)
---
| | [](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8aa420df5785d18f93189a07a589d58861fe9e7fc6a4252f227f2711075fec4b9962089af3d450778e5aaa082bea97e59978e4013dc79243)
---
#
* * *
---
| | |
# A look at the impact of SB 518
---
| | I wanted to provide more context on [SB 518](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8aa420df5785d18f7b2661a7cd72f2034001f5b938dbaac8cf03abfe034aabc2822f9c0bc9b68db75271bbfa314f005ebd11db34268be08a "SB 518").

When we have bills moving through our state legislature, it is easy to say "this bill is bad for Hoosiers," or "this bill is good for Hoosiers."

I unequivocally believe that SB 518 is bad for Hoosiers, and I wanted to share a breakdown of exactly why that is.

The state is abandoning charters with this legislation while, as you just saw, investing nearly**$1.3 billion** in private education.

The message is clear: **The supermajority is trying to privatize education and make the taxpayers foot the bill. **

SB 518 has been heard in the [House Ways and Means Committee](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8aa420df5785d18f6aa5907090a47f90b50a0e64f22bbe19cdd1b84b5c201c9246ad0837ec2e4c489d6470dc297aebe4f67ae6aec3228803 "House Ways and Means Committee") once so far and it will have to be heard again to make it to a full House vote.
**Keep an eye on the committee schedule and my social media platforms for updates on the bill and see more information on SB 518 below**.
---
|
---
#
* * *
---
| | |
# Marion County Reentry Coalition is Hosting Justice-Involved Resource Fair at Ivy Tech
---
| | On **Wednesday, March 19 from 12 to 6 PM** , the Marion County Reentry Coalition will be hosting a resource fair designed for individuals with justice-involved experiences.

This event will feature vendors offering a variety of resources, including:
* **Housing**
* **Employment**
* **Food assistance**
* **Disability services**
* **Legal support**
* **Mental health care**
* **Community programs**
* **And more!**

There will also be food trucks, with attendees receiving a free meal.

Those who register can get resume help, assistance filling out applications and the opportunity to practice an "elevator pitch."
---
| | [Learn More / Register](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8aa420df5785d18f584f429ddeff88accc1dba2d2dd8346ea674a5a6db472c105c8dfe5f796e3f2df1c44485a843b870759a14a0a1de54e3)

* * *
