clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | | | | | Weekly Update The hustle and bustle of the Indiana Statehouse was on full display during this past week. Groups like the Girl Scouts of Central Indiana, the National Kidney Foundation and more spent time educating legislators on the important work they are doing around our city and state. As a former Girl Scout, I cherished being able to connect with some of our state's young leaders. Our future is in good hands with them at the helm. With us being two weeks removed from crossover, committees are also in full swing. Committees I Served on This Week: "Tax and Fiscal Policy" "Pensions and Labor" "Education and Career Development" "Utilities" There is less than a month left of committee meetings , with lots of important legislation still waiting to be heard. This time of session is crucial. We need to deliver results for Hoosiers in a short amount of time. It is so important that folks are staying engaged, paying attention and keeping your leaders accountable. We work for you. As we work through the last four weeks of committee, stay up to date on important legislation updates, stream committees and more on. Make sure you are following my social media channels for daily updates about session and our District 46 community. | | | Kidney Screenings at the Statehouse | | Thank you to the National Kidney Foundation for offering free kidney screenings for folks in the Statehouse. Outside of a photo opportunity with the famous Billy the Kidney, I also received a kidney screening and will be following up with my healthcare provider. This event came to fruition because of the dedication of my friend Sen. Jean Breaux, who was a champion of the health of Hoosiers. Sen. Breaux also served as the inspiration inspiration of my bill "SB 111", which guarantees insurance coverage for living organ donors. This bill passed out of the Senate and is still awaiting a hearing in the House. Too many folks are waiting on life-saving organ donations like kidneys. This bill will incentivize people to donate leading to better health outcomes for Hoosiers. | | | | | | "HB 1521" may sound familiar to those of you who have been keeping up with my legislation this session as it is the sister bill for my bill, "SB 33". These bills, and the broad support from both chambers, are a great example of the bipartisanship that exists in the Indiana State Legislature on the vast majority of issues. These bills in particular address the emerging industry of direct-to-consumer genetic testing kits (like 23andMe or Ancestry) and the data they collect. When these direct-to-consumer genetic testing kits first hit mailboxes, we did not yet know all of the risks we could encounter down the road. Our DNA data is valuable, and it is our duty to protect the genetic privacy of Hoosiers. I have been so fortunate to work with Rep. Kyle Pierce on this legislation over the last couple of years, and I am hopeful that the General Assembly will take the necessary steps to protect Hoosiers and their most private information. Archeology Internship Opportunity for High School Students: DEADLINE TO APPLY IS MONDAY, MARCH 17 | Want to learn even more? For more information or questions about the program, please contact Indy-ology Project Coordinator Sam Catchpole at "Samantha.Catchpole@indy.gov" | | | | | A Breakdown of Vouchers in our State When our state is spending hundreds of millions of dollars per year on subsidizing private school tuition, it is important for Hoosiers to know where that money is going and how it is being used. That information is, unfortunately, not always the most accessible or digestible. I am hoping to fix that. Below you will find some information about private school vouchers in our state, who is most benefiting from those dollars and how much the state is actually spending on private education. | | | | | | | | A look at the impact of SB 518 | | I wanted to provide more context on "SB 518". When we have bills moving through our state legislature, it is easy to say "this bill is bad for Hoosiers," or "this bill is good for Hoosiers." I unequivocally believe that SB 518 is bad for Hoosiers, and I wanted to share a breakdown of exactly why that is. The state is abandoning charters with this legislation while, as you just saw, investing nearly$1.3 billion in private education. The message is clear: The supermajority is trying to privatize education and make the taxpayers foot the bill. SB 518 has been heard in the "House Ways and Means Committee" once so far and it will have to be heard again to make it to a full House vote. Keep an eye on the committee schedule and my social media platforms for updates on the bill and see more information on SB 518 below. | | | | Marion County Reentry Coalition is Hosting Justice-Involved Resource Fair at Ivy Tech | | On Wednesday, March 19 from 12 to 6 PM , the Marion County Reentry Coalition will be hosting a resource fair designed for individuals with justice-involved experiences. This event will feature vendors offering a variety of resources, including: Housing Employment Food assistance Disability services Legal support Mental health care Community programs And more! There will also be food trucks, with attendees receiving a free meal. Those who register can get resume help, assistance filling out applications and the opportunity to practice an "elevator pitch." | | In the News "2 more ex-patients file lawsuits against Options Behavioral Health, bringing total to 10 Indianapolis charter schools and paren" "" "" | | COMMUNITY RESOURCES To view my community resources guide, "click here. " | | | | | | | | | Created and distributed by the Indiana Senate Democratic Communications office mailto:Nancy.Singh@iga.in.gov mailto:Chester.Bryant@iga.in.gov mailto:Molly.Neary@iga.in.gov ---|---|--- | This email was sent by: Indiana General Assembly** 200 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN, 46204, US

name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: 10 Days to Defend against Project Veritas—HelpMe Finish This Fight!
body:
Every undercover sting, every hidden camera, every whistleblower I’ve championed—it’s been for you, to rip the veil off power and give you the raw, unfiltered facts.

| [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z583uj6il2e9m1gnkji0bha6023tul7m5ma804ro_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1gm0o36cph2bs)
[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh1cmrnljqdks6emvtsvs5rjfvg8ahsiq6h9lg3o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1gm0o36cph2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I'm reaching out because I'm staring down the barrel of a make-or-break moment.

**Project Veritas --the outfit I built from nothing over 13 years--fired me in February 2023 and is now suing me to kill my career as an investigative journalist. **[**I need your help to defend against this brutal lawsuit.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkcdof1b9i98kgmp9tcqp5qp1af5qjltg73fulb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1gm0o36cph2bs)

They're trying to bury me, to snuff out the work I love, the work that's exposed corruption from ACORN to Big Tech to the Treasury's resistance to Elon's DOGE reforms. [**But I 'm damn close to ending this nightmare--and I need you to get me across the finish line.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztcv50gnbonrsece07va8mr7pj5sutid9u62v4mo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1gm0o36cph2bs)

Here's where we stand: after two years of legal warfare, we're in the final stretch before trial.

**Discovery 's wrapping up, and the courtroom's in sight**. My team's been relentless--digging through their lies, proving this is a personal vendetta to stop me from doing what I was born to do: **uncover truth for you, the public**.

But the bills are piling up fast. [**I 've got a stack of attorney fees--$42,000--that I need to pay in the next 10 days to keep fighting**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zusf0knbnejejbpg6m54mjd0r45f1o52qr8jf0k8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1gm0o36cph2bs). Without it, **Project Veritas might just win their war to shut me down for good.**

This isn't just about me--it's about what's worth fighting for.

Truth isn't a luxury; it's the oxygen of a free society. Every undercover sting, every hidden camera, every whistleblower I've championed--it's been for you, to rip the veil off power and give you the raw, unfiltered facts.

Project Veritas wants to choke that off, to silence a voice that's served the public, not their egos. I've launched O'Keefe Media Group (OMG) to keep the flame alive--our recent IRS expose proves it--**but this lawsuit is a chainsaw aimed at my roots**.

I've spent decades dodging threats, lawsuits, and smears--13 years at Project Veritas, thousands of hours on the ground, scars earned breaking stories that shook the world.

Now, I'm asking you to stand with me. **[**Donate now --$25, $50, $100, whatever you can spare--to hit that $42,000 goal in 10 days**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7nqgkt7o5cbqbn97rfn4tu2cnkn8psra5rgjqp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1gm0o36cph2bs)**[**.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zphoo35glu76d9mvlm3sak2cehs07orq6uusq7b0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1gm0o36cph2bs)

Your support isn't just cash; it's a lifeline to finish this fight and keep exposing corruption through OMG. [**The finish line 's close, but I can't cross it alone.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0jb9u4lspn893jnf73lucbi398vg0ppoduoph70_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1gm0o36cph2bs)

[**Donate Now --Get Me to Trial.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfu9a1b9lv1l6chaekar9inpt44fpdcffdgd8o20_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1gm0o36cph2bs)

Truth is a fragile thing--without warriors to defend it, it withers.

**Let 's show Project Veritas they can't end me or our mission**. [**Give today, and let 's bury this attack once and for all**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4np7oliqimb6m0en9pj7cueh9buvj6c3lput88g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1gm0o36cph2bs).

Thanks for having my back,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. We're 10 days from the edge--$42,000 stands between me and trial. [**Help me end this assault and keep investigative journalism alive --donate now!**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi8d5pbm1ktsalhbarstn2g7vqqegiqh6qdsmj90_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c1gm0o36cph2bs)

---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Laura hit the nail on the head.

Democrats ALREADY initiated their coordinated scheme to sabotage President Trump's second term. A top House Democrat is already drafting _Articles of Impeachment_ , Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_ , and more than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration.

Luckily, we have a plan to stop them.

We're pacing about 20% BEHIND our first quarterly fundraising goal. As it stands, we still need AT LEAST 15,000 contributions before the end of March to help hold the line for our President in the midterm elections.

If there was ever a moment to pitch in a few bucks, that moment is right now. Our Conservative House Majority - and President Trump's agenda - hangs in the balance.

We know we're asking a lot.

But Democrats in every zip code in America are on their knees PRAYING Conservatives abandon President Trump and Republicans!

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: NEW HOW-TO GUIDE: Stand Up & Speak Out for America First
body:
Everything you need to combat the lies of the left and support President Trump is included in this guide.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** The congressional recess has now begun, and well-funded Democrat activist groups are gearing up to disrupt and hijack events where GOP lawmakers are scheduled to speak. Their mission? To intimidate and pressure our elected officials into believing the American people reject President Trump's agenda. Let's be clear: _that 's a lie_. We voted for this agenda, and the silent majority stands strong.
Reeling from their losses in November, the left is resorting to their old playbook of aggression and tantrums instead of engaging in good faith. We've seen this before, and it's time to push back. Our GOP lawmakers need to know we have their backs--and that we expect them to stay the course on President Trump's promises.
Furthermore, every American should question Democrats on their indifference to the corruption and waste that are bleeding their constituents dry, and their hostility to anyone who is trying to end it. They must be questioned relentlessly: Why don't Democrats care??
That's why we've put together a [powerful how-to guide](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa06bc62/1edb9794aa05cacc "powerful how-to guide"), to equip you to counter the left's disruptive and deceptive tactics. Inside, you'll find practical strategies to support our lawmakers and ensure their voices--and ours--aren't drowned out by the noise. We've also included key talking points on critical issues like the Department of Education and DOGE, so you can educate others on why Trump's policy changes benefit the American people.
Here's how you can help:
* **Use the[ how-to guide](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa06bc62/1edb9794aa05cace "how-to guide") to show up at town halls** (if there are any scheduled--in person or by telephone).
* **Share the talking points** to cut through the misinformation.
* **Let our members of Congress know** we stand united behind the Trump agenda.
__ **__** **** ************

In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin __ **__** **** ************

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Insane left-wing policies
body:
Peter, I write to you all of the time about the insane left-wing policies harming our state. I’m writing to you today because
|
---
| Peter, I write to you all of the time about the insane left-wing policies harming our state. I’m writing to you today because, finally, we are at a place where we might be able to turn the tides and bring common sense back to New Jersey. The 2025 election is a huge opportunity. We can finally vote out the state officials who are driving out businesses, wasting our money, and imposing woke nonsense policies on our kids. We can turn our state around and become the free-market, America-first state New Jersey is capable of being. All of this is entirely possible. **But it is absolutely critical that we get out the vote for the June primaries.** The corrupt establishment in Trenton expects New Jerseyans NOT to show up in June. They know that if fewer voters show up in the primaries, they can sneak in their own do-nothing candidates on the general election ballot. And by the time November rolls around, we won’t have a meaningful choice. We just can’t let them get away with it this time. And that’s why we need YOU, our inner circle, to mobilize NOW. Here is how you can help get out the vote for June:
* First and foremost, if you’re not already, [register to vote](https://xtz223.keap-link012.com/v2/click/93060d3b7d354f1d49d2be7b87f54a23/eJyNkMsKwjAQRf9l1rXBpoJ2J0WkVF2IriXYoY3WJCRj64P-u6mKKwW3d86cy8wdCJVQlBWQwIVuUcQhAIt7aSQqSrUisX9Oo1E85MMAaqmOc6vPBpL71-UP0Md8Eo0DoKtBj2zW0zTPVvPdIlvlnjTC-o6_PDGP449ntpxmC-i6n2I8SZo13u0gIXvG_qJC-qtoa2vPV0TGJYy1bRuqQ1jqhjkShAxrz0itHGs0oR1YLKUjK_osdBWdam8XxqAq3q_J8frq6B4Jxm5F)!
* Make a plan to vote by mail so you don’t have to worry about how you will get to the polls June 10
* Contact us If you have a local action group. We can help you develop and run a Get out the Vote effort
* Make a gift to our [One Less Lemon](https://xtz223.keap-link012.com/v2/click/101d13163dda1c18909cda6100f90d0c/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnEXTtUPeRERE8xB1DtGBlnR3WcfMxP_eWuGpoOu8733Dm4BQlILSGgK408PzGFigseKKo6BICiqrV-ptfZe5FjRcXBMtewXB9LW8AsuZ7djGAhoVGuR4CKMsLZJznhaZIVWpzY-_PD7z_dUT78M0h3n-KcaWU3wz7g4C0j0ui2puVtFJN4a_EKkucJxhGGwpsMGua7CVwq5k65h-qRSK-jM-w_FtmZ-0QmJa) initiative to help us mobilize more common sense New Jerseyans.

We are now just 87 days away from the June Primary. I believe that we CAN turn New Jersey red this Fall. But it means that we must get to work now and I know that I can count on you to be an integral part of our Get Out the Vote plan
---
| | [GIVE to One Less Lemon](https://xtz223.keap-link012.com/v2/click/7ff256b3494b73efdb743af330d2c572/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnCVxtShvESKidZC6dInFHWpRd5d1jCz8720fdCroOvO8z_DODQgVV5QJiOFCV8ZC8MBiJY1ERSutiFfPLZtGQRh40EhVp1b3BuLb1_AHeIzDBZt5QINBh2zL5SrPNumhyDa5Iw237sZfniiMoo8nWS-zAsbxpxhbScnZuTuIyfb4aCSka0U72zj-RGS62PeFVpxw0pGVBieVbn0218egYlgzuoiy5cne6bgxqMT7FzkOL-l4B4QTZw8=)
---
| For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
|
---
| President
Common Sense Club
---
|
---
| Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsense.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. name: Survival Food Kit
subject: The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis
body:
The loss will be beyond what you can imagine...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20662/6374453/dc52c4279f3679376bbae78647a92e10883914fb/dcb1fac9112659a588bae4129da5455996d2a849)
---
| | |
---
_March 15th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis**
---
---
**This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20662/6374453/e36648f66cde767afff745e71b4ebe70a135114c/dcb1fac9112659a588bae4129da5455996d2a849). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20662/6374453/e36648f66cde767afff745e71b4ebe70a135114c/dcb1fac9112659a588bae4129da5455996d2a849) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20662/6374453/e36648f66cde767afff745e71b4ebe70a135114c/dcb1fac9112659a588bae4129da5455996d2a849) on these survival food kits while you can. **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20662/6374453/e36648f66cde767afff745e71b4ebe70a135114c/dcb1fac9112659a588bae4129da5455996d2a849)

You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. More Raving Customer Reviews! Rory H. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." Billy H. "Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." Kevin S. "The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." Carol B. "I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." Ken K. "I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." | | | | | MATERIAL CONNECTION DISCLOSURE: You should assume that the sender of this email has an affiliate relationship and/or another material connection to the person or businesses mentioned in this message and may receive commissions from purchases you make on subsequent web sites. You should not rely solely on information contained in this email to evaluate the product or service being endorsed.Always exercise due diligence before purchasing any product or service. | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by newsletter@gunowner-news.com** 514 Earth City Plz, Ste 310, Earth City, MT 63045 US | | | | ---|---|---

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Defeat DEI Survey
body:
DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7f1d46b201b84f37bb8015424f201296&_e=jIdTq82LDHVba3oC0jYRZ0PkZDoKM0CZhQc26b7VwjIodLm75eEACcTfO3EkDqwDogZ5Gsha6OA8PkWlmFkKK1QOsSxHzHriN5ZTv9xLNDURoZEijOlqXkVHgY3N6aQc1mhY_-H41PR7XBCnAodmtXoxRTIOYS2qvpF26jBfaHOOaTShU1QWjqpjMIfOfKTsPC4Cnx681H2WIkdfcK6ZJX9fMi2wm6GjymDgthHe6eMY4sM93e0cQSeQJnJQLobdAChuJP7yaHCZrSU6qZUwAMqLQDHPXSc04UEXriHvEm1_whw9-bKF3q0DzrhfxQ-wcIvl-fswEx2N1rcLN9nS6LeMI0nurq7Uw7UbBK6yOHDT53lbXDodjw_I3J8gAwsh3qW2tvvhOOOc5vYtLgQhJg%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7f1d46b201b84f37bb8015424f201296&_e=jIdTq82LDHVba3oC0jYRZ0PkZDoKM0CZhQc26b7VwjIodLm75eEACcTfO3EkDqwDogZ5Gsha6OA8PkWlmFkKK1QOsSxHzHriN5ZTv9xLNDURoZEijOlqXkVHgY3N6aQc1mhY_-H41PR7XBCnAodmtXoxRTIOYS2qvpF26jBfaHOOaTShU1QWjqpjMIfOfKTsPC4Cnx681H2WIkdfcK6ZJX9fMi2wm6GjymDgthHe6eMdBWqy2qlw3a1I-wW5vdCHnCtV2Q4WurUuuU1WeEguRqtRgu04LEU00r6DnZ7JeMqcXgin8p9LUaF6KKsgc-U3WxOQNeTzVAt4zk4iGChIPSZFsTRHoXhcgZtE21DL5m5h0YK9NNmoFd_ISZVuUXrjdTKk9p1MeA6oOiv-nKshIQ%3D%3D).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7f1d46b201b84f37bb8015424f201296&_e=jIdTq82LDHVba3oC0jYRZ0PkZDoKM0CZhQc26b7VwjIodLm75eEACcTfO3EkDqwDogZ5Gsha6OA8PkWlmFkKK1QOsSxHzHriN5ZTv9xLNDURoZEijOlqXkVHgY3N6aQc1mhY_-H41PR7XBCnAodmtXoxRTIOYS2qvpF26jBfaHOOaTShU1QWjqpjMIfOfKTsPC4Cnx681H2WIkdfcK6ZJX9fMi2wm6GjymDgthHe6eMk0N0RZidmQQVf5KDur3lYCn2axSioNaeeN6dfpnaJfPl_Ywnbpx3g1wx7DEuvDLA0XMZJPZhMQYmalaMHoN09dh-mwlB6E66-YG4hPmcZKnHcSPM0oM0WD0iL6bn1mw-aO8yZ4GXICZitLgzOuKPvabRKWmYET2n4lT85K_bd4w%3D%3D)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

# Saturday, March, 15, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1869, Cincinnati attorney Aaron Champion hired former cricket player Harry Wright to organize, manage, and play for the Cincinnati Red Stockings, which became[ the first professional baseball team](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFurDAQheGngc5osDFeChe3odvbpkQDHi-TGHtlW4t4-2ijtKk_6ejo_7gvd-TA8fEfD7LVp0WC1AKU6PXikMO1DK2znkiSasn2ZpCg5AS3drd6Ms6vZjSgHeJonBpX1UM_bdO43fStZfteA9XrHgD00HlaV2VwkoqM86CaAchxTbn7TBzrTj5c6UW529LRBrvX-iyN-tfIuZHzeZ7dzqWmfL29kXPduQiHl-AofqWRs-dcqnjm5KkUThGDWLHQiiGISniIjePGMWJlkcmJUtP2xfFR2mzd8-QQuIymGeBxIIefK_WvNC8rvwMAAP__4N5pBg). Ready for St. Patrick’s Day festivities this weekend? [Here are 12 of the best and biggest parades](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPpSAUBeBfgx0GLipaUGxj97bd0oBcnncHxQB5xn8_cfrpzzn5cv69lpelSMf7r93R1JAWENBzobjsF28p3kvXeBMQAVWDRuoOhIJJjM1m1oDaBy0DrBr1NI3OweqUGMM49IMXDZlnTSjZSyFE37UBnVPaTqCeplCsE-ipptz-T3TUDUO80wdzu6a9iWar9SxM_WEwM5iv62rrhielAzFfabfHk2MwbymSt3fhK0Z02VZKR2Ewv4dOQi9hZDA7LJWXyk9bM61fhXt789Nm67Hwh8lgbrLx50UxUhk068R7txR_LPW3bz4GvgMAAP__IFZm0A) in the country. We particularly like Pittsburgh's green horses! We’re sponsored today by the nonprofit [World Concern](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z0FqAyEUANDT6C7D96s1WbgIFMkmgS6aLgdn_BqLGQcjE3L70u57gQfv6zyefS55SRd_J9tjHRFQ70DuhB6Dz-U1Kh5sJEKSnKwwCkHiAfb8ZoWJRpAKYdKwR09Smr1GoaOe1Bwn5Nn-aiCFFgCg1RBpmqTxB5RkQgTJFFDIvbbhu-al3yiWV92oDXO982Jvva8PJo8MHUOX8paXNDxrK2Guy0xtGWpLDN3qEzF07vPycT0dr6d3x5sN6zOXkh9vhilId5_Ln9r_W24WfwIAAP__YxxTlg), offering an opportunity to help children in need in Somalia.

## Senate Votes to Avoid Shutdown
The Senate [voted 54-46](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL_upCAUhZ8GO8zlj8NYUGxjN9tuaRAuejcIRpgx8_Ybt_91JznJOV--P6_55ShRXn-7HW2LZZYgBw6Ki2EOjtJ31l2wEVGi6tAKoyUoOcKz2-yI5mmeED2IATH6h9cSPfoRNZhlHDqy9xooMQgAGHQfcVmUcaNUaEIExTRgoFbO_m-h3DaM6Vs-ePa-7F2yW2tHZeoXkxOT03VdfV58xqvePZPTURI18pXJyZe8nljvWDG7hvxTGvITj_eSyLvM4zsHyitfKCW-3i95x9x43d4tlCvz02cnxocWsjttOC5KierDMA3r7ij9Z2o_OfpY-S8AAP__MZRsGA) and passed a six-month funding bill Friday, averting a government shutdown hours ahead of the midnight deadline. Sen. Rand Paul was [the lone GOP dissenter](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kE_r3CAYhD-NuRleNX82Bw8pJbcthR62t2D0dWNrNKhJ2G9f0vvvNAMDw8Pzes5P5bwL7x9qQ1lsnDnwloKgrJ2Ncv4zN5WRFpGjqFCyvuEg-ACPapXdQ9uFdUPPrekbGOyjEwyBa2WU6QEqJ-83EKxlANA2tcVlEb0auMDeWBCkATSuxFT_iS6UFa3_xBNTreNWebmWsmciRsInwqfruuoth3sjfMJAj0z4FPC6Y4_eFafvmtejmHgFqk5MBQ1VtmCiWa_HholqdWKmKhi6KP0305KObad5x2BceNPFeU_4pBIdRza-fv9kRExRO0PE92-3KLzyL0x7laTZL-e9y11PGnhvyvn_3OUrj6fk_wIAAP__UVx26w), while nearly all Democrats opposed the bill, except for Sen. Jeanne Shaheen, with Independent Sen. Angus King voting in favor. The bill required only 51 votes. Earlier, 10 Senate Democrats, including [Minority Leader Chuck Schumer](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kMFuhCAURb8Gd5gHaJUFiyaNu2m669IgPPQ1CEaYmczfN3bf9c09OTnft_lmKVJaP-2OpoY8S5A9B8VFP3tL8TV3jTcBUaJq0Iihk6CkhrHZjB8X9L6XaEELEUbn9LgEkKDs4IQbGzIXDZToBQD0XRtwWdRgtVQ4-ACKdYCeaj7bn0ypbhjiKz_wbF3em2i2Wo_C1DuTE5OTXVzCZ2nXfM1MTl85UiVXmJyK2-47ntxjwOQLL_fjyGflaz54uCdPaeULxcjthtbzgslWvH41ny-mJvJMfQihB617Dc1p_PGkGKm8DayDdbcU_5zqf40eRv4GAAD__54Pad8), provided the necessary votes to clear a procedural hurdle, drawing condemnation from other party members. The bill is now before [President Donald Trump](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFuwyAUheGngY0ILsbYA0MXtnTtaEG4BCoMUSCx8vZV2rnrOdI3_F_n7exyyfX66XY0I7YNOCjGJRNqCy6X1zbRYCIioKRohJ6AS1j5QpPxC1wULgECeuGU8HHRYfKLVnr262Wl2bw1LoUSnHM1nSJ6L7VbQaIOkUsycQx5tPvpu-U6Esbyak-8ny5tp8WkMW6dyA8CloAdCVMu5f0RsKntWPHoBGzH6gYSsEqss5hX9jewm-sdO4uPGnK9Mp9LYT09RmhHJWDp3YTbkUvJfdZk4tfd5V-djv9KPA38BAAA__-xRGDb) who is expected to sign it into law.
## Report: Consumer Confidence Drops
Consumer confidence [dropped this month](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd1gwY5u4oHhPK3fZdksLw5DMyoYISKL8_Srbb311j47O13k9O945XT7dQbbFvIKCUSqUelyD4_21Dl2wkQgIO7LaDKAQZnXqrha8ORnUxmh00fsRTxoGNbmNwLs4-I7tm6ZQj1opNQ59pG1D42ZAMiEqFIOiwC2X_jtzaleK-ys_qPQ-H91ur63dqsB_AhYBi9t8omftL_k9C1j-3ysnqlXA4nOq94OKrJQaH5SarPleqnQHB9mKCySfrshCnmrlnGQkV97P2nJ5CVw4CPzQejYzTtPYFRtuT953rpMRg7ocjvdfq_ZXpYeFnwAAAP__ADZqZw) as Americans expressed growing concerns over tariffs, slumping markets, and a potential recession, according to survey results released Friday. The University of Michigan’s Consumer Sentiment Index reported confidence fell 10.5% percent to 57.9, [marking the lowest level](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO6yAQQNGvgY5oGHBsFxSvcZfXbmlhGOJZYWMZkih_v8r2W1_pFPfrNt88Z97v__1GrqUyI2CnwCjdzdFzfs9WRpeIkIwkp3uLYHCEQa7OjJ4Ax6vROplwHQDALjYYn4YheJ0ku48GRncaADp7SbQspvcjGupjAiMsUORWzst34b2tlPK7POm8hLLJ7NbWjirMP4GTwKmttHLOnyZwWh6Vd6pV4NTp0Q5jr9r52A7VTh9JvfxZFYWyl42DCmVPHGkPJHCSp4vHi3Pmeu2Fhfvm-VeV7a8DT4c_AQAA__8Gt11i) for the index since November 2022. Companies have also noted [a shift in consumer behavior](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OqzAQxfGnMZ3RMDYhFC5uQ5fbbolsPA6z8kdknKC8_Srbb32kn47-X7f1Zjlyvv-3iUwLZUXAUYKSw7h6y_G96s6bQISkOjLDpBEUznDtdqMnDbApR8NMOF6moC7gttmThjBftevYfDRQwzgAwKj7QM6pyc6oaPIBlNBAnlup_Xfh3HYK8V1eVPutpC6avbXHIdQ_gYvA5TzPfstu-4wClw8tcAElcBm0wMVTbFaeNiZbmzxtzdK68mxyK_l4JqryeFD2nO_SJvay2cohHJJziLZxyf3eUuyq8Y-TY-TjMgkN92Q5_v5pf_V5GfwJAAD__2-zZ-s), warning investors and retailers that first-quarter sales are weaker than expected and the rest of the year may fall short of projections. Concerns rattled the [commodity market Friday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQxvGnsbeg42ziMHjowpauHZGx74JTg1OwYvH2Fd27fdIn_aT_1328u5ji-vh0C9nCeUTA7gLq0nZjcDEdo5bBMhGSkmRboxEU9nCTs8WgrxzczSNyCMzGTExG9waY0Rstoz01UG3XAkCnG6ZpUsb1qMgEBiU0UIglb80zx7XMxOnIb9oanxeZ7FzKaxfqQ-AgcKi1NtPkz0_gsFLdBQ5uK9EnOqf_eYYe1m_sjiw3G141phT3qxEaHouL6U8t_1W-Lf4GAAD___GWVGM), pushing gold to a record $3,004.86 per ounce, up 14% this year as investors seek a safe haven.
## Former Sen. Alan Simpson Dead at 93
Former Wyoming [Sen. Alan Simpson](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0UL2OszAQfBrTgZa1HZPCxde4y9deiRy8DnsyGGEniLc_cf11o9H8ab4e48Nz4vX13y9ka8wjAuoWZNvrMXhO56iaYCMRkmzI9kYhSLzD0MzWEMFwi9OEXt-hV8aoG0WvYZAahkk3bK80kL3uAUCrLtLzKY2_oyQTIkihgALXvHffmdc6U0xn_tDeTXlpkp1r3YqQ_wQ6ge44ju5dfM3Bn5dAoCs176dAt9JRBLotJ648XfAqFuhACnS9Euh88mtbeNlKXtudtvcz8XRRtPqa9zYwXb4BFRiQBsAIdM1uw3ZwSlxuRih4LZ7T77j611kfiz8BAAD__0v4aSw), a moderate conservative known for his wit, bipartisan outreach, and immigration reform, died Friday at 93. Simpson, who served as [a Wyoming senator](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwyAQQL_G3rDOd7iYgaFLtnTtaOFwJLQYIqBB-fsq3bs_vaf3ed7ONsSQrh_2YNN83hBwEUBiXjZnQ3xucnTGMyPTyGZWEoFQwzrejObdqnVZUdPqiFA7tUjWu5PaeoeXMZiXDWheZgBY5OR530lZjcTKeaBBArvQcpm-ckjtxj4-84PLdMnHGM2ttXsd6H3A04Cn3vuUuNfO_P0CBjz5XA4u4qeKysm2XISNNokajnvNSbjAVdgrO6FJIEi5kh6LcfceYgz1TQ0SrocN8a_X_vt_GPwNAAD__9I5XPc) from 1979 to 1997, was a key figure in rallying GOP senators around the party’s agenda, known for his caustic views, humor, and tackling tough issues. He received the Presidential Medal of Freedom in 2022. After leaving the Senate, Simpson [taught at Harvard University](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOszAQBOCnMd0is2tCKFz8DV3-9kpkwprsnbERdoLy9ieuuO66T1ppNTMft_HmJEhc_ruVbfFpRI0taIKmHWcn4T2aaraeGZkqtk1nUBP2-lo9bN9yQ95M_dQSMpnrlTrdGO-m5oI9cSX2_KapaRutdWtqz9NEneuRuJu9JmU0z1LSXn8mieXBPrzTi_f6ntYq2EcpW1b0T-GgcDiOo37myEc-zwqHkwqHLQUpcj_p9iL3wCd_exiFg0_7yjs8M2SO4IKL8AVZ1i2nCMnD8U6rxAVm4QyugFsYeqp2O2-HhCD50imjl9VJ-IlW_prqZfE7AAD__9PhaoQ) and the University of Wyoming, urging students to be politically involved. Former President George W. Bush called Simpson “ _one of the finest public servants ever to have graced our nation’s capital_.”
|

East Africa has just endured its worst drought in 40 years, leaving tens of millions without access to clean water, wiping out millions of livestock, and destroying crops. With domestic food production crippled, Somalia has relied heavily on imports—90% of its wheat coming from Russia and Ukraine—until those shipments stopped. On this day in 1869, Cincinnati attorney Aaron Champion hired former cricket player Harry Wright to organize, manage, and play for the Cincinnati Red Stockings, which became. Ready for St. Patrick’s Day festivities this weekend? in the country. We particularly like Pittsburgh's green horses! We’re sponsored today by the nonprofit , offering an opportunity to help children in need in Somalia. | Senate Votes to Avoid Shutdown The Senate and passed a six-month funding bill Friday, averting a government shutdown hours ahead of the midnight deadline. Sen. Rand Paul was , while nearly all Democrats opposed the bill, except for Sen. Jeanne Shaheen, with Independent Sen. Angus King voting in favor. The bill required only 51 votes. Earlier, 10 Senate Democrats, including , provided the necessary votes to clear a procedural hurdle, drawing condemnation from other party members. The bill is now before who is expected to sign it into law. Report: Consumer Confidence Drops Consumer confidence as Americans expressed growing concerns over tariffs, slumping markets, and a potential recession, according to survey results released Friday. The University of Michigan’s Consumer Sentiment Index reported confidence fell 10.5% percent to 57.9, for the index since November 2022. Companies have also noted , warning investors and retailers that first-quarter sales are weaker than expected and the rest of the year may fall short of projections. Concerns rattled the , pushing gold to a record $3,004.86 per ounce, up 14% this year as investors seek a safe haven. Former Sen. Alan Simpson Dead at 93 Former Wyoming , a moderate conservative known for his wit, bipartisan outreach, and immigration reform, died Friday at 93. Simpson, who served as from 1979 to 1997, was a key figure in rallying GOP senators around the party’s agenda, known for his caustic views, humor, and tackling tough issues. He received the Presidential Medal of Freedom in 2022. After leaving the Senate, Simpson and the University of Wyoming, urging students to be politically involved. Former President George W. Bush called Simpson “ one of the finest public servants ever to have graced our nation’s capital.” | ➤ President Donald Trump , the first president in a decade to address the Justice Department, outlined his vision Friday, calling for a commitment to rebuild public trust and combat crime and illegal immigration. () ➤ The Department of Justice confirmed Friday it is investigating Columbia University over allegations of concealing illegal aliens, a day after authorities searched two university residences with a warrant. () ➤ The Education Department announced Friday that over 50 universities are under investigation for promoting "race-based preferences" policies despite being warned in a memo last month. () **➤ **The FBI has issued a warning about counterfeit weight-loss drugs sold by noncompliant providers, including clinics and pharmacies, which often contain harmful impurities and are unsafe or unapproved. () | Flying together with our sponsor Somalia is facing a devastating combination of natural disasters, global conflicts, widespread poverty, and disease outbreaks. East Africa has just endured its worst drought in 40 years, leaving tens of millions without access to clean water, wiping out millions of livestock, and destroying crops. With domestic food production crippled, Somalia has relied heavily on imports—90% of its wheat coming from Russia and Ukraine—until those shipments stopped. Now, two in five children in Somalia suffer from acute malnutrition, and cholera is spreading in some regions. The food crisis, compounded by global humanitarian aid being redirected to Europe and the Middle East, has created a perfect storm, leading to a sharp rise in child malnutrition. We’re asking the Flyover Community to join us in partnering with World Concern to help get emergency nutrition packs (a peanut paste fortified with nutrients), water, and hygiene products to those with the most need. Every $12 feeds a child for a month. . | ➤Top-ranked Duke men's basketball survived vs. North Carolina last night, advancing to the ACC tournament championship after a late lane-violation by the Tar Heels. () ➤ The Cincinnati Bengals are reportedly closing in on massive contracts with both of their star receivers, Ja'Marr Chase and Tee Higgins. Chase's contract is expected to be worth $41 million per year, which would make him the highest-paid non-quarterback in the NFL. Both deals are expected to be completed within the next few days. body:
Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/H4-cJw0tMbU3Hx5MM7vQjZaOrGqGJTmEe6ElOglWXOQhEZVneUYij9gC8iM1k5MAgXk1QJt5Q8lWEjaevFkKyQlFXkLbhkFRwU-ssXw1rOh3scKdy9QmPNxWjE5HUk310Gih8MvIcNWpIBRQygPRtAY8F0ZMHx4XNgGyxDAZifY_Ef1uKeI703SM83jnIckXjoee_lSpufNeSecjdKOL-IDSKul1X3weJMrt1vRmn3_WCP6ZFytSt5IYIMw9QnNkGtAiNB7GPT0ptNNJT9ihVj-vIHX8BzpLcO38gXomowMauD8hgbcDSpmBQiyr_Naz_68-74cYHnaVEYWzgbgagZw8AjuyWHB8gOOdbOhmSygm2e-1Wqwf1dNTRjBCHYVtAk472vqz9qAcLSroVUfkAxxFe654ZMI7LrPBGr-K8dwY0pAqWujKdweBBq098RiCbNt9V-b6oaYwU4EX2e24yPsZMHHIyR3P/ameww9rt4xYGhr10carRh0sSY9eWvCbd/7)

| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

Did you know that America's Founders rejected birthright citizenship--the idea that someone who is born within our country's borders is automatically a citizen?

This idea--which is a misunderstanding of the meaning of citizenship--is the subject of an ongoing national debate that will have long-lasting implications for our nation.

I'm writing today to offer you a FREE issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College's digest of liberty, that explains the facts about birthright citizenship.

**In this FREE issue, "Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny," you'll learn:**

* Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace
* How the 14th Amendment has been misinterpreted over the years
* What reforms are needed to restore the true meaning of citizenship

Since you're a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you'll find this issue interesting and informative. It will help equip you to engage in this critical debate.

And, if your friends and family have questions about this topic, you may want to share this _Imprimis_ issue with them.

You can receive your FREE copy of **" Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny"** at this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/birthright-citizenship-imprimis](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/nPoLtYNEyT2UrH96MCWTdTW21_8B3rOPQjf39jSiQqqXf_03DoH8_7apSg6G-o8cYqkFwhG12vbdT923Nxs2lNOl4AsJ_bTP_y9bsMOFU5oX3SzLGdyvORTYufffvOjGplcxrG-EGMhcttWgQm2Bew8kBOVRzwZkTIGfn_GvHh0ClXaqRNb76xk82xStjIuPYIl-lJ0pNQktdQiclCKiGJ9J_ZwCpo_oONeKN_7tQEMqebMyjjlixE6FB86aJMGO0Fi9o8Xo5Eorz4xzNuSi6CA69US5xYJqusUtfRcP0ptA0hRIWYdJVNa23w1GUWKHRbWHfvDTdB28lzmgo-XR-WH6K2dE1AKW_2lvt6AqYMqk7sXx-OoINmOCd6dMcIb8Ia9uDYKfIZkG3Vu_kJYR26lxOt9vqKlf_WAoUQVWpYiKgsphXRyKuFRJ_GE6mwoctnlY8k0_WEmm3p19t8y-fgC6EfC8NPZ5/iUza5VZ9fpuZExMRJI8MGSOzLXqDcpEo/7)

clean_body: Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend of Liberty, Did you know that America's Founders rejected birthright citizenship--the idea that someone who is born within our country's borders is automatically a citizen? This idea--which is a misunderstanding of the meaning of citizenship--is the subject of an ongoing national debate that will have long-lasting implications for our nation. I'm writing today to offer you a FREE issue of Imprimis , Hillsdale College's digest of liberty, that explains the facts about birthright citizenship. In this FREE issue, "Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny," you'll learn: Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace How the 14th Amendment has been misinterpreted over the years What reforms are needed to restore the true meaning of citizenship Since you're a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you'll find this issue interesting and informative. It will help equip you to engage in this critical debate. And, if your friends and family have questions about this topic, you may want to share this Imprimis issue with them. You can receive your FREE copy of " Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny"** at this secure link: Please don't delay! Get your free copy right away. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Pop Acta Media | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. | Update 15 March 2025
---
| |
---
Friends,
We are entering the Golden Age of America. President Trump, the House, and the Senate are working hard to restore Trust, Fairness, and Common Sense to the American People!
It will get tough before it gets better. We did not get in this trouble in one day and we will not get out of this trouble in one day. The Biden administration weakened our country in so many ways, but we are determined to turn things around.
Last weekend I spent a couple of days at the border in Arizona. We had zero border crossings on Saturday compared to 2,000 illegal crossings on that day last year. We are not out of danger. Dangerous illegal aliens are still harming our people. The cartels, with the aid of China, continue to weaponize immigration in an effort to overwhelm our resources. They are poisoning our people with fentanyl and engaging in modern day slavery with human trafficking.

# We the People, our government is a "government of the people, by the people, for the people" not a government for foreign people.

We are working hard with the Trump administration to turn things around to Make America Great Again for all Americans.
-We passed a budget resolution
* No tax on tips
* No tax on overtime
* Tax relief for seniors
* America First Tax Breaks

-We passed a CR
* Pay raise for enlisted soldiers
* Cut 20 billion dollars in IRS funding
* Not connected to an Omnibus
* Avoided a Government shut down

My incredible team and I have introduced two bills, supported cuts to wasteful spending, and we are fighting hard everyday to protect your God given rights.
It is a huge honor to be part of this important time in our nations history. Tracy and I love making friends and we are doing the work around the district and DC. Here is what we've been up to:
---
| MAN IN THE ARENA SPEECH Theodore Roosevelt
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
"I've been everywhere man". I've traveled just about every road in this here Virginia 5th Congressional District racking up 245,000 plus miles on my American made blue pick up truck. I've met amazing people and learned a lot about your concerns. Along the way I've attended almost 400 different churches in district. Tracy and I attend our church early Sunday and then I often attend a 2nd or 3rd. I've been to tractor pulls, rodeos, sat on many living room couches discussing issues, and shook an incredible number of hands. This activity has helped me better know you and it also helped my team and I solve many of your issues.

Many of you have seen my blue truck around the district, but what you may not know is I bought it with zero miles in 2019 and it is now has over 245 thousand miles. In reflection on the many memories, this Johnny Cash song "I've been everywhere" comes to mind [Click here.](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KENx_I7cbRwOXNNUg5HpKrr-yIpC1K7da_ibnobWiEeLNezTRMtACKA78Mc5OTDoPO5QoZhqxS9lGkAC1upLpd2WtsCVZ5hPn9iUzJIIWd6tnkikhrDiBL0PgZP_8RAlgxrYepcmaLc7LfwXDUUab13-GnO_wlvLiajewsfqGOaNK3p48_IuMg==&c=aR1oQ2Vrh4lB5yCVRKtfbSCM5d33yjD4dQAKIV8v1MxPy5VRM-jsgg==&ch=GcEGQEYDidFgB75R1q8R02-NCJPupfNP6k1yJBD0Scuqh6B2m80r3A==)

clean_body: McGuire is Putting in the Work | | | | == | == | Update 15 March 2025 | | Friends, We are entering the Golden Age of America. President Trump, the House, and the Senate are working hard to restore Trust, Fairness, and Common Sense to the American People! It will get tough before it gets better. We did not get in this trouble in one day and we will not get out of this trouble in one day. The Biden administration weakened our country in so many ways, but we are determined to turn things around. Last weekend I spent a couple of days at the border in Arizona. We had zero border crossings on Saturday compared to 2,000 illegal crossings on that day last year. We are not out of danger. Dangerous illegal aliens are still harming our people. The cartels, with the aid of China, continue to weaponize immigration in an effort to overwhelm our resources. They are poisoning our people with fentanyl and engaging in modern day slavery with human trafficking. We the People, our government is a "government of the people, by the people, for the people" not a government for foreign people. We are working hard with the Trump administration to turn things around to Make America Great Again for all Americans. -We passed a budget resolution No tax on tips No tax on overtime Tax relief for seniors America First Tax Breaks -We passed a CR Pay raise for enlisted soldiers Cut 20 billion dollars in IRS funding Not connected to an Omnibus Avoided a Government shut down My incredible team and I have introduced two bills, supported cuts to wasteful spending, and we are fighting hard everyday to protect your God given rights. It is a huge honor to be part of this important time in our nations history. Tracy and I love making friends and we are doing the work around the district and DC. Here is what we've been up to: | MAN IN THE ARENA SPEECH Theodore Roosevelt | | | | | | "I've been everywhere man". I've traveled just about every road in this here Virginia 5th Congressional District racking up 245,000 plus miles on my American made blue pick up truck. I've met amazing people and learned a lot about your concerns. Along the way I've attended almost 400 different churches in district. Tracy and I attend our church early Sunday and then I often attend a 2nd or 3rd. I've been to tractor pulls, rodeos, sat on many living room couches discussing issues, and shook an incredible number of hands. This activity has helped me better know you and it also helped my team and I solve many of your issues. Many of you have seen my blue truck around the district, but what you may not know is I bought it with zero miles in 2019 and it is now has over 245 thousand miles. In reflection on the many memories, this Johnny Cash song "I've been everywhere" comes to mind == | | Fellow Virginia Congressman Morgan Griffith and fellow Veteran, US Marine, and our US Vice President JD Vance! | | | My friends Rep Marjorie Taylor Greene and Rep Pat Fallon. MTG's endorsement in my primary was a huge help. | | What an honor to shake President Trumps hand after his incredible speech to the nation. | | A return to fairness. My brother Rusty McGuire and Riley Gaines discuss the positive changes going on like getting men out of womens sports. | | | | My wife and best friend Tracy and I helped the USO put together hundreds of care packages for our deployed troops. | | My friend and our Border Czar Tom Homan is a real patriot and he's working tirelessly to keep the American people safe. Thank you Sir! | | Kellyanne Conway is a great strategist. She was a huge help not only for President Trump, but also in my race for congress! | | My friend, fellow Navy SEAL, and US Senator Tim Sheehy of Montana. | | Fellow veteran and our Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth. He is laser focused on making our military lethal. | | My friend, fellow wrestler, and fellow Congressman Rep Jim Jordan of Ohio. | | Our new AG Pam Bondi is doing a great job restoring law and order. | | Fellow Veteran and our new Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard. | | | A 13-year-old boy who survived cancer, DJ Daniel, stole the show during to Congress. Who noticed the democrats would not stand or clap for this young person who overcame so much? | Rep Tim Moore (Former North Carolina State Speaker of the House) and I recently spent a couple of days touring our Southern Border in Arizona with other freshman at Tucson Arizona and the Nogales crossing. | | | My friend Rep Juan Ciscomani, Arizona's 6th congressional district since 2023, led our freshman trip to the Arizona Border. Juan is one of the most knowledgeable when it comes to immigration, trade, and security at the Southern Border. | | | | Long time friends. | | My wife Tracy and I were invited to the White House where President Trump hosted the Prime Minister of Ireland. | | | We discussed important issues with "Americas Mayor" Rudy Giuliani, fellow veteran and US marine Daniel Penny, and others. | | | D.O.G.E., we are spending countless hours eliminating waste, fraud, and abuse with Elon Musk. | | | | | Each RSC committee meeting is better than the last because of the incredible speaker lineup. Republican Study Committee (RSC) Chair Rep August Pfluger is a fellow veteran, and a F22 Fighter pilot. RSC is the largest conservative group in Congress. | DEI = Illegal Discrimination | | D.E.I. = Didn't Earn It. DEI is illegal discrimination, racist, and it is a tool used by the radical left to bully institutions and individuals into submission. Requiring equal outcome is Marxist. Thank you University of Virginia Board of Visitors for your vote to right this wrong. My hope is the rest of our country will return to the common sense of meritocracy. == | | Speaker Mike Johnson and I with former Congressman Bob Goodlatte who served 13 terms in Congress. | Thank You Lee Greenwood for the Mention | | == | God Bless the USA. Thank you Lee Greenwood for the mention and your great American song.== | A Veteran Story of Redemption | | | In case you missed it, here is my Veterans Day story of redemption. == | | | | | | | | | Fellow veteran and Virginia Delegate Tom Garrett. | | A Green Beret and Two frogs. | | | Powhatan Sheriff Brad Nunnally, thank you and your team for keeping us safe! | | Whats better than one Navy SEAL, two Navy SEALs! | | Chairman of the House Oversight Committee James Comer. | First McGuire Telephone Town Hall | | | We had our first telephone town hall Wednesday February 26. There were 67,000+ callers. Be on alert for our next telephone town hall in May. == | | | Robert Kennedy JR is going to Make America Healthy Again. | | | Appomattox Sheriff Robby Richardson and Lynchburg Delegate Wendell Walker. | | | | | | | | | Liberty University interview. | | | I spoke to the Young Americans for Freedom students at Liberty University about freedom and our efforts in DC to return our country to common sense. | | | We attended the National Day of Prayer where President Trump addressed the nation. President Trump said he truly believe God spared him so he can save our country. | | | | | | | We have some incredible talent in my Republican freshman class. | | | One of our founding fathers, President Thomas Jefferson. | | | Fellow Patriots Buckingham GOP Chair Romana Christian and Carolyn Bowman. | | | Our new Virginia State Senator District 10 Luther Cifers is doing a great job! | | | My friend, fellow veteran, and US Marine Chris Lacivita did a great job helping President Trump and me win. Thank you Sir! | | | | My new friend and patriot Laura Loomer. | | | | | | | | | | | A return to common sense. The democrats, with their ridiculous gender gymnastics, put men in prison with women. Then they seemed surprised when pregnancies went way up in those prisons. Thank G-d...

I reached you just in the nick of time.

**It 's Randy Fine - I'm rushing to you with three urgent updates about my Special Election to replace MIKE WALZ in FL-06:**
1\. A radical anti-Israel group called to CENSURE ME right after I won my primary
2\. A far-Left blog just fired off a 1,200+ word HIT PIECE against me
3\. Election Day is on APRIL 1ST and I'm short of my final fundraising goal
Let me be real with you -

We have one of the slimmest House Majorities in ~100 years. If we lost this Special Election, the odds of Democrats assuming the Speaker's gavel and sabotaging President Trump's second term will SKYROCKET.

_**[That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Scalise ONE FINAL TIME before my Special Election to raise a million dollars to help win my seat, elect more strong Republicans, and deliver on President Trump's powerful agenda.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/uryf-O3UhsABB8Nl95hHNEajBBt7G6NqWGVVgSo6GO4g4rbRgnAuIwd21bMuU_JQiBpCaBmkXL0827Z5Yj2jMNAc9QrsDmiz-OYHqmr_umygz-Bv6HreYg7kjBH3YncYf7DktcPZ7Q_RmtC2r4nHmp1rhWvkUYceS8QsP_CxJDb_9pvRBmfo18_DGIsMxibsEFJJIeye99XSOHsZ1qyCyqtTanNBtKcN1UGOw-eHOlPs_wOq_CclhUttb8iOdw34ZMK_vNDkA8hGHF-cCZnbTvDo5fpVUKesm_8nLHYC72-h2LnGnn1VC7dfAJcC7bq5UX2tB1lUBurNI3uPQQgpk52pNZt4xB1AcklmJ5rI2JaTgh_2LzSRWqyc_YhUUQkDGRLAx-LJXha3cbgdlBzqETcvJlN089yDZjJDxMuXuuBhlezpKEOTyU1y9qi3gIjk7p2HgQV5Fzjawn9X78n7w-JOxh9xZd2PbN0PdUBpPDge26y_mLtkRLjyjad7LPiF1Obo_e2sIa8/ADtzFZq-YzQ6CxbWAFieuitYdQhfJzpT/7 "That’s why I’m partnering with Majority Leader Scalise ONE FINAL TIME before my Special Election to raise a million dollars to help win my seat, elect more strong Republicans, and deliver on President Trump’s powerful agenda.")**_

_I 'm personally asking: Would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks for this noble cause?_ **[**YES >>**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/Rr42d76V9XIlRowq76IrUBX_kg7mm9iVYdnifU4CpX64-6bZZEPw-RQzalrl0m8ZDKjoOoYFxH8-ixbTc7WpkHGPcbsJWFguSCqrigJetgj-mqUlwfs75-C1FB00UNcOCtqg_Zhg_Jh_hjuJpWcy0kIWLzsP0B3cnZZSVY2vx8UIYxgCivyVB0OqnA04-48JmhDZkFJjJBJ4dZAB7DO5KWQr7WpqJ_R7arCoySe1QqBx3JLHjhpr3EYkrSVPGod6b8vuFgo14cqX98mGRWPJHuw6NlLRxAdiQvQx--9QeU_5y5UOm7aVQNES3hB-W0kLpZMvvXTVzBoFmK5wcfdXXwAn3VbxSkxTRNp-JehGh96IVaW6BBYyw_UCl3zgNrXG6mq0-4bGkoFbX3M72xa3CS-BCkHnktiUIJJ4Ts_1iQTIQXCdLwGygqdkxiwy3Gh1Cm1e1WENzZBA0VqxpsGfvPd_t8vh7z5yaoXFgno00wtqimaVJPo921u1MYguG1kMe36KiolkOcg/T5lGFta4K6nlLmsij3KZtrSgTHQ1ufNS/7)_[**NO >>**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/K99DmVD4yAt_kH4k0nMdU_tVG6Sz6_wo1edkJpb1sIIZe9kWVnCHWFWRZZrwQBhsGGakpxe5y-cv5KxjBkTUifjBs01O3UpQ8fLEF6Rcgprh4cXtQrvPsIhqokWq28u3IOFvFTGReuADq8wyYzABXdncbe9SPV4BaBMWTUXwuaKooPgOriipInHj3AU8ozSI7meQD0ZAIu_xCeiE60M8xHsZzM9Q79SVWWf6Wwenpty-QVvU7QMEBfUggY7YJ3TN86vXGPEOrzexS7a4byua4yuJ_ZjrZUbx4iGvjqsOGOt2_f0kNXm1SMZfgkJNCcbYE7l6DBv1eMB_VZPUXSfbsvhjW-oUR0pu-_et73JN1iGSfU_VLNziRIstytCGPQvPRaBb8fmflswbj8YnTuOYFkuE0hAZYMNi-8da_Sw62EPnA4Phv6VLd2vcX6H1RV5eAUBrijgxNSfmhy2taqgD1Ti7SFYX7tCqTay3-Tgcn89UJ8l6Q7nLEZkfdR0pTL-_sK0KMNhhGZ8/L1NBaXHGRDohyGkWSXLw7tmIgGI1vhz1/7)**
Look, the Democrat Machine has spent a fortune slandering my name, lying about my record, and making me sound like a monster.

So here's who I really am:

I'm a proud father of two... I'm a proud Jew who will forever stand with our ally Israel... And I'm a Trump-endorsed Conservative so you know you can trust me.

I'm 100% confident I can defeat the Democrat Machine and win this Special Election - but only with support from fellow Patriots like you.

Remember: My Special Election is right around the corner. I could REALLY use your support right away.

"That’s why I’m partnering with Majority Leader Scalise ONE FINAL TIME before my Special Election to raise a million dollars to help win my seat, elect more strong Republicans, and deliver on President Trump’s powerful agenda." I 'm personally asking: Would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks for this noble cause? Look, the Democrat Machine has spent a fortune slandering my name, lying about my record, and making me sound like a monster. So here's who I really am: I'm a proud father of two... I'm a proud Jew who will forever stand with our ally Israel... And I'm a Trump-endorsed Conservative so you know you can trust me. I'm 100% confident I can defeat the Democrat Machine and win this Special Election - but only with support from fellow Patriots like you. Remember: My Special Election is right around the corner. # Saturday, March 15, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1866, the state of Texas renounced its secession from the United States, officially rejoining the Union after the Civil War. ([See Ordinance](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7uO6yAUAL8GuqDD4RUXFLehy223tHg5RsIhMmzs_P1q028_mtF83eabL7U87v_9lu04lzYjoLqAuHA1J1_qe5Y02QBp4jRbbiSC0FJPdLUygDG4cL2kJHiYtBEYVZbeR0yAQIv9lYHgioMywjDAfI06XCEJLacQiIScymg7G2se-fR9qe_2yjuLbaPVrmM8OxH_CDqC7jgONnplH5Dd24ug2_NC0PnQvsc4CbqeY-69tAdBx9Xm97jyq9ZsHVulu03Po9RaujZEwn3zpX5K48_1l8WfAAAA___IUlsV)) If you stayed up to watch the [moon turn red](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00Luu4yAYBOCnwR0W_OBbQbEN3dl2SwtzCSiY3zIkTt5-lfSnH818mn8_649JOZXbX7N71V4BV2AwUCYoH1ZnUn6vsnNqY27hnVd8ksDEKMeli2qQsDBjtjEEZ8JsFzMvJvAp8MmIeZu7pD5lTPCBs2ESU8_Az3bcZubEKJdtI5J5lxqefYu--ZepIb_x6c_e4t5lFVs7KhF_CGgC-rqu3uZk7xDxURuWT4qALv6qBHRGazIB_dkkoJkgoLkkoG309k7x0WiLvnpa26OUVG50y4iOXnjudEcs1NucjurpEbFhpeHEnRp7Yq30iyOgu1O540o5pzpORLLbblL-atuv9z0V_A8AAP__Cj1zlw) over Texas the night before last, maybe you slept in this morning. But, hey, it's Saturday, which is reason enough to sleep in. Treat yourself to a little fun with today's sponsor, [Skyhawk Drone](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z0FrwyAYxvFPo7cGfV8TzcHDoLhTNwaDjV2Cb9RWZpuSuKb99iO77_57Hvh_HIaDzyVfji_-HG29p2kAAe1O4E62Q_C5PAbFgyUResmjlVqBwE51PT_ZNhiVCIkgAXlSxvRJGCXH1IZRIvFstzOBspWi1agbAdGMHRkRsFM9EVMihlynuamnWOPdL6k8plucm3E682JPtV4Xhk8MHAO3rmuzzuN3vlApm2Dg4FkaKd-gY-AO-KX3qDeMbvkhyXD__ule-WzDdc2l5KXTTInj2ee_Pa__Jt8s_AYAAP__cExVpA), with high performance and a 4K camera at a price you won't believe.

Abilene 🌥️ 65/40° | Amarillo ☁️ 53/30° | Austin ⛅ 81/48° | Brownsville ☀️ 87/60° | Corpus Christi ☀️ 88/56° | DFW 🌥️ 72/43° | El Paso ☁️ 59/39° | Houston ☁️ 84/55° | Laredo ☀️ 90/54° | Lubbock ⛅ 58/34° | Midland ☁️ 63/41° | San Antonio ☁️ 82/49° | Tyler ⛅ 75/46° | Waco ☁️ 77/43°
|
---
## High Winds, Wildfire Threats Sweep State
A cold front moving across the state Friday brought hurricane-force winds in some areas and created a high fire risk. Western Texas saw the [triple threat](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O6yAUBOCnwR0RHMDYBcVt3OW2W1oYDjESDhGczc_brxJpy-2_GY3m67yefS75evnvD3T0THUFAYYLxaVZo8_lteohuk3EWQ7opNUg1KjHedidnjxMkzZ6FhDlZsWYtJ8tGKsVgjRDdu8yoaSRwlhlTwJwCuM2iahGPW8b0wJjptpOtCPh0_dUXvWO7RTqMRS3E906U_8YLAyWD-hU2xF237H1t2KwpNow-E6_hCcfsPMbtoSB-CfBa-KPfI085YbcXyOP35041ehfDJahuXh75FJyHy3T4nL4XD4j6M9X7g5-AgAA__8GGGWm) of wind, dust, and wildfire danger, with Lubbock reporting 80 mph winds early in the day and gusts [blowing over](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1vwjAUAH-Ns4Gen7_iwQMqStWBrqhT5NgvxJIhUWwg_PuK7l1vOJ3ufOpPPuV0u3z7K7m6jXOPgGoHYsdVH33Kr1420Q0QLW_IcSMRhJbaNpNrUUvSI8YgQXOBbbTEg0ExeGmtGpvk3jIQXHFQRpg9ILVBDy1EoaUdBiaBYqrzuq8TVdp8GfNrftC6D_O1yW6qdSlMHBh2DLvtTRl2PoT7k3ydaGXYlerrvTDsuAXQCMhR8dZwqwww0RUmjlIz1JWJo2m_bvDxuC2GPs1y_jmmPqhDs7q4PFPOqWjDJFyuPuW_gvrvkofD3wAAAP__pq9d7w) a tractor trailer on I-40 near Amarillo. The gusts severely damaged vehicles on I-27 near Canyon, as you can [see here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LFuwyAUheGnwVuiC1zADAxRI1cd0jXqZGFDYipsLHOTJm9fpXvXMxx9-s-n_uRTTsv108_R0eNSegFC7UDuuOqDT_nZYxPcAMHyJjpuUIDUqG0zOR69bY1VXAlQSqEMsvUYjdGj5wFsk9zrDCRXHJSRZg8itqMeWghSox0GhhBDorLtaYoUH75e8rPc47Yfy9xkNxGtlckDEx0T3eO1MtF9l4WmWKls8_X2ZKKr5OlWmei4BXjhrJIaAbG1hsmuMnlEzYQmJo-m_Vjg7b6sJr6b9fx1TP2oDs3mwvqTck5VG4ZwnX3Kfwj6t8rdid8AAAD__8MFXy8). The National Weather Service announced fire threats ranging from critical to extreme in North Texas, marking the first time in 16 years the area has seen an [extreme fire threat](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OhCAQx58GO8wwIEpBcY3dXnulQRlXcrhugCzr21_c_tr_Z_L7uU03F2J43L_dTra812NCwI6D5KKbvAvxnFTj7QzeiIas6BWC1EqbZrNedAMRqlkPxrsB_dIbANLaGNlJKZtgrzGQohPQ9bJvAWlY9DyAl1qZeWYKyIdypLZsVOjt8hrP40WpXY69iXYr5ZmZ_GI4Mhxrre0y5wfVfPkMx0-F4XhJVyA8_MnXkIinkH-5dzG6zNcjFV6PVDZeyZWNEt9dWjYuFMOxSdY_a4gxZN0zBffdhfj5L_8CeVn8CwAA__8e3GNH). With warmer temperatures forecasted for the weekend, the front may have produced [winter's last gasp](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOgzAQBNCvMR1ovbZxUri4hi7XXokWvA6WDEbGCsl9_Snpr57RPGl-buONYorb_ZtWdvUZ8oiApgXVSjN6iuk16sa7CfxVNuyk1Qiq1_21WZz0VnqaNFnNxFJeDIVgtAaNPAWyTXTvMVDSSDBW2Q6QL3M_XcCrXl-nSWhgH2suXV248pOOkF75waWb89okt9S6H0J9CRwEDud5duvroI22mreY3yWBw8bn8U6Z6sJF4EClxjmxwGHOybeh5K22oTD_cvtBWgSURino9mVvivP7GVOKR2-FhvtKMX38-u8hD4d_AQAA___g-WOY) of freezing temperatures in the Panhandle, as well as hail and severe storms in North Texas.
## Plane Bound for DFW Catches Fire
An engine on an American Airlines flight bound for Dallas-Fort Worth [caught fire](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvgzAQBeBfYzYjYxsDg4cubOnaER34nFxlMDqckPz7Kh26dX1Penr6vi7TBSjRdv2EFX15xjxppVupjGzaKQCl12Sr4GcVhqZC33RWK-OsG6qb7xYzg-2DMwMuqFw3aFwCuDZ0Eed-qci_x5Rp2ka1nelqpbFf3NyrYJwd5llYhYFK5rrcsOATjphe-YFcL3mtkr-Vsh_CfAg9Cj2e51kz3gvy8e7fSeYUhB7vh9DjliVt33cmPCTjnrlgkBALsoQVmRbYJBAn2vCQe4INZSRGGXB7IMuYnxJipERQUP4pWKHHin3YT0qJDtcJq64rUPq9WP41e3j9EwAA__9AVXB_) at Denver International Airport on Thursday evening, forcing an evacuation of the passengers and crew. 12 minor injuries were reported as a result of the blaze, which was quickly distinguished by emergency personnel after the plane landed in Denver and taxied safely to the gate. Passengers exited the aircraft via [one of its wings](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuKtTAUhZ8mdkouJjFFih9-7M40wzClbJOtbojmEMO5vP3g9FOuC4vF932bbkCJjvUDdvT1teRJcqlbrlqhpwiU3lPfRD_z6ESDXthecmV645rNg3aD5MIYLmzUGJ1edHRgg0QBc4SG_DXGldCCa6tsxyUOwcwDj8r0bp5ZzzFSzaWrG1Z8wbmkd35g6ULem-S3Wu8nU_-YHJkcYQ4HPs9uzVfM5Pj1ebk7FgpwtEAl0YFnuyRat9oGqGG7JBVsIx4PLFfnnktlcjxrLm-mRopM_RfCWTvwQTTFx_uTUqLTWNbzdQdKv2fqn3QeXv4EAAD__4TEZxQ) and deployed slides while flames and smoke billowed from the engine. After taking off from Colorado Springs, the plane was [diverted to Denver](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHO4yAQBp8Gd0QYA44Limvc5dorrTWsk9VhsGDPSd7-lPR__X0ajebPbbkBJcr337Cj59dWFq20lWqQvV0iUHovpot-VXHqO_T9aLQanHFT9_CxjyuqiNukrDFmWsFtTsVgbQA94tiR_8DU0Nte2XEYL0rjNbj1quLgzLSuwiiMxKVe-IGML2hbepcT6yWUvUv-wXw0MfwSehZ6_hvP7yD0nPHZhJ5TCZCEng9oDfMda5N4QvgHjFHCxlgl7FgpQJZANVHGJo8EGeVGFSWwjJhPrJIyY83AVDKkz_colYWeu-rj8aSUqLlRGHXfgdLXjn_MdXr9PwAA__8tMnCW) when pilots sensed high engine vibrations and told air traffic control they were cruising “slower than normal.”
## Houston-Area Town Named Wealthiest in State
Hunters Creek Village is the wealthiest town in Texas, according to [analysis](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GO6yAQQNGvgY5oDBhMQfEad3ntlhZ4xjESiSMzG8d_v8r2W1_pSPfrOl1TqeVx-5_uFPm9bJMG3SswqusnTKWek5UYM2DoJMXOWw3GWRfkGg1oNyNiAFzykFKmkMPSezOjBT8MssQPBqbrO-i98RfQNMwuD4DG2ZCzsEBYeNsvvBLTO7WlntuL9su83WWNK_OzCfNP6FHokVdajk8RejwoVV4LNVa8HQ-VT_XdVOPEJPQo94jPo9RamvPCwu2eSv01-c_JV9Q_AQAA___NdlS_) from Stacker, a digital content firm. Households in the pleasant Houston-area enclave average an annual median income above $250,000, with 75% of the 4,400 residents earning at least $200,000 a year and only 1.6% falling below the poverty line. The Stacker study considered communities with populations of at least 1,000 and ranked locations by median household income, with ties broken by the percentage of people earning more than $200,000 annually. Covering only two square miles, [Hunters Creek Village](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GO6yAQQNGvgY5oDBhMQfEad3ntlhZ4xjESiSMzG8d_v8r2W1_pSPfrOl1TqeVx-5_uFPm9bJMG3SswqusnTKWek5UYM2DoJMXOWw3GWRfkGg1oNyNiAFzykFKmkMPSezOjBT8MssQPBqbrO-i98RfQNMwuD4DG2ZCzsEBYeNsvvBLTO7WlntuL9su83WWNK_OzCfNP6FHokVdajk8RejwoVV4LNVa8HQ-VT_XdVOPEJPQo94jPo9RamvPCwu2eSv01-c_JV9Q_AQAA___NdlS_) contains 6.3 miles of hiking and biking paths and a bustling market for new-construction homes.

On this day in 1866, the state of Texas renounced its secession from the United States, officially rejoining the Union after the Civil War. () If you stayed up to watch the over Texas the night before last, maybe you slept in this morning. But, hey, it's Saturday, which is reason enough to sleep in. Western Texas saw the of wind, dust, and wildfire danger, with Lubbock reporting 80 mph winds early in the day and gusts a tractor trailer on I-40 near Amarillo. The gusts severely damaged vehicles on I-27 near Canyon, as you can . The National Weather Service announced fire threats ranging from critical to extreme in North Texas, marking the first time in 16 years the area has seen an . With warmer temperatures forecasted for the weekend, the front may have produced of freezing temperatures in the Panhandle, as well as hail and severe storms in North Texas. Plane Bound for DFW Catches Fire An engine on an American Airlines flight bound for Dallas-Fort Worth at Denver International Airport on Thursday evening, forcing an evacuation of the passengers and crew. 12 minor injuries were reported as a result of the blaze, which was quickly distinguished by emergency personnel after the plane landed in Denver and taxied safely to the gate. Passengers exited the aircraft via and deployed slides while flames and smoke billowed from the engine. After taking off from Colorado Springs, the plane was when pilots sensed high engine vibrations and told air traffic control they were cruising “slower than normal.” Houston-Area Town Named Wealthiest in State Hunters Creek Village is the wealthiest town in Texas, according to from Stacker, a digital content firm. Households in the pleasant Houston-area enclave average an annual median income above $250,000, with 75% of the 4,400 residents earning at least $200,000 a year and only 1.6% falling below the poverty line. The Stacker study considered communities with populations of at least 1,000 and ranked locations by median household income, with ties broken by the percentage of people earning more than $200,000 annually.
