| | **"****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that's also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency. "** **~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Elon Musk is right. It isn't rocket-science. It's basic math. It's also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris - in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch - one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029. While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to "surge to the border" for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, "free" health care, "free" cell phones, "free" housing, and "free" college...it doesn't matter. The result is the same. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College. And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._** **[If you agree then please sign your"BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING" Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we're seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e78a11fdb58846b88c2d9a393696c19b&_e=ZFX8j4fGDwYsHjrn9dc3fIiEXEvTm3K22UDugb1MvBAGenAKQdGAJsL4g068B2bxWrxzFyTIObU-VRwEGoEA6PyfI1brceyhXecrSBeL1c0GYRwShQiKL6KCjlTPLomgv6MipigehmukyDTJ5pUKe6qTqcgVfO7gzn9ZZfdKARWBz8ueIhIC2n9HRQ3DS9LTEnv2orj14TDJk8j9kiVtiXvbzYalgi4SazQ4wCtavq4WDlZIPVu5GL__vMWSf-gGzSgqWjrBS9ob4QiP8hGl8s3pNziJI8_Pwq6YuC4S-uhP9ve4dhF2nWMpi3ohsqyXIxSkAQybemjqtVufy8jMOldbjjZbeoAtcfjzy-SATXY%3D)** Because, here's the scary part: The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it's as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That's more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million). You get the picture. That's why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won't have a country. **[It's vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e78a11fdb58846b88c2d9a393696c19b&_e=ZFX8j4fGDwYsHjrn9dc3fIiEXEvTm3K22UDugb1MvBAGenAKQdGAJsL4g068B2bxWrxzFyTIObU-VRwEGoEA6PyfI1brceyhXecrSBeL1c0GYRwShQiKL6KCjlTPLomgv6MipigehmukyDTJ5pUKe6qTqcgVfO7gzn9ZZfdKARWBz8ueIhIC2n9HRQ3DS9LTEnv2orj14TDJk8j9kiVtifY6UJWoJXyuXD8QE5g-8btIRSJdDJJAv-z_UCtSkguuEFZKRSZzUjb1W4lUlIs87s88mmdu7sLQcjx_aIyWywYdHIgBlQ53Re9-yjUyvpL7aQtOXHZQyMHd_vOQgfFGfRc3pRggoImzmz-4WnWAn-c%3D)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes. No way. My name is Rebecca Weber. I'm the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.** **We 've got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the "feet on the street" advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.** **And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our "calls-to-action" and weigh in with members of the ** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. subject: Elon Musk’s Political Stunts are Crashing Tesla Stock
body:
And It's Not Just in the U.S.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wsepu-vn202p-kyd76rh7/)
---
# **Elon Musk’s Political Stunts are Crashing Tesla Stock**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wsepu-vn202q-kyd76rh8/)
---
| | | | Dear friend, Elon Musk's **political games** have finally caught up with him—and it’s not just his reputation that’s taking a hit. **Tesla’s bottom line** is crumbling as a result. A new **Morgan Stanley survey** revealed that an overwhelming **85%** of those polled believe Musk’s controversial political activities are **hurting Tesla’s business**. These are the very activities Musk has so desperately tied to his brand, from his **support of Donald Trump** to his chaotic moves in Washington with the **Department of Government Efficiency**. The result? **A 40% plunge** in Tesla’s stock price, and that's just the beginning. Nearly **60% of respondents** expect Tesla to **deliver fewer cars** in 2025, with some predicting a **decline of more than 10%**. If that isn’t a wake-up call, then the international backlash is: Tesla's reputation is being **smeared** in **Germany** —once a market of promise for Musk. Sales have dropped **76%** after Musk’s **far-right affiliations** and **disastrous social media stunts** sparked protests and even **vandalism** of Tesla vehicles. Musk's own comments have made it clear that he's struggling to manage his companies while doubling down on this reckless behavior. He admitted that running **Tesla** , **X** , and **SpaceX** is becoming more difficult, and it shows. Tesla's **core customers** are now facing backlash, with stories of **Tesla owners being harassed** on the streets of Europe, and **showrooms in the U.S.** being besieged by protesters. It’s clear that Musk is **alienating customers** , both **domestically and abroad** , and it’s only getting worse. His **radical politics** have crossed the line from business strategy to **self-destructive obsession**. clean_body: And It's Not Just in the U.S. | | | | | | Elon Musk’s Political Stunts are Crashing Tesla Stock | | | | | Dear friend, Elon Musk's political games have finally caught up with him—and it’s not just his reputation that’s taking a hit. Tesla’s bottom line is crumbling as a result. A new Morgan Stanley survey revealed that an overwhelming 85% of those polled believe Musk’s controversial political activities are hurting Tesla’s business. These are the very activities Musk has so desperately tied to his brand, from his support of Donald Trump to his chaotic moves in Washington with the Department of Government Efficiency. The result? A 40% plunge in Tesla’s stock price, and that's just the beginning. Nearly 60% of respondents expect Tesla to deliver fewer cars in 2025, with some predicting a decline of more than 10%. If that isn’t a wake-up call, then the international backlash is: Tesla's reputation is being smeared in Germany —once a market of promise for Musk. Sales have dropped 76% after Musk’s far-right affiliations and disastrous social media stunts sparked protests and even vandalism of Tesla vehicles. Musk's own comments have made it clear that he's struggling to manage his companies while doubling down on this reckless behavior. He admitted that running Tesla , X , and SpaceX is becoming more difficult, and it shows. Tesla's core customers are now facing backlash, with stories of Tesla owners being harassed on the streets of Europe, and showrooms in the U.S. being besieged by protesters. It’s clear that Musk is alienating customers , both domestically and abroad , and it’s only getting worse. His radical politics have crossed the line from business strategy to self-destructive obsession. body:
Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/Y476WymfIHP6ryUc8011y1KQDP1iCce2hE_BY4UifPjuEIsiK3h3_Al2y7hy_FHs2mTzp9kvFgd_BMgToeNaSHJptTKozpmygplJS01kJsb7D5goMZ_SalLNiHS8JHTTXUc8eFFKiE-vC0XJ16JuLd2yjGGU51h61jnStF8lhY_6DAhWNyjo_0uaDTXkwITmvxOsgDu_G2RaSE8gqD5fcSaEmpeleHVNcGNSS5jfpXZmbqs1157f2PJ2wPm64pNHN6e1wju8REFvQEHRSv4ZWzzsQMTnTSVo5KJbZADa0YLF4F2ZHUY7L9mlgycZfclCc_-58nO_AT8RVvkgVl0Ln5xOnF-8vv9xu0D8DppXHZWHjBwdZPFZSDbOEM-gIMqZj4VR4UZ4AsGdxK_WfIaXjAVIuGt2JsatF85EXRPu-wnSjnjffwIr1TNO17ynUj_fX2LDj9OCVp_mjd9ZQ0zPM2pzgAn0Nxqx/uFMJZfYblkt8VspgV7rlCdjjnMXM7rOF/7)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

Did you know that America's Founders rejected birthright citizenship--the idea that someone who is born within our country's borders is automatically a citizen?

This idea--which is a misunderstanding of the meaning of citizenship--is the subject of an ongoing national debate that will have long-lasting implications for our nation.

I'm writing today to offer you a FREE issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College's digest of liberty, that explains the facts about birthright citizenship.

**In this FREE issue, "Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny," you'll learn:**

* Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace
* How the 14th Amendment has been misinterpreted over the years
* What reforms are needed to restore the true meaning of citizenship

Since you're a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you'll find this issue interesting and informative. It will help equip you to engage in this critical debate.

And, if your friends and family have questions about this topic, you may want to share this _Imprimis_ issue with them.

You can receive your FREE copy of **" Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny"** at this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/birthright-citizenship-imprimis](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/eaMKBoPjFovm4XDk6dh2n33qgHZOltwInPKeH_Cs79yYu1vM5rAPW5M2LeWNPugBhFwIC8AVDG2APeCj4foKeMRMP0bb1qfwbDuOk_jY_k1c3tSuAPJy7R-wBzBcJzaRjXPGMHPt1EqyUJLssl-tHGTpEhr_m57bPcgvxtewvsZt8ZJcpXTKvTEdW9ZnnaCP6Aq0_oxaFL2t9QR5kiBeGQUsAU9NOAFjfh1Zaqjk11fft0B9EjMegUbfQ_DehVbbW9Xoeoy3m2iIBBW8lR6IZ0275XC9efF3n4DAwyyukRfnjlgcN3uvsIba71obOQ4QZGUOJNdZ783ZD_akCebQuqthU_bhZxDaQnrtE6p7eO4yYGBFlkhpJuvC0-nRv5kNCiG6tGPc7EO4QHZCeuxxvxUabk_-zuKAnDjjVA0WzsHWH2guUGPFjd7rghBMoJqaY1w6hS6NUGXB84IVcVZV8fFnidq7Jb5K/HujtOEEsaSHMa3jh4ZVsRnQsQeRjZ9Fj/7)

Please don't delay! Get your free copy right away.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

clean_body: Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend of Liberty, Did you know that America's Founders rejected birthright citizenship--the idea that someone who is born within our country's borders is automatically a citizen? This idea--which is a misunderstanding of the meaning of citizenship--is the subject of an ongoing national debate that will have long-lasting implications for our nation. I'm writing today to offer you a FREE issue of Imprimis , Hillsdale College's digest of liberty, that explains the facts about birthright citizenship. In this FREE issue, "Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny," you'll learn: Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace How the 14th Amendment has been misinterpreted over the years What reforms are needed to restore the true meaning of citizenship Since you're a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you'll find this issue interesting and informative. It will help equip you to engage in this critical debate. And, if your friends and family have questions about this topic, you may want to share this Imprimis issue with them. You can receive your FREE copy of " Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny"** at this secure link: Please don't delay! Get your free copy right away. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk

| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/P3jdJwd_Goy-i7nBWTzejuChAzkAMQiQQ6Ohcw1zIF_WofpqnvSw8o9GKE71xUIA3TzTWnkaSOX35OEOt62_yoBEFBMQYFpV1Rp8YSEEpIGpC9bg0J0WcdO-JU0Thr-z3GpGzU6H_QHvyHNKQNtmEbLibwtOYWtsue59PKYMQuvgMAjb3gmGqkf98G4CkfVvBgLNREyvAsKFxSNeQB6K9qmDgdK12oCPJSI_Jkq0mDHIKUexQ2ItQkHUhT9L_mbnmgOhZoyfXkUh-ER5PfQPYluhbrwsCPpejdeiiYX1eKZHVsGlKp43cFpM-HHhO8AFOjzr8BnPZfzOCbcK72LiNjnD2NsEGyy6IL4E-1whWKcsJoAEVadRxJ3A_qURlqCV_QnDnwY_AHVFQgjCVTHYmzx-HCn579DGoX1K6Po/BQJKVFsYSzvZDjlnSrf0SvjYVtdGEdAu/7)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/3lzSoNF6OmxlbVuNXHUcKE4eayjOSv16y_TPGs4NF9dEtxZ9Z3TqXCd4wK2FEWebm5BFLUCSs8djpgVE3xIVORA_mh_xEvI3MZzJwa-g8NFRTxtHi2eSqIEy7uO2gLS2UzZNNDW_7yNeCG3X7DPQq4OM6w4Yzr99d6XcVCOzbgVnHqzb3sNA8fDjwUETvFNdYA5djrivPwxHIQv7XAiLWb8OzUyd8o0i7JCIcrDhDeOg7Fad8rQ_bFW3kT2VaCiBxE-nyH37JTk6R43raWb-MzDXTJrmYVZ0PLh2Ja-0FKT5T1v_8sBYznh82yNqKbAOjG52cE30T_knDZygBQAuNu14_X2mHkYu_3W02Dcrs6pFIJpi-qiN_dFQcFRRVycc9UkSoiUGoG7knkJWxw6n1SKXM5cNTNDlcqzx9uo/F7xh9gLhdVoONQ2v1P-vx8dxT2XdDkmj/7)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/8g1mpFno30zKnRCjU_AtW0qhy1Okyhh4s8faVx4TPO97c4_BHdJABEK3S19kIPYCiOGYcn9A19GZa8FnkAn4KuoNEMW__Ak3exlgf9xJaxbTBTqFpkHtMXPAQLiwoNTYkc5-qK-rG13JrErnS5qWaZHoMDJqtxp0G7aoUuZ8CyBcVPvFjtg8kU_POmEXpaW4x8l-1OLE3zDAxiRPcuYVF4kq8qD2V6gLwSSaG64nH7iNNkciLhmbpZj5W_wYb9mLiqcXGbQV3Co1rU5ROix836G2kMPEgA/BwP4Q-hJcZo9nHqtoMJItNQc8eXkt7DP/7)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/CouNu6OIG_Y1xRgCR0HM85OxCnLNW63FHqmihD-pxVss04sCO5Fl9xz6w10eXcY5bx5c8Jy3wxZYDzYdFhZPdqoYVJ8nHvtU-HHftxIEBMTFmQMhsdq364QEg_qlBRTT1dhKWdiwXKIDaktBiS1Brgrg2xIgzRbzAYTK4lz0kTxLRLb9iW3ws297reZAMnn0E9cuYD6isPihv1Krkmxk5eSHrJVCYgjZGt8vEVamIzcVdbDNxoujHJmhou0nn--UUwufvEvXsqiUX9HDGd84pZp6ilBvrPL4n9pvFhNivoRSRZNKYbq7J6X_Oc9obgSz4WSD_cznJHabmBG2vwzie6izED0W7-LwgEEZbxy6tOM7KVCtaLWeDsQRm22aBLcnJstNtAYB3pe3z9Yu0H_t3_KU8w_lRhqGUQUF7js/BvcV_TrRhbwmKQweHRkN68fPER9e9o3y/7)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/IucbNiM0k49HAsJwIFeAHTpNs_0VOqfZ6wRsj8shgczLrs0FhVoR7t0gDAK5FI2NN_OZwlQr7mAycyqBkLj43m2x52OvfYL_KZZjzZlcorW7hOnpQ0LgXjTYWndTCGVBKMez0zAk6IRmjvVQCmwtHWFD-MAqL3yxj9UB0dypdcgKifyQGhQ2puWILLivE1lxXmBJ1-Tptd0u4QXsoeB1B0Bp331X4e7tnkkOBnGqjgOPS8SxTnn8WZYUJV70Jg09bP_5N1YkI5wWEHAPdUU62OUc4XE03NAecqAXkpHJAr4ywPNqpDy30-WjkAfLiozIcWP9sABQpQEiYEu02XixqPsbI7DF7Mwtxr0AMr-9o4SVYTVXQ5pzVErMzBEYjyrzC_sSPHXYOmcyzfoYB2dEErp6EMWAoN2q2PsR5eQ/qX5MsPmXLqZ4eOErKSQyLtcnc4Qy5nSo/7)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/4k_U3BATvV2wGswE_NSSJa9z3h5CHDCr7K8CbT1c8oyMW9UxIDBKf5WhlnWoKZu7kyJ6WSuZDa3mkh_6gSQq-9BAqfgbKSIzl4Qzc-NG_HNybvoTv15LUvqN7wGNUpYJORa1JPEloKinyW98OFWUiqj5COEoPcixqpc7a4HgbGWCqkAoWyNMsSkG1Tjj3kZHdkvu0Vi38OMnk7YHe1xeAHSOvp0nluLz97i6jwFID5wJCKMnsPjTlgrKKStkRh2AwYbsSjDpOWJkYMYaCLLGSto-p1FuhnH--y9DZMURK7uFYH3mXuO5OjlwQzcU3bxr-gr4GoVkklF-cSDcyJwU4OmN9ulhmIREgDnkJWlmIbskQ-ksVaWf632EwcEQu9H49tE5C_aqzCiqsGYwBGr0DfLsk6CqFEQE_Un2-s4/Rhdf4iz4JrxgyhctZ3i2Y7eijCV7jx4G/7), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/7Rqsd1uuWJlvRQMCoArJQ0EnbZR0-RfnbKqttEojYtZE9djC2vyw_Ykryf08ZEK_Z20SLApL31WPBHzNvABr7esS8azrM_k0YG2ubEamD--FBxcFasdVkliuWYg5htzE3DlliH_9ACu-zF5STUMOteuOTAVsHWRkQnktYMcRzp7FJ084NpsxJNMxQo0NffHOOeJr73IjLwzbUONm77odTs1jhgyczGmTaFdhktMEEAb0Gp8JimH9iP2jrfG51ECQ7s9qYl92M8HplWPNp3bpBVOyPGZBN92IbeqLnse5alPBnjzIDD0PlIsX7W5FtQzHN7PQx7TQXOaZpMsENqXpYdwA-ZgcTGCHmA7GL53KyCdaobfhzlNg9vFmZJZM8Uyur8zneRQ-YVVj_qLgCLIbFYBM8ExH532aHksYdR8/CnjvAKvpCjb6qwtYJskD2wEe0EG6aAMo/7)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote

clean_body: It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. | | | | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. | | | | “A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president. So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”~ Elon Musk | | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives and the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. Your vote is already being watered down in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully canceled out in future elections. American elections should be decided by American citizens., here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was before the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. But I can’t do it without you. No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,honest elections... none of it matters.Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. , I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions. The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. It means we can’t be bought. On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling billions to dark money “non-profit” groups to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting and banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
President Trump just made a huge announcement. Will you at least take just 2 seconds to read it?

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aaJM/?__vbtrk=MjgwMjcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMjcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
|
---
President Trump just sat down with Maria Bartiromo, and what he said exposed the Dishonest Democrats for the liars that they are.
__Here’s the full quote if you missed it:__

|
---
|
## _**"I'm not going to touch Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid. Now, we’re going to get fraud out of there... and everybody wants us to get the fraud out.”**_

_\- President Trump 3/9/2025_
---

|
---
President Trump is PROTECTING AND DEFENDING Social Security, and under his leadership, the House just passed a budget resolution that will END all taxes on Social Security.
**_Promises made, PROMISES KEPT!_**
But the sad fact is, despite protecting America’s seniors more than any President in history, Democrats are still pulling out all the stops to torpedo his agenda.
Democrats are enraged that President Trump is ending fraud in Social Security - fraud that steals money from taxpayers like YOU!
**_Because to corrupt Democrats, the only thing worth protecting in Social Security is the fraud they use to line the pockets of their crooked cronies._**
_So that’s why we’re asking for your help._
President Trump and Republicans are doing everything they can, but their fight goes only as far as patriots like YOU are willing to take it.
**_The real power lies with grassroots Patriots like you._**
Your response - **_right here, right now_** \- will send a message loud & clear that Americans like YOU proudly stand with President Trump in his fight to defend Social Security.
But it has to be immediate, and it has to be massive.
Because at this critical moment, Democrats are doing everything they can to claim that supporters like YOU have abandoned President Trump.
President Trump knows you will never give up on him. He knows you will NEVER leave his side. He knows he is back in the White House because of YOU.
**ON BEHALF OF PRESIDENT TRUMP, THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT! **
**_[So as Democrats try to stop President Trump’s plan to protect Social Security, can we count on you to go on the record and proudly proclaim, "I STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP!">](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aaJM/?__vbtrk=MjgwMjcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMjcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**

[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aaJM/?__vbtrk=MjgwMjcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMjcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Thank you again for your continued support of President Trump.
He’s always known he could count on you in the most critical of moments.
Thank you,
Team Trump

[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aaJM/?__vbtrk=MjgwMjcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMjcxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
P.S. Please don’t feel pressured to donate. President Trump knows you’re a top supporter, and he will NEVER question your support if you choose not to donate at this time. Our only ask is that you continue to keep our great nation in your prayers.

name: History Facts
subject: Who were the Navajo code talkers of WWII?
body:
Diné bizaad is an Indigenous language primarily used by the Navajo, or Diné, people of the American Southwest.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68dh8kduy2v632syfs2mskscudw865nf4sfl71yg7x56csvjybwr2go1vndef1f1zdcavdowacph6rb0n314m13367tk27nodgz9uu3qx7cobn7h9yfm9iq37tgla205sf75wdjlqb2nuu5bg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st5w83&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [During WWII, the U.S. coded messages in the Navajo language.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st5w83&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st5w83&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st5w83&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| D iné bizaad is an Indigenous language primarily used by the Navajo, or _Diné_ , people of the American Southwest. Not only is the language complex, but it’s traditionally passed down orally. During World War II, the United States military used this to its advantage by recruiting Navajo people fluent in both English and Diné bizaad, dubbed “code talkers,” to transmit secret messages among Allied forces.
---
The U.S. military wasn’t the first to use the tactic — members of Cherokee, Lakota, and other nations used their native tongues to evade German detection in World War I. The Marines, however, established the first formal training program for code talkers, and 29 Navajo completed the training in 1942. Recruits developed and memorized a two-part [secret code inside a guarded room](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st5w83&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). The first part used 26 Diné bizaad words to stand in for letters of the English alphabet. The next part was more complex, and required making up hundreds of terms for English words that didn’t have a direct translation — for example, “iron fish” for “submarine,” and “humming bird” for “fighter plane.”
Even after recruiting more trainees into the program, the Marines struggled to find enough soldiers fluent in both languages to scale the program. But where code talkers were deployed, they passed along information with [incredible security and accuracy](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st5w83&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). The Navajo Marines provided a valuable and often dangerous service to the U.S. military and its allies, but ironically, many had attended government or church-run boarding schools where they were punished for speaking languages other than English. After the war, the code talkers and their service went completely unacknowledged for decades. Their mission stayed classified until 1968, in case the military wanted to use the code again. In 2001, the original 29 code talkers were finally awarded the Congressional Gold Medal, and the rest were awarded the Congressional Silver Medal.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st5w83&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st5w83&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our [Terms of Use](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=2kh5r9m0gvwo5ceynjyhu2zioays6v7fik1hqyud56nh6lbtc3fm1u6t3i3e4z70fx696bygc22r3sc87nvisbkzqqil2hepvkejv7a5qrsfag0tzr36gv0z8llcc4xs3j7e6gr5b7q3bme1jf9a534dsohxmqpet0j0syievxsfk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st5w83&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) and [Privacy Policy](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=463ko1dghouahdf6fb9dqdcbq7yti1usustxcfxvmi2d5xioj3zxuk7nzcqdikt34tctd03qhxfo03nfhnnuut7vktbvscier8iaerjiby2nuwfwrm1jmb19n9qw8kmjuseqneordqjidnux4bv940im3zqkevo7bu3p66gkxqcuaapw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st5w83&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

## Indigenous people had high enlistment rates during WWII.
In 1941, the year Pearl Harbor was bombed, the estimated Indigenous population of the United States was below 400,000, [around 45,000 of whom saw active duty in](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st5w83&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) World War II. Among them was Corporal Ira Hayes, a Pima Indian and one of the soldiers pictured in the famous flag-raising photo at Iwo Jima. While many Indigenous peoples were motivated to protect their ancestral lands, enlistment rates varied among different tribes. For instance, Hopi principles prohibit bearing arms, and Thomas Banyacya, a leader in the Hopi tribe, spent seven years in jail for refusing the draft. In 1953, he secured conscientious objector status for any Hopi who requested it.

The Marines, however, established the first formal training program for code talkers, and 29 Navajo completed the training in 1942. Recruits developed and memorized a two-part . The first part used 26 Diné bizaad words to stand in for letters of the English alphabet. The next part was more complex, and required making up hundreds of terms for English words that didn’t have a direct translation — for example, “iron fish” for “submarine,” and “humming bird” for “fighter plane.” Even after recruiting more trainees into the program, the Marines struggled to find enough soldiers fluent in both languages to scale the program. But where code talkers were deployed, they passed along information with . The Navajo Marines provided a valuable and often dangerous service to the U.S. military and its allies, but ironically, many had attended government or church-run boarding schools where they were punished for speaking languages other than English. After the war, the code talkers and their service went completely unacknowledged for decades. Their mission stayed classified until 1968, in case the military wanted to use the code again. In 2001, the original 29 code talkers were finally awarded the Congressional Gold Medal, and the rest were awarded the Congressional Silver Medal. | By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our and . By the Numbers | | Original Navajo code talkers alive in 2001 to receive the Congressional Award 5 | | Total Navajo soldiers who served as code talkers 375-420 | Total Navajo soldiers who served as code talkers 375-420 | | Military terms the Navajo developed code words for 411 | | Approximate Indigenous languages still spoken in the U.S. 175 | Approximate Indigenous languages still spoken in the U.S. 175 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Indigenous people had high enlistment rates during WWII. In 1941, the year Pearl Harbor was bombed, the estimated Indigenous population of the United States was below 400,000, World War II. Among them was Corporal Ira Hayes, a Pima Indian and one of the soldiers pictured in the famous flag-raising photo at Iwo Jima. While many Indigenous peoples were motivated to protect their ancestral lands, enlistment rates varied among different tribes. For instance, Hopi principles prohibit bearing arms, and Thomas Banyacya, a leader in the Hopi tribe, spent seven years in jail for refusing the draft. In 1953, he secured conscientious objector status for any Hopi who requested it. Running for Congress was never part of my plan--but every day, MAGA puts our children's health and wellbeing at risk, enriches billionaires at the expense of regular Americans, and strips away opportunity for future generations.
Enough is enough.
You don't have to be a math teacher to know that the numbers aren't adding up for working families. And it's going to take all of us to stand up to the MAGA bullies terrorizing our country.

Right now this is the "go-to" whistle for **cops, security guards, coaches, lifeguards, survivalists, and search-and-rescue teams** \-- just to name a few. **Best Part:** Right here, right now, by special invitation only, (you had to receive an email from me), I will rush you one of these TRS Sonic Whistles... **For FREE!** [**> > Claim Yours HERE! <<**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/20663/6374453/683b2b0e9277c343ec1a15a700ab1c4e1f11312d/bfb474bd7d981708ebaece52e7325c32e1216e3e) **No strings attached.** But there are **just 200 free samples** to go around. name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: America’s Founders rejected this idea
body:
Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/zIcxMP56CukdHi1h-EKcwyHihFmZOv1LBpzwrkscMTzj-R8HlMnfQEgxqjsJJWjcV-fNgXCXTy1MiY6ecRUwfYV1U3dvxmIxKMw-60NUgRnob9ecrI-CxfKso3NpiRMfi4tufLN_Z19jofNLgm2bQcU0UJtsEWMd6nJr8GIFD7rrMIAg4yHxW2MvO0uIitNIciHB6n20sDNDbIoPXq0o0guBCmj1qTpoe4eUAYt_ZE6hlkuIcMinzq2jirGgR7wZKq-APdwfMqld-4_8Q5qQxM7IQ_BcdTnjn-Bzo_gNGor29szj9YXWNqIpsqnusnP5MC1kQyXiD2yuK1Y0fWxOXJUkHIuBRopNXRDdlNCZ_CqZ74Ub-6aHftV6FNqswKkQN6C_Fj2q_AjTZsQTjXymgaKmt0_WL3zYXX_sKwWPVU2RQK04VmCPMO_c97Oj6XA22unQd-5DE8ebeFKDkotcE4xASF8rPH0L/SGqAATIEDE22i7Vrwb75Frg0TL-_yZyv/7)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

Did you know that America's Founders rejected birthright citizenship--the idea that someone who is born within our country's borders is automatically a citizen?

This idea--which is a misunderstanding of the meaning of citizenship--is the subject of an ongoing national debate that will have long-lasting implications for our nation.

I'm writing today to offer you a FREE issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College's digest of liberty, that explains the facts about birthright citizenship.

**In this FREE issue, "Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny," you'll learn:**

* Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace
* How the 14th Amendment has been misinterpreted over the years
* What reforms are needed to restore the true meaning of citizenship

Since you're a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you'll find this issue interesting and informative. It will help equip you to engage in this critical debate.

And, if your friends and family have questions about this topic, you may want to share this _Imprimis_ issue with them.

You can receive your FREE copy of **" Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny"** at this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/birthright-citizenship-imprimis](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/Fh3X0yNWkbfWOXRRsbSsDsrPU9B6gOfwfhxhJrjHRwmi-MyU3dgfLEnUHjzpaXM9S3Be5li0QW6C-f5ZrvUvIYOF-fT1LfdLf7joZDFnhIgN5tgv2gIXrd6v02oye_k4h1hcYdX4esKiZ_8SYYArNmI19wHLH3o0vmxmJRy1koql9wtazrYoMgOYePESRQArr63vh8B_qMhNXDQOvxw7iz7kdBknZ7elsy2danyzHp2by0vs-TBWv6VdZc6Y4dqGRGJV6c7unjPE6KlBUHjWhuhKcLbA-gCqN1mTxdypNftr-8-rnZh6jzUZsq66BhB7aMc2cBYabh7Q6Dpdk5TpYrny1-d2J6xhTLrjl2lnIpt3BWp-aU8kZV9eE0SVGPYlzp1GPLRR5g5aFVWF5R5S5WKNH54NHJ8rvb0Hy8h1_lJMSQFJzP6IhBistm8uA1kmcDM7u8kmttcxUjRwUhGMJY3Xr4gcWWDy/3jhnAcEpbWsRbY04P4D-F4nAOs6jyHBt/7)

Please don't delay! Get your free copy right away.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

You can receive your FREE copy of " Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny"** at this secure link: Please don't delay! Get your free copy right away. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Conservative Principles, Not Platitudes, are Driving Change
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/visionaryvsvoid-11574027?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, **In politics, nothing moves unless it’s pushed.** Change doesn’t happen because of empty platitudes—it happens because principled conservatives like you step up to demand principled policies.

**At the Mississippi Center for Public Policy (MCPP), we’ve been pushing hard this legislative session for four flagship conservative priorities.** With just three weeks left, here’s where we stand—and how your support is making a difference.

**1\. School Choice**

For years, no bill allowing even basic public-to-public school choice had been granted a floor vote. **This session, we saw progress: a bill passed the House with a strong majority, only to be stalled in the Senate Education Committee under Chairman Dennis DeBar.**
---
|
---
_Speaker Jason White calls out Delbert Hosemann in his recent Facebook post_
| Sadly, this proposal appears dead for now—a frustrating outcome when every neighboring state offers universal school choice, and President Trump himself champions this policy.

**But the opposition’s grip may be weakening.** Killing bills in committee no longer comes cost free for left leaning Senators, as it did for years. If principled conservatives keep shining a light on who’s blocking progress, we will win this fight.
---
|
---
_Disappointment with Delbert: Rep Jansen Owen says what many conservatives are thinking_
| **2\. Income Tax Elimination**

**Governor Tate Reeves has made income tax elimination a priority, and the House agreed, passing Speaker Jason White and Rep. Trey Lamar’s HB1 bill early in the session.**

Now, the Senate’s liberal leadership is stalling, with a critical deadline looming this Tuesday. If HB1 fails, it will be a deliberate choice by Lt. Governor Delbert Hosemann, whose stance aligns more with liberals than with conservative taxpayers.

We can’t waver. We must rally behind leaders like the Governor and Speaker who take bold conservative stands—and call out those who don’t. **To achieve change, conservative organizations must not equivocate. **

**3\. Outlawing DEI**

When State Auditor Shad White exposed how Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) programs in higher education were costing taxpayers millions, some at the Capitol scoffed. For years, they buried anti-DEI bills.

**But the truth is out: DEI has been rampant, and Shad White was right.** Now, an anti-DEI bill banning these wasteful, divisive practices is finally nearing the Governor’s desk.

This is what happens when principled conservatives push forward. You’ve helped make this possible—thank you.

**4\. Removing Red Tape**

In healthcare, excessive regulations stifle progress and hurt our economy. **Two steadfast conservatives, Rep. Zuber and Rep. Creekmore, have worked tirelessly to cut this red tape.** Their bill is on the cusp of becoming law—a testament to what principled leadership can achieve.
---
|
---
_Delbert Hosemann’s opposition to conservative policy is getting noticed in Washington, with articles about it appearing_
| **What’s Next?**

The final weeks of the session could bring surprises. The Senate might dig in, forcing a special session, or conservative Senators could step up, demanding action on income tax elimination, anti-DEI measures, and red tape reduction—policies voters like you support.

**Whatever happens, I’ll keep you and the 80,000+ recipients of this weekly email informed.**

As Barry Goldwater famously said, “Extremism in defense of liberty is no vice. Moderation in pursuit of justice is no virtue.” Your commitment to these principles is driving change in Mississippi.

Have an awesome weekend, and thank you for standing with us!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f3dc9eea89&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=42566c9d7d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=42566c9d7d).

_Copyright © 2025 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._

**First,** Donald Trump declared his plan to privatize the Postal Service!

**Next,** he proposed moving the USPS under the control of the Commerce Department!

**Privatizing the USPS would drastically limit access to vital services,** particularly for those in rural areas. _This could mean that Americans lose access to essential deliveries like medications or Social Security checks!_

As Trump prioritizes corporate interests over everyday Americans, it’s critical that we send a clear message to the Trump administration that Americans reject the privatization of the USPS! **[Can you add your name now? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103892798/533607858/1878703426?refcode=NDCAF_20250315_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmZlNzc2Ny05ZDAxLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RGCKszSspFw2wfkEwdk5TK5uR3R3NaD5yb31Mf4POCo=&emci=4744d907-fe00-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=4bfe7767-9d01-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=48524772)**

clean_body: If we lose, the GOP will take full control of the legislature, blocking Democratic Gov. Shapiro’s agenda and paving the way for far-right attacks on voting, abortion access, and workers’ rights. | | | | | ---|--- Democrats are facing a must-win special election in Pennsylvania this month. If we win, we’ll defend our hard-won majority in the PA House and fend off a right-wing takeover of the chamber. If we lose, the GOP will take full control of the legislature, blocking Democratic Gov. Shapiro’s agenda and paving the way for far-right attacks on voting, abortion access, and workers’ rights.With a Republican trifecta in D.C., we cannot risk losing ground in the states. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Our majority is on the line. # FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Reader,**It wasn 't long ago that The New York Sun, one of my favorite papers, became the exclusive publisher of my columns. ****In the short time that 's passed, the Sun's mission has become more urgent than ever.****
**
---
[**Join the Sun for 1 ¢ ->**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=bef784b8425946bca243e0c63143363d&_e=U3h_vBAAt3knMUDNmrWw6O8JuCjDer6zEFs1cVKTWLeBkz9GG1ZCo_xnbI3Zj3dOJX3xpdtrepZnIv8RC0GW7fksDEDMYoo99oQHPoX0JPFXWgH6xFhZcP-OW6pWlG2rMz_kqeUOjraGLRJyPAlwuvNSqa1oE6OF8HOgBYMz7eBu6c4xiPN0Sr64CSZFSYrgQDZppTgMQ0N-WHuYvdR4ECWFoeFRDhY_vMbwsC5gzG1P8V26zI_DFIEBYDVeFoRiHlJUcg_5hMC_d3bpkpXa3K41oddWCcJdR_200ubtEnpYP531ebM-tyBkJWS0quJGKAuyCF95lxYR5e81_fe7U8BM4sPwy2bIFBGuz4Oaa8zkjmGohJVxK7PB9xfJsdcagqJ9grQECaOZMy-ZEr1h2dM31QI7IODuE9EIGsIqmOY%3D)
---
It's been obvious to many of us for some time that journalism in our country has become corrupted.

More dangerous than the ideological implication is the fact that we're left with precious few to hold our country's most powerful institutions to account. Our justice system, law enforcement, universities, major corporations and government agencies have become politicized beyond recognition and act with impunity.

The Sun is brave and relentless.Every day it tackles head-on the most important issues facing our country. It truly holds the powerful to account.

It acts as a true newspaper should, in the service of traditional American values and the American people.

The Sun has a long history leading the charge. Its commitment to the finest journalistic standards goes all the way back to its founding in 1833.

The Sun is now growing at a rapid pace, but we're up against some of the world's largest media conglomerates. To win, we need you to join us. Every single person counts.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: First to Fight
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
In Iraq, we’d use special knocks to identify friend from foe when we were surrounded by insurgents. The comfort was knowing your friends were with you, that you had each other’s back.
#

Peter - Ruben. Personal note from me today.
Look, Trump and Elon have us on the backfoot. They’ve got the momentum. We’ve taken a lot of hits, a lot of people are hurting, and there’s a lot at risk right now.
I know the stakes. I know what’s expected of me.
Marines have an old motto: _“First to Fight.”_ In Iraq, we’d use special knocks to identify friend from foe when we were surrounded by insurgents. The comfort was knowing your friends were with you, that you had each other’s back.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar25.cQPUMp&refcode=em250315-1-f&t=1&akid=3763%2E734936%2EfJHVYj)
**In Iraq, I had my Marines. In the Senate, you’ve got me. I’ll fight on my own if I have to, but I’m not going to back down when Trump and Elon are trying to tear the country apart.**
As I do what I can to fight back, it’d mean a lot to have your support.
[**If you can afford it — and I mean that — a donation of any amount would go a long way. I’m putting together a lot of events in Arizona to make sure people know what Trump and Elon are doing, and anything you can chip in helps. Can I count on you?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar25.cQPUMp&refcode=em250315-1-f&t=2&akid=3763%2E734936%2EfJHVYj)

name: Chris Phillips, GIFFORDS VP of Development
subject: Friend, please join Us on 3/19 for GIFFORDS SF Event feat Gabby Giffords, Sen. Mark Kelly, Sen. Chris Murphy, Cong. Lateefah Simone and others!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Dear friend,
This year we will be hosting our **GIFFORDS Celebration of Courage on March 19th** at a critical moment for the movement to keep our kids and communities safe. We are excited to be joined by **Senator Chris Murphy, Senator Mark Kelly, Congresswoman Lateefa Simon,** local elected leaders and hundreds of supporters for this very important event.
We hope you will join us as we discuss how GIFFORDS and GIFFORDS Law Center will work every day to protect the progress made and outline how we can continue to achieve progress despite the threats the gun violence prevention movement faces under the new Trump administration.
The event includes a reception that begins at 6 pm. The program will begin at 7 pm and is currently slated to end by 8:15 pm. Complimentary parking will be provided on site in the adjacent garage.
[**No contribution is required to attend. You can make a contribution to support our work or learn more about the event by going to our event site here.**](https://giffords.org/2025-annual-celebration//?source=em250315-1-&refcode2=10128.3935704._P-RV3)
Please let me know if you have any questions.
We hope you will join us as we gather to fight for a safer country without gun violence.
Thanks,
Chris Phillips
GIFFORDS VP of Development
**[RSVP here](https://go.giffords.org/go/60461?t=1&akid=10128%2E3935704%2E_P-RV3)**
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/60461?t=2&akid=10128%2E3935704%2E_P-RV3)
**Our progress has been a team effort. Thank you to everyone who continues to stand with Gabby and our movement.**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=10128%2E3935704%2E_P-RV3) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: Dear friend, This year we will be hosting our GIFFORDS Celebration of Courage on March 19th at a critical moment for the movement to keep our kids and communities safe. We are excited to be joined by Senator Chris Murphy, Senator Mark Kelly, Congresswoman Lateefa Simon, local elected leaders and hundreds of supporters for this very important event. We hope you will join us as we discuss how GIFFORDS and GIFFORDS Law Center will work every day to protect the progress made and outline how we can continue to achieve progress despite the threats the gun violence prevention movement faces under the new Trump administration. The event includes a reception that begins at 6 pm. The program will begin at 7 pm and is currently slated to end by 8:15 pm. Complimentary parking will be provided on site in the adjacent garage. Please let me know if you have any questions. We hope you will join us as we gather to fight for a safer country without gun violence. Thanks, Chris Phillips GIFFORDS VP of Development Our progress has been a team effort. Thank you to everyone who continues to stand with Gabby and our movement. Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: Listening
body:
---
It’s no secret that this is a critical moment for our Party, Derek. **We need to show Americans that Democrats are on their side.** And that starts with listening. That’s why over the last two weeks, we’ve embarked on a feedback campaign where we’re asking you for your thoughts on the future of the Democratic Party. You’ve heard from multiple members of our team already, and our campaign is coming to an end soon, which is why I’m reaching out to you today for one last time before my team and I start reviewing responses. I’m personally asking for your input. We’ve already heard from over 25K supporters, and we hope you’ll join them. [By completing our feedback survey,](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/share-your-feedback-2025/?refcode=em_20250315_2967_fr&akid=2967%2E22930333%2EFWYGqu) you'll directly influence how we address the issues that matter most to working families and communities nationwide. With the stakes this high, it couldn’t be more important that we hear from as many Democrats as possible. This is your chance to shape the future of our Party, and it starts with one simple action. [Complete our survey today to make your voice heard. Rest assured our team — myself included — will be reading the responses we receive here, and we will use the information we gather to make an informed decision about the DNC’s next steps.](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/share-your-feedback-2025/?refcode=em_20250315_2967_fr&akid=2967%2E22930333%2EFWYGqu) The strength of our movement has always been rooted in collective action. I am grateful for your commitment to this Party, and I look forward to forging our path forward together with your invaluable insight. Thank you for your dedication and support. More from us very soon. Ken Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee | [](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/share-your-feedback-2025/?amount=3&refcode=em_20250315_2967_fr&akid=2967%2E22930333%2EFWYGqu)
---

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._
clean_body: It’s no secret that this is a critical moment for our Party, Derek. We need to show Americans that Democrats are on their side. And that starts with listening. That’s why over the last two weeks, we’ve embarked on a feedback campaign where we’re asking you for your thoughts on the future of the Democratic Party. You’ve heard from multiple members of our team already, and our campaign is coming to an end soon, which is why I’m reaching out to you today for one last time before my team and I start reviewing responses. I’m personally asking for your input. We’ve already heard from over 25K supporters, and we hope you’ll join them. you'll directly influence how we address the issues that matter most to working families and communities nationwide. With the stakes this high, it couldn’t be more important that we hear from as many Democrats as possible. This is your chance to shape the future of our Party, and it starts with one simple action. The strength of our movement has always been rooted in collective action. I am grateful for your commitment to this Party, and I look forward to forging our path forward together with your invaluable insight. Thank you for your dedication and support. More from us very soon. Ken Ken Martin Chair Democratic National Committee | If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Susanna Gibson
subject: [Read] My nightmare became an international story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
...But I sincerely hope every woman candidate will take advantage of what HBM can offer. | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103901962/533635656/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250315nightmare_N_SG_90DO_13_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZmYWJiNWM5LWE1MDEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OJg2ie8notYAp3Ynhb-nExlMujziJqqtXXjQK1xJ_N4=)
---
Hi Peter,

If we haven’t met, my name is Susanna Gibson. I am one of the countless women in America lucky enough to have crossed paths with Her Bold Move. But I want to make sure you know my story...

Her Bold Move first endorsed me while I was running for a State Delegate seat in Virginia. Polls showed I was on track to win in my Republican-leaning district, and I had earned support from every major institutional endorsement organization... until my campaign was derailed by a uniquely sexist and horrifying attack.

[**Her Bold Move is a deeply needed organization for women across our country. Before I explain, will you join me in uplifting this extraordinary organization by pitching in $20.25 or more today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103901968/533635662/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250315nightmare_N_SG_90DO_13_NG_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZmYWJiNWM5LWE1MDEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OJg2ie8notYAp3Ynhb-nExlMujziJqqtXXjQK1xJ_N4=)

Here is what happened:

In the final weeks of my run for office, I found out I had been the target of nonconsensual pornography, nonconsensual distribution of intimate images, and severe image-based sexual abuse both online and in person.

In fact, the Republican Party of Virginia – yes, the _official state Republican party_ – sent out _explicit photos_ of me to thousands of homes in my district. My neighbors’ homes.

**Here is a look at what I went through in the wake of these attacks:**

❌ I received hundreds of phone calls and social media messages that included threats of rape and death.
❌ My children had to have security stay with them at school for weeks.
❌ I was forced to leave my job as a nurse practitioner.
❌ My nightmare became gossip fodder for national and international publications.
❌ I had to leave the state to escape reporters and threatening strangers showing up at my house.
❌ I was unable to meet with voters for three weeks during the height of election season.

[**Male candidates do not experience this type of sexual harassment or abuse when they run for office. But here’s the thing: we need women to run for office now more than ever before. Stories like mine are the reason many women don’t. Women candidates need more support. Help me make sure they get it by donating to Her Bold Move today. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103901974/533635668/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250315nightmare_N_SG_90DO_13_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZmYWJiNWM5LWE1MDEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OJg2ie8notYAp3Ynhb-nExlMujziJqqtXXjQK1xJ_N4=)

Her Bold Move is an amazing resource. They understood that their role in my campaign had become more important than ever – that I was the victim of a sexist attack reserved for women candidates. They renewed their support for me and encouraged other endorsers to follow their lead, they checked in on me constantly, and they helped me fundraise when institutions were actually pulling funding from my campaign. At one of the loneliest times of my life, the HBM team made me feel less alone. I hope every woman candidate will take advantage of what HBM can offer.

**Despite everything I outlined above – I was only 715 votes shy of winning that seat in the Virginia House of Delegates. It’s frustrating to imagine how the outcome might have been different if more orgs had followed Her Bold Move’s lead. We could have avoided electing one more anti-choice legislator in my state – a state with razor-thin margins for Democrats.**

Running for office as a woman can be dangerous and scary. The political landscape is a safer and more supportive place for women with Her Bold Move at the forefront.

[**I am so grateful for the work that Her Bold Move is doing to defend and empower women like me – and I want to make sure they can continue to do so as more women run for office and desperately need HBM’s critical resources. Join me in supporting this important organization by pitching in $20.25 or more today!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250315nightmare_N_SG_90DO_13_NG_N_L3&amount=20.25) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103901979/533635674/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250315nightmare_N_SG_90DO_13_NG_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZmYWJiNWM5LWE1MDEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OJg2ie8notYAp3Ynhb-nExlMujziJqqtXXjQK1xJ_N4=)

subject: They’re gutting the VA—Our Heroes Deserve Better
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Friend, This campaign comes to an end in 17 days and without your help we risk falling short.
I come from a veteran family. I know the sacrifices our service members make, and I know the promises our country makes in return. That’s why I am furious that Donald Trump’s administration is slashing 80,000 jobs from the Department of Veterans Affairs, gutting the care that so many of our heroes rely on.
This isn’t about efficiency—it’s about neglect. It’s about turning our backs on those who served, just to fund billionaire tax breaks. It’s unacceptable.
I need your help in this special election to bring respect back to our veterans.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/506F4A677054456B4144514E70506B565A5070652F47334648484C716D4956715955594C51783034646944397466584874654157713567757362587836773450/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-03-15%20at%209.48.45%E2%80%AFAM.png]
The GOP will happily throw veterans under the bus, but I won’t. When I’m in Congress, I’ll fight to fully fund the VA, protect veterans’ health care, and ensure our service members get the benefits they earned.
But I need your help to get there. We have a crucial fundraising deadline coming up, and every dollar we raise sends a message: we will fight back.
Can you chip in $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can today to stand up for veterans? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/506F4A677054456B4144514E70506B565A5070652F47334648484C716D4956715955594C51783034646944397466584874654157713567757362587836773450/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-03-08%20at%208.46.33%E2%80%AFPM.png]
Let’s show them that Florida won’t turn its back on those who served.
With gratitude,
Gay Valimont
Democrat for Congress, FL-1

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: "The Truth Will Set You Free"
body:
RMV is working to restore liberty in Colorado
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
| | |
---
| | Peter,
You’ve heard the saying, “**The truth will set you free**.” That is why the Rocky Mountain Voice exists. We want to keep Coloradans informed with the truth so that we can remain free.
It is so important that we are aware of the facts so we know what needs to be done to best honor our rich heritage and protect our freedoms.
In order to preserve the integrity of our state, build a community, and defend our liberty, we need to be informed. But we cannot just stand idly by and wait for this to happen. We have to unite together and do what is right for Colorado.
Finding the truth is hard. It takes work, effort, and manpower. But with your help, this community of trust is possible. _Will you commit to restoring our state today?_

clean_body: | | | More Republican skullduggery means we need more billboards! Cutting Medicaid means people will DIE. Apparently that is a sacrifice felon Trump, unelected billionaire Elon Musk and Republicans like Senator Thom Tillis are willing to make. The party of MAGA equates empathy with weakness and they control all the branches of our government - our lives are in danger. North Carolina Republican Senator Thom Tillis is in a TOSS-UP race for re-election, and we’re holding him accountable for this cruelty. We’re printing a “Republicans SLASH Medicaid - Fire Tillis” billboard right now for North Carolina to show his constituents that kicking them off of Medicaid is a sacrifice Tillis is all too willing to make in order to give millionaires and billionaires MORE tax cuts. Stand against GREED. Stand against cruelty. Stand against MAGA. FIRE Thom Tillis and take back Congress. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Thanks for your support, -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. name: DC Daily Journal
subject: Too Much Stress Weighing You Down? Here’s the Fix.
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| **Wake Up Ready --Not Restless**

That feeling in your chest when you wake up? That's stress that didn't go away overnight.

It builds up over time--day after day--until it starts affecting your sleep, your energy, and your ability to focus.

Here's the reality: You can't fix it by just toughing it out. You need a solution that actually works.

That's where microdosing magic mushrooms comes in. Psilocybin helps reset the brain, clearing out the stress so you can focus, stay sharp, and handle what matters.

You'll go through the day with a clear head, sleep soundly at night, and wake up ready to go.

No gimmicks. No fluff. Just results.

[**Get Magic Mushrooms Here**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/8e723bce3ff2477f94dcd771a06899c2-9b4d185a2a0d4627920712e120f1863d/63)
---

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: The early bird catches the worm
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250315-1271-foote&t=1001&akid=1271%2E342411%2EhatD4R ]Squad Victory Fund

Good morning,
Peter!

They say, “the early bird catches the worm” — and today, on the FINAL day
of our mid-March fundraising push, we’re counting on early action to hit
our $75,000 goal before midnight!

Peter, if just 5
people from 18326 step up with $3 or more, we
can cross the finish line – and maybe even surpass it.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250315-movement.XcgVuL&refcode=em20250315-1271&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1271%2E342411%2EhatD4R ]Can we count on you to be one of the first people from 18326
to chip in and get us that much closer to our goal?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250315-movement.XcgVuL&refcode=em20250315-1271&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1271%2E342411%2EhatD4R ]Contribute ››

While our Squad fights for hardworking people and families who bear the
brunt of the far-right’s greed and chaos, the far-right has been parading
around their billionaire backers — and now the President is turning the
White House into a personal ad campaign.

What’s more, Elon Musk is already scheming to flood a crucial Wisconsin
Supreme Court race to stack the courts with MAGA loyalists.^1 So it’s
crucial that we continue to uplift every progressive Democrat who is bold
enough to stand up and fight back.

We can’t do this work without the full support of the
grassroots,
Peter.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250315-movement.XcgVuL&refcode=em20250315-1271&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1271%2E342411%2EhatD4R ]Can we count on you to chip in $3 or more to help us
close the gap on our $75,000 mid-March goal before midnight tonight?

Thank you for standing with us.

Together,

The Squad
