In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com
clean_body: [ ]Squad Victory Fund Good morning, Peter! They say, “the early bird catches the worm” — and today, on the FINAL day of our mid-March fundraising push, we’re counting on early action to hit our $75,000 goal before midnight! Peter, if just 5 people from 18326 step up with $3 or more, we can cross the finish line – and maybe even surpass it. [ ]Can we count on you to be one of the first people from 18326 to chip in and get us that much closer to our goal? [ ]Contribute ›› While our Squad fights for hardworking people and families who bear the brunt of the far-right’s greed and chaos, the far-right has been parading around their billionaire backers — and now the President is turning the White House into a personal ad campaign. What’s more, Elon Musk is already scheming to flood a crucial Wisconsin Supreme Court race to stack the courts with MAGA loyalists.^1 So it’s crucial that we continue to uplift every progressive Democrat who is bold enough to stand up and fight back. We can’t do this work without the full support of the grassroots, Peter. [ ]Can we count on you to chip in $3 or more to help us close the gap on our $75,000 mid-March goal before midnight tonight? Thank you for standing with us. Together, The Squad 1 - [ ]AP News

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=dacd7b7dde4c424b81aaa3449c965c64&_e=9IuJ4hGQ0c30EmofEwppNvvcxLIeYfOJHOCJIlnTtZNdBCLTTfA9k-qgsHhYuctG5LxW220ZW_8TeSa85IJPyMWi2PRsu2T3i_uCdrY0k1tx-MnqFGNl0Ul6opnOpMQTbLV-scU_Nny5ymO1X5z9SlzKLYCXP_wSAX7sv4kFXoXl1LAxOOoPSELNw9zksbG3o-vutK2XwddqVjig5hj8RpmsqHf70VFhvcdrQQkqu55m8Y2iA9CqR2afPsWbpan1byKVzt7iIWKnGmFNyp7mbAl6mJiCH41o8jON4vyC6zK_eYZhogXLWd2vL3Mo6-T0DSBx7DfVUS_aiGRx0SDNje00iP46d7ZYjWUcj8h1rvbwWEzIA88qoDGhWbUCXICtckG99pQcJEFs7RxaSya8NVEgvxkQ6-hSi4MBOe6u1lKDJN5kYx8f6TSxr0utv_hv)
---
| | Peter, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=dacd7b7dde4c424b81aaa3449c965c64&_e=9IuJ4hGQ0c30EmofEwppNvvcxLIeYfOJHOCJIlnTtZNdBCLTTfA9k-qgsHhYuctG5LxW220ZW_8TeSa85IJPyMWi2PRsu2T3i_uCdrY0k1tx-MnqFGNl0Ul6opnOpMQTbLV-scU_Nny5ymO1X5z9SlzKLYCXP_wSAX7sv4kFXoXl1LAxOOoPSELNw9zksbG3o-vutK2XwddqVjig5hj8RpmsqHf70VFhvcdrQQkqu55m8Y2iA9CqR2afPsWbpan1byKVzt7iIWKnGmFNyp7mbNmfTY-rGm8nrJAS6MO-JidH0HkxgaRFy8fTOAw9TwUASvsUj9OI_MQ0r01WRHCO1Etm6k1Qp-ti-y3HXM_yprPguKnb7ygSrbqM-5P4buf-syefys3mj3OeGPrYQ8FEuyxVvW5TkUDYU-9rhFf5ds4Eq1CXGxgHC4RYLOaf7Z9y)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=dacd7b7dde4c424b81aaa3449c965c64&_e=9IuJ4hGQ0c30EmofEwppNvvcxLIeYfOJHOCJIlnTtZNdBCLTTfA9k-qgsHhYuctG5LxW220ZW_8TeSa85IJPyMWi2PRsu2T3i_uCdrY0k1tx-MnqFGNl0Ul6opnOpMQTbLV-scU_Nny5ymO1X5z9SlzKLYCXP_wSAX7sv4kFXoXl1LAxOOoPSELNw9zksbG3o-vutK2XwddqVjig5hj8RpmsqHf70VFhvcdrQQkqu55m8Y2iA9CqR2afPsWbpan1byKVzt7iIWKnGmFNyp7mbNqe0H5gV2kLerGDdmIjoUhQeWSfEC8DiTL4bobdmBEdsA7pZR8pT-D6ZPEJatZip_Pt3rXbRGf1msCYFmDlP-7AnM5k1KYkELXjVPkTBfZA7dKjdGjw1EiemAYB8CTZ9KD2rSGKZ1b_UQbU94Hi8I6QsE0ammJOw2WBIV2yFI3b)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=dacd7b7dde4c424b81aaa3449c965c64&_e=9IuJ4hGQ0c30EmofEwppNvvcxLIeYfOJHOCJIlnTtZNdBCLTTfA9k-qgsHhYuctG5LxW220ZW_8TeSa85IJPyMWi2PRsu2T3i_uCdrY0k1tx-MnqFGNl0Ul6opnOpMQTbLV-scU_Nny5ymO1X5z9SlzKLYCXP_wSAX7sv4kFXoXl1LAxOOoPSELNw9zksbG3o-vutK2XwddqVjig5hj8RpmsqHf70VFhvcdrQQkqu55m8Y2iA9CqR2afPsWbpan1byKVzt7iIWKnGmFNyp7mbJSyed3EPhjLFTjNBVhtquzX4bmRuDpkzN0njuvJRr5HQxrrxZFfeaWfiYKzq4J8vFumfZU4sM79iXEx1LqZky6bsREfSMZP6xfzX3uT-HzTNyVyDk3Bn-Nfw6J0OKp2u-6XGjbCNCwr57Fcl8LYlvbXoKNKAATWv6uYZep-HFcF).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Marine Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Always faithful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I’m running for Governor of Virginia – to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way – a beacon of hope.
I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely.
| |

And to that, I say **absolutely.** Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, **and I 'm not like the others who normally send you these messages:**-I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old.
-I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician.
-I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry.I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: _**my story is only possible in America.**_ And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope.

_But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children._**Not on my watch. ** _**[So, consider this a humble invitation to join my campaign: Will you chip in today--even if it's just a few bucks--to ensure that we have the means needed to beat my Democrat opponent and win this thing?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5114d7b300af46ba97843c185d6aecbc&_e=P1qkj1_Kmr8SH9p0BkGbCLGqoB2GGFnTZ9UWGCiLUN5joU5qud8ofLQmo5Wu9dRySYsLxAUB-ABK3J2BVRYO1vSCrQw1jVo6D5-wPPYxUEJjLPWwQICtX8XxQZBwBm78emptpnuK0P3ORLzb8s9FE42lHhJrQ1rLtCgkTg0TSxJvauZd9J5vQOx74LtJqJH29l6MO4E20KUJ6uGztk6W_ZO56LekPWQN3Uo1FcSOdodVRJa93PF0ukEyqqg35WnMWdeWjyDhnDrX5_RbSxnJn24Xnum0Kk_pbw5RSdi41kNlpAfDYUQWJRp_FAyxCZjfrI9-MsZRdGOi_sHlxdwiPvQV7d4Zi9cp-BJK3HJTP0pGljlhoJtCkhk6nlOHkkXumvx5Vx9CL7_2TkGchPupYQ%3D%3D)**_

clean_body: I’m running for Governor of Virginia – to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way – a beacon of hope. I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely. | | | | | | | | | Semper Fi.Always faithful. I often get asked, " Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely. Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, and I 'm not like the others who normally send you these messages:-I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old. -I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician. -I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry.I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America. And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope. But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children.Not on my watch. We have a long journey ahead of us, but we will be better off with you on our side. Thank you & God Bless, Winsome Earle-Sears Candidate for Governor of Virginia | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to all of us conservatives working together to win. | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments.

name: Kimberly Bretches
subject: I can't bear the thought of life without him
body:
...will try to lock him up for life for doing his job. | | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job.
---
| |
---
Dear Patriot, That's me and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches in the picture I've sent you...
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d3e0f2d2fa104ae19641db180537ab14&_e=ZOH7DAGpmdlfXMiqpWm93rjdn_16geGid7k17uO6UuHC2RWlZVKh3zJRt5Ha0EwSFs6_CGAoJP5onS6_kYXVv__5_YLizONXYO9VHwbsWpTuaIws8xmCGo-blNjRgf86fac3pOtAbSz5uIe1fWiWwHLlJ78-FCFedLTLI8PK8bgyPWdjiut_84WPdG_6ELWiQj2AqtURV8NMfgGzvZaph8mojmjjj4IBoSti_ByvYVC6S1-rWtqPNWNM3BQgmNSHFwSaBiTma8YyF8gGwbYbkBOO8sTwcrmxurJ_uuWiMyfFZkfQyjNWQHnQ79IbX9_oj5Kfob2NHGw9J98-AGd7DfyONlwxBqlTl7LeeA3f2USOWbcLXzErnuGTJ-VdsDsLlFPUO3AQqvvg4O9Xc80mVA%3D%3D)
---
...a picture we took on the day Chance received the Lifesaving Medal With Valor for rescuing a driver from a crashed car that had caught on fire. This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because in July, the same city that gave Chance this award... ...will try to lock him up for life for doing his job. I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were "mostly peaceful." It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars, and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn't restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same "beanbag guns" that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before it got out of hand. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. What I didn’t know then was that this nightmare wasn't over for us. Far from it. Unknown to Chance and the other officers on duty that night, an anti-police protestor was hit by one of my husband's non-lethal rounds. They claimed they were injured and lost part of their finger. And for that... ...the county prosecutor charged my husband with "aggravated assault by a public servant" -- a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, my emotions went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned that the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don't care if my husband is innocent. They'll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year police veteran. My husband is a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He's served on mission trips -- planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he's done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars and could be his "reward." Even if my husband's good name is cleared there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God's grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us -- the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policemen's best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes -- like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth -- without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they've agreed to help Chance. My friend, you've read my letter this far so I'm going to ask as boldly as I can: Will you help Chance, too? _**[Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have wrongly accused?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d3e0f2d2fa104ae19641db180537ab14&_e=ZOH7DAGpmdlfXMiqpWm93rjdn_16geGid7k17uO6UuHC2RWlZVKh3zJRt5Ha0EwSFs6_CGAoJP5onS6_kYXVv__5_YLizONXYO9VHwbsWpTuaIws8xmCGo-blNjRgf86fac3pOtAbSz5uIe1fWiWwHLlJ78-FCFedLTLI8PK8bgyPWdjiut_84WPdG_6ELWiQj2AqtURV8NMfgGzvZaph8mojmjjj4IBoSti_ByvYVBy1IyUbcqCEvS66aGEGlnM1Z92WCw3DhxPjE9gcaICoEvJ2ab0hdoNf_TdaclPhLa64tnx--2JYba67xGm5NQd7mV5F-JUpPJzsUNPQaafOCODUFBsYAPsHamNehFe91pUs_B6oHxmIBNJwJx4bclF2g9B09OpKskVWt6X0ayPyw%3D%3D)**_** ** You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. _**[So with that in mind, please know that any contribution -- be it $35, $100, $500 or even $1,000 -- is tax-deductible.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d3e0f2d2fa104ae19641db180537ab14&_e=ZOH7DAGpmdlfXMiqpWm93rjdn_16geGid7k17uO6UuHC2RWlZVKh3zJRt5Ha0EwSFs6_CGAoJP5onS6_kYXVv__5_YLizONXYO9VHwbsWpTuaIws8xmCGo-blNjRgf86fac3pOtAbSz5uIe1fWiWwHLlJ78-FCFedLTLI8PK8bgyPWdjiut_84WPdG_6ELWiQj2AqtURV8NMfgGzvZaph8mojmjjj4IBoSti_ByvYVCvNYTwY_nFqVUGRVybSQwyQMJXOv3TLUL2I6iBO9nQ6ggLqlcvkBu0cfsViXS4Os6J-8nt1-XZeC5N9pMmqZslzpUhR_T3ppj1eBa6_PpeT9e1iyUNkU1IgrLeJEHG0XBkRbs-0rIDC-9VGhITEGstb3Z8-cCfUL9rOEdprDRJPA%3D%3D)**_ But whatever you feel led to give, please end it back quickly. Chance's trial starts on July 7th. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he'll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won't be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won't be able to walk our daughter down the aisle somebody... I can't bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. _**[So please, my friend, rush back your gift right away if possible.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d3e0f2d2fa104ae19641db180537ab14&_e=ZOH7DAGpmdlfXMiqpWm93rjdn_16geGid7k17uO6UuHC2RWlZVKh3zJRt5Ha0EwSFs6_CGAoJP5onS6_kYXVv__5_YLizONXYO9VHwbsWpTuaIws8xmCGo-blNjRgf86fac3pOtAbSz5uIe1fWiWwHLlJ78-FCFedLTLI8PK8bgyPWdjiut_84WPdG_6ELWiQj2AqtURV8NMfgGzvZaph8mojmjjj4IBoSti_ByvYVCeuF4D-3NaU6eGWu7yHxcDseRehHYCLFXje4-lIo9_aas8vIm7h_uVMcmg2b6BlVJ-B-rHZaqXg2-4KTS3h1Oraz4-vQahfXEkQAldLEE3uBrV98SENein6pqcpmPi_IA5PKdyVfho87WZOWkKrk1bS9r1lQrvwCpmc5WxtRRJGQ%3D%3D)**_ With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, _**[your gift of $35](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d3e0f2d2fa104ae19641db180537ab14&_e=ZOH7DAGpmdlfXMiqpWm93rjdn_16geGid7k17uO6UuHC2RWlZVKh3zJRt5Ha0EwSFs6_CGAoJP5onS6_kYXVv__5_YLizONXYO9VHwbsWpTuaIws8xmCGo-blNjRgf86fac3pOtAbSz5uIe1fWiWwHLlJ78-FCFedLTLI8PK8bgyPWdjiut_84WPdG_6ELWiQj2AqtURV8NMfgGzvZaph8mojmjjj4IBoSti_ByvYVA663AzYZCDVfLrkwtMcDqgwwgZDPC0VGtMkMe09FcFSUR9mlYtOgBT596OsB3wMPn8RiwKmSFt3NvboiMFupEdcXUZvOcxy3pTdKHD5aNvgsl9FE-1S9E1hQ4bX6CZ0AjwDBxJ9yqLoMztJsflb6aUydw3lE89kNbFUuFRCipZcg%3D%3D)**_ \-- or any amount -- could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you -- in advance -- for helping my husband fight back.
---
With hope and thanks,
---
Kimberly Bretches
---
P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his "reward."And to make things worse, we're up against the deep pockets of a George Soros backed prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance's trial begins. Chance and I have three children -- and one more on the way. Please don't let them grow up without their father. _**[Thank you for any help you can send to LELDF today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d3e0f2d2fa104ae19641db180537ab14&_e=ZOH7DAGpmdlfXMiqpWm93rjdn_16geGid7k17uO6UuHC2RWlZVKh3zJRt5Ha0EwSFs6_CGAoJP5onS6_kYXVv__5_YLizONXYO9VHwbsWpTuaIws8xmCGo-blNjRgf86fac3pOtAbSz5uIe1fWiWwHLlJ78-FCFedLTLI8PK8bgyPWdjiut_84WPdG_6ELWiQj2AqtURV8NMfgGzvZaph8mojmjjj4IBoSti_ByvYVCxTUhdPnWzgKf55Zf2MRmdjnGWI2MIAmKCdjAzoMZO2eaMk8nsCFxsNYuC_5FSeQKdjAdEAB2x8ShUO9mXXZOelxgiXD1lANQVUPw1D3UTfat6QZ4ByfyIkEvufG_Rcwe09DoPfsGtUvgiACGQiPe4xx1q92oUZkybTzBOIKYL8w%3D%3D)**_

clean_body: ...will try to lock him up for life for doing his job. | | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job. | | Dear Patriot, That's me and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches in the picture I've sent you... ...a picture we took on the day Chance received the Lifesaving Medal With Valor for rescuing a driver from a crashed car that had caught on fire. This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because in July, the same city that gave Chance this award... ...will try to lock him up for life for doing his job. I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were "mostly peaceful." It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars, and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn't restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same "beanbag guns" that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before it got out of hand. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. What I didn’t know then was that this nightmare wasn't over for us. Far from it. Unknown to Chance and the other officers on duty that night, an anti-police protestor was hit by one of my husband's non-lethal rounds. They claimed they were injured and lost part of their finger. And for that... ...the county prosecutor charged my husband with "aggravated assault by a public servant" -- a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, my emotions went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned that the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don't care if my husband is innocent. They'll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year police veteran. My husband is a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He's served on mission trips -- planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he's done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars and could be his "reward." Even if my husband's good name is cleared there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God's grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us -- the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policemen's best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes -- like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth -- without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they've agreed to help Chance. My friend, you've read my letter this far so I'm going to ask as boldly as I can: Will you help Chance, too? You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. But whatever you feel led to give, please end it back quickly. Chance's trial starts on July 7th. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he'll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won't be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won't be able to walk our daughter down the aisle somebody... I can't bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, \-- or any amount -- could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you -- in advance -- for helping my husband fight back. With hope and thanks, Kimberly Bretches P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his "reward."And to make things worse, we're up against the deep pockets of a George Soros backed prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance's trial begins. Chance and I have three children -- and one more on the way. Please don't let them grow up without their father. | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

name: Mikie Sherrill HQ
subject: Elon Musk could spend big in this race. We can’t let that happen.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Peter — Mikie has faced tough elections. In 2018, she took on an entrenched Republican incumbent even though nobody thought she had a shot.
But this may be the toughest race yet.
And we need to be prepared for one major X-factor: **Elon Musk.**
In the 2024 elections, Elon Musk spent **$290 MILLION** to tip the scales in Donald Trump and the GOP’s favor. He even attempted to influence elections right here in New Jersey — his PAC spent over $1 million to buy a toss-up House seat for Republicans.
All of that spending clearly paid off — because now he’s been given unprecedented power to run the federal government and slash critical services for working families across New Jersey.
**Even worse? He’s not stopping there.**
Not even two months into Trump’s second term, Elon Musk has already launched a seven-figure ad buy in support of an extremist state Supreme Court candidate in Wisconsin.
**And given that national Republicans see a huge opportunity to flip the New Jersey governor’s seat, it’s only a matter of time before he gets involved here, too.**
New Jersey cannot afford a governor who is beholden to Elon Musk. Not now, not ever. Our best chance at ensuring that never happens is by electing a strong Democratic governor. And there’s nobody with a better record of WINNING in the face of those attacks than Mikie. It’s how she delivered the biggest red-to-blue swing in the country in 2018 and why she consistently overperforms the top of the ticket.
**[So please, split any amount between Mikie’s campaign and Heartland Patriots right now to help us elect Mikie and ensure she has what it takes to fight back against whatever attacks come her way.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86953?refcode=em20250315-8815&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8815%2E614464%2EY7lTHK)**

name: NDRC
subject: “The House’s Republican edge is gone. But the gerrymander lives.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Make a donation to help fight for fair maps and fair representation
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103904343/533641154/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5YWNiNWM5LWE1MDEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Xwf5sTSbCZofQSZLf99cBnTPwk6p_pbwm3oShJGHRZg=&emci=082ead3e-f000-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=09acb5c9-a501-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, here’s a recent headline from the _Washington Post_ that caught our attention: **The House’s Republican edge is gone.
But the gerrymander lives.** For more than two decades, the status quo in the House was a clear bias favoring Republicans — thanks largely to egregious partisan gerrymanders in many states. This led to elections in which Republicans would win a wide majority of seats _without_ winning a majority of votes. **We founded the NDRC to root out that unfairness and ensure our representation better reflected the will of the people. And we’re proud of the progress we’re making with your support.** In the 2022 and 2024 elections, Republicans won narrow majorities in the House, but in this case, it was because they also won narrow majorities of votes. The mathematical bias they had enjoyed cycle after cycle has been reduced – and we want to thank you for your continued support that made that progress possible. But today, redistricting reform has never been more important. Many voters still live in extremely gerrymandered districts and lack fair representation. And in states across the country, partisan forces are actively trying to roll back fair maps. To quote the _Washington Post_ author directly, **“The need to curb gerrymandering, then, is as urgent now as when it previously distorted the House as a whole.”** **The NDRC’s work to defeat gerrymandering and establish fair maps is critical right now. **[**Make a donation to ensure we can continue our fight for a truly representative democracy across the country.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103904344/533641155/469381263?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_WashingtonPost_email_20250315-NDRC-Tier1-WashingtonPost_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250315-NDRC-Tier1-WashingtonPost_&utm_campaign=WashingtonPost&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5YWNiNWM5LWE1MDEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Xwf5sTSbCZofQSZLf99cBnTPwk6p_pbwm3oShJGHRZg=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Make a donation to help fight for fair maps and fair representation | Peter, here’s a recent headline from the Washington Post that caught our attention: The House’s Republican edge is gone. But the gerrymander lives. For more than two decades, the status quo in the House was a clear bias favoring Republicans — thanks largely to egregious partisan gerrymanders in many states. This led to elections in which Republicans would win a wide majority of seats without winning a majority of votes. We founded the NDRC to root out that unfairness and ensure our representation better reflected the will of the people. And we’re proud of the progress we’re making with your support. In the 2022 and 2024 elections, Republicans won narrow majorities in the House, but in this case, it was because they also won narrow majorities of votes. The mathematical bias they had enjoyed cycle after cycle has been reduced – and we want to thank you for your continued support that made that progress possible. But today, redistricting reform has never been more important. Many voters still live in extremely gerrymandered districts and lack fair representation. And in states across the country, partisan forces are actively trying to roll back fair maps. To quote the Washington Post author directly, “The need to curb gerrymandering, then, is as urgent now as when it previously distorted the House as a whole.” The NDRC’s work to defeat gerrymandering and establish fair maps is critical right now. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. body:
The first two months of Trump’s term can only be described as pure chaos.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1538%2E791427%2E5NB916)

Friend,
The first two months of Trump’s term can only be described as **pure chaos**.
With everything going on in Washington and in our communities, we try our best to stick to the issues and not just fundraising when we reach out to you.
But the truth is, Ilhan is up against an important FEC deadline at the end of the month.
It’s her first deadline of her new term in Congress, and her first under Trump 2.0.
There will be a lot of eyes watching to see how we perform and if our campaign is still going strong in this new political climate.
So if it’s not too much to ask, [**we’re hoping you can chip in today and help us reach our FEC deadline goal.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-mar25.Pez7ER&refcode=em250315-1-120&t=2&akid=1538%2E791427%2E5NB916)
With all the attacks from the far-right, the focus on Ilhan in the media, and the corporate-backed candidates who may look to challenge her in a primary, it’s so important that we use this deadline to show the size and strength of this movement
A movement that has always relied on grassroots fundraising to win the tough battles we’ve faced. So please:
[**Make a donation of any amount. It’s not the size of the donation that matters as much as the amount of people who chip in >>**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-mar25.Pez7ER&refcode=em250315-1-120&t=3&akid=1538%2E791427%2E5NB916)

name: Rebecca Weber
subject: The AARP’s horrible connection to George Soros
body:
Help us counter radical leftists | |
---
| | Soros has channeled millions into electing hand-picked radicals.
---
| |
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3377c5b018e84c90a85a30a4ffe9fe15&_e=GbsXvNt73fB5wCTXpwH_7IP_mpIsMJJAxqtCc3OWHnS-0F95auMEcy_OQckFSIua1ek_KgPxEbmlIlfT5rWZxb2B-v6KOG2nesRmmsDwH25VHVVCjILro8AmT3MvsbfW53Jn4yjnVVvwKHgf6J4Y0AyU1ovF9dC8m69CK3Rfk5qtwJsC6qHOmrFgYSCP7xpSq3xq96g5Gb7tPsIBrT0rRbpiQrFHOtjZ1xoeHVV_jDLOmn8Rl5WRw0bDBgGLlKy2WET6dBxZk8x7hDMw54nksRW90aFzEHA2EUKuCSstpDtWrO1xxx3Il6Ty3BqnII1RX4zH9G0BFZCz0r5WgV8GCSt3TDFc6qj_pwTKUEFiEvQ%3D)
---
| | Patriot,As a strong conservative senior, I’m hoping that you will side with AMAC Action rather than with _the left-leaning AARP..._ By now you’ve probably heard of **billionaire globalist George Soros** and his support for the most radical leftist ideas on the planet.He’s injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, and our justice system. In the past few years, Soros has channeled millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys—including New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. What I’m about to tell you will make your blood boil—**[**but I hope it will inspire you to take action!**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3377c5b018e84c90a85a30a4ffe9fe15&_e=GbsXvNt73fB5wCTXpwH_7IP_mpIsMJJAxqtCc3OWHnS-0F95auMEcy_OQckFSIua1ek_KgPxEbmlIlfT5rWZxb2B-v6KOG2nesRmmsDwH25VHVVCjILro8AmT3MvsbfW53Jn4yjnVVvwKHgf6J4Y0AyU1ovF9dC8m69CK3Rfk5qtwJsC6qHOmrFgYSCP7xpSq3xq96g5Gb7tPsIBrT0rRVbB3rU9zzNODRyb_KWMEatMJYAOawF34s-Xaid-gYUenaFdAmRM3fP1PdQS2cVlNLz38Qrv7fY4vFtOYWI3OYcde8Np5tg2WhFHbpj7Vh6RRjd3tT3zgoEdkwUqdFF6bOLCRdquMZwZRtBsYpz0l2I%3D)** According to public tax filings, the left-leaning AARP accepted over **10 MILLION DOLLARS** —in just three years—from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.” **You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’** And the AARP is taking multi-millions from this group funded by the man whose life mission is to destroy our nation. It’s not hard to see why the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine, calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s “changing the world, $100 million at a time.”Patriot , it makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.And listen to this...Of all age groups (including 18-29-year-olds!), when asked **“Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of Donald Trump?”** —seniors aged 65 and older are the ONLY age group in America with a decreasing approval rating of President Trump.**Coincidence or Soros-backed AARP influence?****And so today I’m writing to sound the alarm.** To help President Trump usher in the **Golden Age of America** , AMAC Action must double and even triple our efforts against these radicals and George Soros’ network of prosecutors and Attorneys General who are obstructing President Trump’s America First Agenda.**_We can’t do it without brave patriots like you._** **[That’s why I’m asking you to follow this link to make a critical one-time donation today.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3377c5b018e84c90a85a30a4ffe9fe15&_e=GbsXvNt73fB5wCTXpwH_7IP_mpIsMJJAxqtCc3OWHnS-0F95auMEcy_OQckFSIua1ek_KgPxEbmlIlfT5rWZxb2B-v6KOG2nesRmmsDwH25VHVVCjILro8AmT3MvsbfW53Jn4yjnVVvwKHgf6J4Y0AyU1ovF9dC8m69CK3Rfk5qtwJsC6qHOmrFgYSCP7xpSq3xq96g5Gb7tPsIBrT0rRS7rwOgvC_1iFrZQAD5zyVidX6yyZ7SAUsgbsijrzPJ0lHCXLB8vQRqhC1LvYiJJls-LikaOXeFDFgaaa0Zqxy6iW-Omz6Cnq_eeX3HUXuvMhhTdeq3T3iZ2gMynG56CdYipcf7PWLA4L2qdW-1HHX0%3D)****My friend, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action.** With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to the left-leaning AARP. And our 82 chapters and 348 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. With the support of conservative seniors like you, AMAC Action has confronted the radical left at every turn. And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him. And I know that together, we can counter the poisonous ideas he’s spreading through groups like the Tides Foundation and the AARP. **Just look at what we accomplished together in 2024 alone:**
---
* **We bombarded** members of Congress, state legislators, corporate executives, and the White House with a tidal wave of emails, comments, and phone calls showing that America’s conservative seniors would not back down in the face of an overreaching Biden Admin.
* **We mobilized** seniors to get out and vote early in the battleground states, resulting in a win for President Trump in all seven swing states.
* **We organized** a massive “Hands Off My Medicare” Petition Drive to stop the Democrats’ horrible “Medicare for All” scheme from giving undocumented immigrants the same healthcare you get.
* **Together with Donald Trump, Jr.,** we united thousands of Americans around our **“Make America Strong Again”**
* **In Missouri and Kentucky,** we helped pass commonsense measures to stop non-citizens from voting in our elections.
* **We defeated** a radical pro-abortion amendment in Florida.
* **In Ohio,** we protected young girls from boys in their sports and in their bathrooms.
* **We stopped** left-wing financial institutions from “de-banking” conservatives in Tennessee simply because they don’t like their politics.

---
And our efforts are so effective that President Trump himself has put out the call for seniors to join conservative AMAC to stop the radical leftists who are ruining our country! AMAC Action isn’t going to back down and let the Left obstruct President Trump’s America First agenda. If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But we’re going to shout it from the rooftops so unsuspecting seniors know the truth!** We can’t do any of this critical work without you. **[Today—right now—when so much is at stake—will you please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500 or more?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3377c5b018e84c90a85a30a4ffe9fe15&_e=GbsXvNt73fB5wCTXpwH_7IP_mpIsMJJAxqtCc3OWHnS-0F95auMEcy_OQckFSIua1ek_KgPxEbmlIlfT5rWZxb2B-v6KOG2nesRmmsDwH25VHVVCjILro8AmT3MvsbfW53Jn4yjnVVvwKHgf6J4Y0AyU1ovF9dC8m69CK3Rfk5qtwJsC6qHOmrFgYSCP7xpSq3xq96g5Gb7tPsIBrT0rRVseVxJ1cD57apCcnS0BvhpZpowqGNPms1-bt7Qj35tqQJhjIRGDXSflupRiYI4eYVHmkxCGE_zc1qjuARY46IYQ4CtSRF0XJFeL3nX9ijF2Brpz2_JmF26hy1caHat_UMaWbfNDqone-4cavtjhZno%3D)** The radical Left isn’t letting up for one minute, and neither are we.**Your AMAC Action is taking every step possible to protect the interests of you and your family—but we can’t do it without you.** We already have a full agenda for the rest of this critical year that needs financing. And now that Soros has unleashed his radical D.A.s, our fights will multiply across the nation. But please know that **ANY amount** that you can contribute, whether it’s smaller or larger, is greatly appreciated. **[**Whatever you decide, please donate within the next 72 hours so we know what resources we have to work with.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3377c5b018e84c90a85a30a4ffe9fe15&_e=GbsXvNt73fB5wCTXpwH_7IP_mpIsMJJAxqtCc3OWHnS-0F95auMEcy_OQckFSIua1ek_KgPxEbmlIlfT5rWZxb2B-v6KOG2nesRmmsDwH25VHVVCjILro8AmT3MvsbfW53Jn4yjnVVvwKHgf6J4Y0AyU1ovF9dC8m69CK3Rfk5qtwJsC6qHOmrFgYSCP7xpSq3xq96g5Gb7tPsIBrT0rRTGt44GQ_EBkbAX-T0LcMaoGz83Jnqje0uzHQ9WxfpwsAhepoJutNnyf7gm4K10GdOn6R8iY8ZUmE8akvs8VUtYs6zultd0meo8yznquDSgKedZj_LCrtq0RCtVDonGRUvJcroQUZEaa80bHAfUnJDs%3D)** If we allow radical leftists like George Soros to continue without opposition, every one of us will suffer. Thank you for standing with us.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. clean_body: | | Team, I want to give you the latest. Extreme MAGA Republicans are crashing the economy in real time. They plan to take a chainsaw to Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, veterans’ benefits and public schools – all while preparing to give massive tax cuts to their billionaire donors and wealthy corporations. House Democrats will not be complicit. Congresswoman Nellie Pou and I will always stand on the side of the American people, even when it means confronting those who threaten our progress. We need Nellie Pou to be reelected so Democrats can take back the majority and put a much-needed check on this extreme, unpopular agenda. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Team, let me pull back the curtain and reveal what’s going on behind the scenes: House Republicans fled town after taking a vote that will gut Medicaid and imperil Social Security. They are ready to unleash havoc on everyday Americans, giving the president and unelected MAGA billionaires even more power to continue dismantling our democracy. House Democrats will always stand on the side of the American people. I need to know you’re standing with us as we prepare to defeat extreme MAGA Republicans and win back the majority. = = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Keep the faith, Hakeem | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. name: Forward Party
subject: Control What You Can - We Want To Know Your Opinion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
What are your thoughts on our health care system?

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=healthcare_follow_up&n=1)
---
| Peter -- Earlier this week, we sent you an email about focusing on the things you _can_ do in these chaotic times. While we do need to focus on the short-term, we can't lose sight of what we're trying to build in the long-term. We need a vision for the future that is more responsive to the needs of Americans, leading to a more resilient democracy. In that vein, we're kicking off a series of conversations today on what direction you—the Forward Party—want to take the country. We'll be focusing on the top-polling issues amongst independents. Building a resilient and representative democracy takes time and energy from us all. We need to keep having these conversations continually so we can drive towards real solutions, and so we're going to be reaching out to you on [social media](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=mhUdGCm_eEqxEEjcw0-lGbIN6AZpbu4iFxE-qCh2CjGvH-8jt4D3kZ0aNQOzmU5Hp2_xiFVrCkYKHoLZbcE9Lw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=healthcare_follow_up&n=2), on [our website](https://home.forwardparty.com/2025_healthcare_feedback?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=healthcare_follow_up&n=3), and here to ask you for your opinions. **We'll start with the 10 most important topics to independent-minded Americans, and we want to know what you think about them.**
### Up first, [healthcare](https://home.forwardparty.com/2025_healthcare_feedback?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=healthcare_follow_up&n=4).
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/2025_healthcare_feedback?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=healthcare_follow_up&n=5) We want to know how satisfied you are with our current health care system—**click the image above and tell us your answer**. And once you've answered the broad question, leave a comment and tell us the why you selected the answer you did. What would you change? How would you fix it? What does the world look like with your solution in place? Are there any interesting articles on the topic you want to share with other Forwardists? We want to hear it all. _**We're not the only ones talking about healthcare...**_ Earlier today, Andrew Yang and Mark Cuban were together talking about prescription drug prices and how we can bring them down. Join the conversation! Looking forward to hearing from you, The Forward Party Forward Party
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=healthcare_follow_up&n=6)[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=healthcare_follow_up&n=7)
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=healthcare_follow_up&n=8) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=healthcare_follow_up&n=9) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=healthcare_follow_up&n=10) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=healthcare_follow_up&n=11) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=healthcare_follow_up&n=12) Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kE1v4jAQhn-NfSOyx1_h4AOBNdIiIQSr3e3R2Ka4jUmIQ1L66yso5TrzzDyvXpvaOh6uGqkKARyjzwgAsRkCOL-Mqbu8pdVy0vxeriZnuU7itoX5Ax3gCZ-cfV9Xu-2vf_MyK1ntUvt_NdAn3l_b8IQf0iIkG-vbVC2w1-zgCcdBU8WBCCKlwEcNggtWgqSESqVY8CBgSsPecwls6kocNRAQhFFBuVAcCuKD49bZkpZ0yvYKcXL3FDaFLjpLcz_armuaVLgm4Vof-77N92AGgRm7pjhdXB0u-fvMNQmBeURGYAYEZi82fz6TgY8ZYuZeGluEsP2bN7byuNO-HWNdxyxv9tefN3jQ8BUAAP__CeNtfw)
| | Here's what a Pentagon official told us.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0GPoyAYQH8N3jTwAWoPHsZam0yzc2g3s7sng4BTZkUcxDazv35DY3oh4fHg4wk7j2b4rlBRI4CrUQsCQPQFAXz9uVu_ftrTMXWvx1P6lb9ZHk9hv6k3eMqTFH_f6sv58GtfLkVeX-z8-3QjTz18z_opb0MzbYUZIy2aRFV0UJgluiIFA8xxnvPkWpU9VkxBz3PgJQPGhwJLQUq6w5KRHSSmAgwcU8IJ4wWDDCstmZCiJCXZ0b5ADD_mZMJqb6QgS7gL752zmXQ2GatrCPPy-FiLoFVuEkFn0gTzT0-fbvWTGM1iB7dOSgTjpngNQVtyRSjvh7QoCU-ZGPp0JwaW9lSXOTAl-7yPT9J2DbZb3OqlRrSpm2N6PrwjyCO2WpnVItocfmwkaB_3d082IIWdhfmYEG22UtrVzbHbv7bd62XfnQ_v3eXnyzmNS-IrNd_NOJolj-Ufj_LYeavgfwAAAP__6MGUZg)
---
On January 15th our team confronted Jamie Mannina, a now former senior Pentagon advisor and former FBI agent, over his comments made about working with retired generals to**'protect people from Trump.'** A high-level Pentagon official was caught openly bragging about working with retired military officials to defy and resist President Trumps orders. Now President Trump has fired General Charles Brown the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff. We have seen the playbook before. Deep state officials plotting to "resist from the inside" because "they couldn't really get fired" But we got them fired and with your help we can expose more of these bad actors and hold them accountable. As you know, the DC bureaucracy routinely resists actions that provide transparency or accountability and fiercely fights anyone who tries cleaning house. That’s why our citizen journalism is so critical. Right now, we’re working on dozens of leads and producing explosive stories just about every week. I’ve been told directly by people in the know that our work is giving the administration the ammunition they need to plow forward with change. clean_body: | | | Here's what a Pentagon official told us. | | | | On January 15th our team confronted Jamie Mannina, a now former senior Pentagon advisor and former FBI agent, over his comments made about working with retired generals to'protect people from Trump.' A high-level Pentagon official was caught openly bragging about working with retired military officials to defy and resist President Trumps orders. Now President Trump has fired General Charles Brown the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff. We have seen the playbook before. Deep state officials plotting to "resist from the inside" because "they couldn't really get fired" But we got them fired and with your help we can expose more of these bad actors and hold them accountable. As you know, the DC bureaucracy routinely resists actions that provide transparency or accountability and fiercely fights anyone who tries cleaning house. That’s why our citizen journalism is so critical. Right now, we’re working on dozens of leads and producing explosive stories just about every week. I’ve been told directly by people in the know that our work is giving the administration the ammunition they need to plow forward with change. That's why I'm calling on you to join me in this crucial effort by making a . Together we can hold the deep state accountable. Thank you for your support, | | James O'Keefe | | | James O'Keefe | | | | | Citizen Journalism Foundation PO Box 717, Westwood, NJ 07675

name: Shontel Brown
subject: the Trump recession

body:
His temper-tantrum-induced tariffs are propelling us toward a recession.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103908451/533649587/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250313recession_N_TB_90DO_6_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzM2ODMyYi1hZTAxLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lRHxkBFP8sxTrDUa4gbLqLwHY1maJzvrecNxnKUaRe0=) Peter,

This week, Trump _**once again**_ changed up the game, increasing tariffs on Canadian aluminum and steel to a staggering 50% and then, mere hours later, backtracking. Now, Americans are facing retaliatory tariffs from both Canada and the E.U., inching us closer to a global trade war.

As he propels the U.S. closer and closer to a Trump recession, **I wanted to set the record straight on what former President Biden and Democrats handed him as he took office:**

✅ The lowest unemployment rate of any admin in 50 years

✅ 16 million jobs created, including $1.5 million in manufacturing and construction

✅ 3% annual GDP growth

✅ Inflation falling to near 2%

When you’re a billionaire, you can afford to play politics with the U.S. economy. For the rest of us, the uncertainty and anxiety surrounding Trump’s temper-tantrum-induced tariffs are going to have drastic consequences on our everyday lives.

This much has never been more clear: **_Republicans are the party of the top 1%_** , not the hardworking people of our nation.

[**Help me fight back against Trump and Elon as they work to dismantle our democracy and take our economy down with it. name: Team Kerr
subject: a quick update >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Kerr for California
body:
At the end of March, we’ll have our first FEC quarterly filing deadline of the year. Posting a strong early report will put us on the path to win this seat and flip the House. With the month almost halfway over, we need your support to make sure we stay on track.

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Big Announcement
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ96YCGIy40Aggg7c3X2RYYr7aykpAEhUQuOU4TFphl2k6SAdqQQsHXlTwnKk)

I am excited to officially announce that I will seek re-election as your Representative for Minnesota's 1st Congressional District in 2026.
********[](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ96YCGIy40AgghLc3KqMtNoGTeKV9bLUO_t1h975W96PlRyMBRfopJu0YS4o)******[********](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ96YCGIy40AgghLc3KqMtNoGTeKV9bLUO_t1h975W96PlRyMBRfopJu0YS4o)**

[](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ96YCGIy40Aggg7c3X2RYYr7aykpAEhUQuOU4TFphl2k6SAdqQQsHXlTwnKk)
---
Serving the hardworking families of southern Minnesota has been the honor of a lifetime.
Since first being elected in August 2022, we've made significant strides together.
However, our progress has not gone unnoticed. National Democratic groups, including the House Majority PAC, have already listed me as a top target for 2026. They are prepared to pour millions into Minnesota to flip this seat and push their agenda.
**[Please make a contribution to prepare for the fight that inevitably lies ahead to defend our district.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ96YCGIy40Aggg7c3X2RYYr7aykpAEhUQuOU4TFphl2k6SAdqQQsHXlTwnKk)**

Under Biden and the Democrats, we saw chaos on our border, fentanyl in our communities, out of control inflation, and skyrocketing national debt.
The American people voted for us to take action to ensure we leave a stronger nation to our children and grandchildren.
And I’m running for re-election to ensure that the job gets done.
There is a lot of hard work ahead of us, but I know America’s best days are still to come.
I hope you’ll join me as I officially launch my re-election campaign.
**[Please make a contribution to prepare for the fight that inevitably lies ahead to defend our district.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ96YCGIy40Aggg7c3X2RYYr7aykpAEhUQuOU4TFphl2k6SAdqQQsHXlTwnKk)****
**Thank you,
Brad Finstad

body:

Peter, I'm sorry for the longer email, but right now, our nation is at a turning point – **and I need you to understand what's at stake.**
This administration is working relentlessly to decimate our federal government and destroy Social Security – all to give billionaires a massive tax cut.
They think that they're above the law. They think that they can just rewrite the rules and skirt accountability. And they think that we'll just sit idly by while our government and our democracy are undermined.
**What they fail to realize is that****I’ve spent my career taking on bullies and holding the corrupt accountable – and with so much on the line, I refuse to stop now. But I can't do it alone, Peter.** **And right now, I'm still missing your support toward my critical $12,000 mid-month goal.**
**[Please, will you make your first donation of the month today to become a Democracy Defender and help us stop this administration and an unelected billionaire from upending our government and our very democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103909919/533653260/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1837-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTA5MmNkYS1hZTAxLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nBFVf9PQh0XUN3JaLfxxDxGABB28mPbZukzKMb-c6LQ=)**

As we face a crisis unfolding in real time, my office is fighting around the clock to put a stop to it – and with help from this team, our efforts are working.
When the federal government tried to freeze critical funding, we fought back and won.

When they attempted to slash medical research dollars that support New York’s top institutions, we stopped them.

And when unelected billionaire Elon Musk tried to access the sensitive data of millions of Americans, I stood firm to protect your privacy.
The results speak for themselves: We're on a winning streak. But if we're going to keep it up, your support is crucial.
We have until midnight tonight to reach this crucial $12,000 goal. So let’s send a message loud and clear: **We** _will not_**be ruled by billionaires. clean_body: I need you to understand what's at stake. | | | = Peter, I'm sorry for the longer email, but right now, our nation is at a turning point – and I need you to understand what's at stake. This administration is working relentlessly to decimate our federal government and destroy Social Security – all to give billionaires a massive tax cut. They think that they're above the law. They think that they can just rewrite the rules and skirt accountability. And they think that we'll just sit idly by while our government and our democracy are undermined. What they fail to realize is thatI’ve spent my career taking on bullies and holding the corrupt accountable – and with so much on the line, I refuse to stop now. But I can't do it alone, Peter. And right now, I'm still missing your support toward my critical $12,000 mid-month goal. = = | | = As we face a crisis unfolding in real time, my office is fighting around the clock to put a stop to it – and with help from this team, our efforts are working. When the federal government tried to freeze critical funding, we fought back and won. When they attempted to slash medical research dollars that support New York’s top institutions, we stopped them. And when unelected billionaire Elon Musk tried to access the sensitive data of millions of Americans, I stood firm to protect your privacy. The results speak for themselves: We're on a winning streak. But if we're going to keep it up, your support is crucial. We have until midnight tonight to reach this crucial $12,000 goal. So let’s send a message loud and clear: We will notbe ruled by billionaires. We will notlet extremists strip away our freedoms. And we will neverstop fighting for democracy.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for pushing progress forward. – Letitia James | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. name: Mark Kelly
subject: It’s going to take a lot of work to get out of this
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
If there’s any chance I can make a difference, I am going to take it. I’ll be doing whatever I can to help pro-democracy candidates win their races and turn the tide in the Senate over the next two years.
#

Friend —
I’ve run two campaigns in Arizona. Both of them were some of the hardest fought, most expensive elections in the country. And (_not to brag_) I won both times.
On that last part. I was the candidate on the ballot, but it took a huge team to get across the finish line. I had a lot of smart people behind me, thousands of supporters knocking doors and making phone calls, and literally millions of donors chipping in to make it happen. I could not have done it without them.
I say all this because I can say with some authority that winning a competitive campaign is extremely difficult. And we have to win **_a lot**_ of competitive campaigns in 2026 if we’re going to be able to put real, enforceable checks on the Trump Administration.
I’ve found the fight for my entire life, whether it was in the Navy, at NASA, or in the Senate. I like to make myself useful and stay busy. So, I took on another job this year.
Alongside my work fighting the Trump Administration in the Senate, I’ll be serving as Vice-Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee. If there’s any chance I can make a difference, I am going to take it. I’ll be doing whatever I can to help pro-democracy candidates win their races and turn the tide in the Senate over the next two years.
I haven’t forgotten that the reason I won both of my races is because of people like you. I know how important you are to all of this, and you’re critical to what comes next.
So, I’ve got an important request:
[**Can you chip in $5 (or more if you want) so I can help elect the next generation of leaders to the United States Senate?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=liftoff-pac-em-25/.wDfCNk&refcode=em250314-1-90&t=1&akid=6006%2E6688874%2EcXuBtS)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CHIP IN $5](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=liftoff-pac-em-25/.hcJ_d7&amount=5&refcode=em250314-1-90&t=2&akid=6006%2E6688874%2EcXuBtS)**
---
****
| **[CHIP IN MORE](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=liftoff-pac-em-25/.hcJ_d7&refcode=em250314-1-90&t=3&akid=6006%2E6688874%2EcXuBtS)**
---
****
I really appreciate this. It will make a real difference.
Hold fast, we’re going to get through this.
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=6006%2E6688874%2EcXuBtS).

subject: Well, well, well... look what we have here

For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

I’m proud to stand with Al Green against Trump. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWbSDG7ucTMcxS2s1u0dsLx6VM5-MgQseHsLx939WyZZICRICqi3p50O2iCJqgNSOM-DoXgHCNCM_XxOa6sn7oCUYY3_fV5JRlYrr62UMOctn1X4n8mAkYI5BHYSYPzpB8JtzaaRmcnQtw4OGNWSCrEUhgqKY0W7MBGgjP6EMi5_U6nEDsPILGjZtgW1iASZh9C2dqfNp1E0aFlcf1I1WGu0pYdDxawBU7XgJrxZ-ERaE/4et/T2yX73_rScqxjJb_6aXoYA/h0/h001.7yF2TKJfzBpDINZDfkeM_-QNqNYDrHFR-rCRzLYHBck)

Friend, In the face of relentless attacks on our communities, the American people are looking for leaders who will stand up to this lawless administration.
This month, during his joint address to Congress, Donald Trump stated that he had a mandate for his administration’s illegal actions. And one Democrat had the guts to stand up and call him out. **My colleague, Congressman Al Green spoke truth to power, interrupting Trump to make clear that Trump does not have a mandate to cut Medicaid.** Images of Al Green holding up his cane spread quickly around the Internet, with people demanding more Democrats stand up to Trump like he did. But 10 Democrats joined Republicans in voting to censure Al Green for disrupting Trump, and then Democratic House leadership reprimanded him because he wasn’t simply silent in his protest of Trump. This is not how we fight fascism! The American people need Democrats to be a real opposition party that blocks Trump and his billionaire cronies like Elon Musk from stealing from the people and dismantling our federal government. We are in a crisis, and more Democrats need to act like it. **In my first year in Congress in 2019, Al Green and I led on impeaching Trump.** We fought back against Trump’s illegal actions and impeachment efforts succeeded, despite months of pushback from Democratic leadership who didn’t want to rock the boat—even though Democrats controlled the House of Representatives back then. Now that Trump is back in office, I’m proud to stand with Al Green against Trump and in defense of the federal programs that millions of Americans rely on. [**Let’s show Congressman Al Green that we have his back as he stands up to Trump and fights for the more than 72 million people nationwide who have Medicaid. Split a contribution between our campaigns today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJHt17w2hLKYBLDgljexSb0Bg-Li0egGAICUHh5HVkcIsk3WhDhk5jzy0h5X0ZA2O8bQK2tn-4ZwxXBkgJWRotGL8zreiGjWJ1i6HRkFJFdKuI8V78RW8w14bGLFvaRKLOrjNDwipS9bRghiasLxG353uvQdlTCrnHTRSJ6pKGzHfTgAHpVBeEPJ_NcRor4i5rV8iFUQ21MP317k7AvIa13ShQIfb_hVl8ZzNdmB2KvxyR8yGY-dYBIb_q3vuqBKtOSUCinWRk_NjfII8ccXoqHFVWDaehpOtAoeE-XPO_QhbNp9iv5wuiMiKvF5ggdreljbZxryBJdASrJ1m2xmmITco8izINLMxGqiAk2f0QI5D574F8RFffQwuv7gpSxx71/4et/T2yX73_rScqxjJb_6aXoYA/h1/h001.8-2HAhfapqJ0IKf4ueNlI9lVZo92jA6mXBdFwuuEZOU) | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJHt17w2hLKYBLDgljexSb0CmNYaqzNQFJoA85YmQVXRk7SbjwII6wdO16TiuNMXl5t9DO70m6BnjfJHOIKmUB4liF1coYbBkdWyVbhnOb677bZmv-PLYWuRjxlO3trQfAu3wC2U9qAsN1DCGAn9hUnbF_WDNAXt_Uw2wQBbccYFaGo0eKEm-wpVIgycPdoYEPMj67qjubw6Jaaq9xhTHU_1fneaIJ4SrYUNYeguGguZ5v02ON9tvrPw-m1Nmny5QBRt_bvXjk3KL15W-u5ozcRrTuu2DpU7c_PFGYb7InxKGEO8y-8s5FnSUtf1XWLcidLeyjvj5-Z4mjV1CXLA9xqikJ3miyuuzTO8mLKTAy29-I3mZRJH6mthcfk6Q0CECS/4et/T2yX73_rScqxjJb_6aXoYA/h2/h001.8BY5ULu3tbO07FCDOjzSLTDEeVX9vD-IVaFH6K1FJbc)

Last weekend marked 60 years since civil rights activists marched across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, Alabama in what became known as Bloody Sunday. **During the civil rights movement of the 1960s, Congressman Green marched with other leaders and got in “good trouble, necessary trouble” in our shared struggle for equal rights.**
When I reintroduced the _Justice for All Act_ to restore and expand our civil rights laws last month, Al Green joined as a co-sponsor of that legislation. And I was proud to co-sponsor his _Original Black History Month Resolution of 2025_ to recognize and celebrate Black History Month.
In my first year in Congress in 2019, as Chair of the U.S. House Financial Services Subcommittee on Oversight and Investigations, Congressman Green joined me in hosting a field hearing on equitable, safe, and affordable housing at Wayne County Community College in my home district. We are still fighting for affordable housing and pushing back against housing discrimination.
**From healthcare to housing to civil rights and beyond, Congressman Al Green is a leader who is always willing to stand up and fight back against injustice and oppression. We need more bold, courageous leadership like his in Congress so we can build a government that works for the people rather than billionaires.**

name: Katie Porter
subject: Taking on Trump is a pocketbook issue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39543%2E3422442%2E98TEQ0)
Derek,
There’s been a lot of discourse about whether Democrats should focus more on taking on Trump or working on pocketbook issues, like the cost of living.
**Here’s the reality: taking on Trump _is_ a pocketbook issue.**
His tariffs will increase the price of materials we need to build housing. They will threaten our food supply, hitting all of us at the grocery store. His disastrous budget will raise health care costs for millions of Americans.
A key step to bringing down costs for families is stopping Donald Trump and his harmful policies that move us in the exact wrong direction.
California’s next governor needs to do both: stand up to Trump and take action to reduce costs. **And, she needs to understand how these two issues are related and be able to explain it to people.**
Look, I wish it weren’t this way. I wish President Trump actually kept his promise to make life more affordable for Americans. I won’t hold my breath.
As long as he continues on this course of destabilizing our economy and hurting working families, I’m going to keep speaking up and pushing back. **[Can you help power my fight by chipping in $5 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250315_1_ak?refcode=em20250315-39543&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39543_3422442_98TEQ0&akid=39543%2E3422442%2E98TEQ0)**

—Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250315-39543&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39543_3422442_98TEQ0&akid=39543%2E3422442%2E98TEQ0)**

clean_body: Derek, There’s been a lot of discourse about whether Democrats should focus more on taking on Trump or working on pocketbook issues, like the cost of living. Here’s the reality: taking on Trump is a pocketbook issue. His tariffs will increase the price of materials we need to build housing. They will threaten our food supply, hitting all of us at the grocery store. His disastrous budget will raise health care costs for millions of Americans. A key step to bringing down costs for families is stopping Donald Trump and his harmful policies that move us in the exact wrong direction. California’s next governor needs to do both: stand up to Trump and take action to reduce costs. And, she needs to understand how these two issues are related and be able to explain it to people. Look, I wish it weren’t this way. I wish President Trump actually kept his promise to make life more affordable for Americans. I won’t hold my breath. As long as he continues on this course of destabilizing our economy and hurting working families, I’m going to keep speaking up and pushing back. —Katie Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: F*ck Chuck Schumer
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Yesterday, Senate Minority Leader Sen. Chuck Schumer handed the keys to
Donald Trump and Elon Musk to destroy our most basic economic needs and
social services.

Instead of standing up to Trump and Musk by blocking the GOP’s disastrous
funding bill, Schumer publicly announced he would give in and vote for it
without a fight, which is exactly what he did.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250315?refcode=em20250315-36506&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36506_1203867_X1v8-z&akid=36506%2E1203867%2EX1v8-z ]Tweet by Summer Lee: This is a signal to the American people that
Democrats will not fight for them. We have to be using our votes for
leverage right now. To protect the social services folks are asking us to.
To invest in our communities. Otherwise Republicans will just keep running
us over. Tweet by CNN: Democratic leader Chuck Schumer has announced that
he will vote to keep the government open, signaling a path to averting a
shutdown.

F*ck Chuck Schumer. He is utterly unfit to lead us in this critical moment
against Republicans’ corporate coup, and that has always been clear. Even
15 years ago, Schumer accounted for 15% of all Wall Street donations to
Congress.

The American people are livid and rightfully so: these feckless corporate
Democrats have proven time and time again that they cannot lead this Party
forward. It's time to clean up shop and primary these spineless
establishment leaders with real champions and fighters for the working
class.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250315?refcode=em20250315-36506&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36506_1203867_X1v8-z&akid=36506%2E1203867%2EX1v8-z ]That’s exactly what we plan to do in the 2026 Democratic primary
elections. Directly fund our work to recruit and support progressive
challengers by rushing $5 or whatever you can afford today.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250315?refcode=em20250315-36506&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36506_1203867_X1v8-z&akid=36506%2E1203867%2EX1v8-z ]Contribute $5

If Schumer and other do-nothing Democrats won’t fight for us, we’ll run
working-class candidates against them who will.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250315-36506-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36506_1203867_X1v8-z&akid=36506%2E1203867%2EX1v8-z

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36506%2E1203867%2EX1v8-z

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: These New German Hearing Aids are Crushing the Market
