name: News Team @ Our Revolution
subject: Grassroots uprising on Capitol Hill, Fighting Musk in Wisconsin, Trump's War on Workers, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

NEWS FROM THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Fight Oligarchy with Bernie | Trump’s War on Workers | Capitol
Hill Action: Stop the Cuts! | Save the EPA | The Battle vs Musk in
Wisconsin | New Endorsements! | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

Bernie is packing arenas in red districts across the Midwest on his Fight
Oligarchy Tour — showing the power of the people and a blueprint for a
unified opposition to Elon Musk and the Trump Regime.

"Yes, the oligarchs are enormously powerful,” Bernie told the crowd. “But,
from the bottom of my heart, I am convinced that they can be beaten."
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22527?t=1011&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]Get the sticker and help Fight Oligarchy!

★ ★ ★

The Trump Regime is unleashing vicious attacks on crucial social programs,
vulnerable communities, our very democracy, and the planet. It can feel
overwhelming, but we are not powerless — and we are not alone.

Our 2025 Plan is to mobilize a Citizen Army of grassroots activists to
fight back against Trump and the Oligarchs, seize the reins of the
Democratic Party from the corporate elite, and elect the next generation
of leaders in key down-ballot races across the country. Read about how
we’re carrying out our work below!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21444?t=1012&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]It’s up to us to create a well-organized and effective opposition to
the Trump regime. We are not powerless in this moment, but we need your
help! Please pitch in a donation to help fund our fightback.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Our founder Bernie Sanders is packing arenas in Republican districts
across the Midwest on his Fight Oligarchy Tour — and we love to see it!

As Eric Lutz wrote this week in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22528?t=1013&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]Vanity Fair: “Trump won over many
'forgotten' Americans merely by acknowledging their malaise, even as he
and his plutocratic allies loot the nation’s institutions and aggravate
the problems already facing its citizens.”

After speaking with Our Revolution leader Joseph Geevarghese, Lutz said
that “winning back poor and working class voters in the long term—and
combating the ascendent MAGA movement more immediately—may require
Democratic leadership capable of actually confronting that
disillusionment.”

“To fight a false populist like Trump,” as Geevarghese put it, “you need a
real populist.”

★ ★ ★

TAKING ON TRUMP’S WAR ON TRUTH

On National Protect Public Media Day, Our Revolution joined with the Free
Press, ACLU, and NPR workers who are union members (NABET-CWA) to rally at
NPR HQ.

The Trump Regime and its allies are escalating their attacks on the media,
pushing dangerous policies that threaten NPR, PBS, and independent
journalism.

Elon Musk and Project 2025 are advocating for defunding the Corporation
for Public Broadcasting. Trump’s new FCC chief, Brendan Carr, swiftly
launched an investigation into NPR and PBS.

Meanwhile, Sen. Mike Lee and Rep. Claudia Tenney introduced the Defund NPR
Act. These efforts are not about fiscal responsibility—they are about
silencing dissent, controlling information, and suppressing the truth.

Trump has long demonized the press, branding journalists as “the enemy of
the people,” suing major media outlets, and restricting access to
independent reporters.

His administration is undermining fact-based news in favor of
billionaire-owned platforms and right-wing propaganda machines like Fox
News and Sinclair Broadcasting.

Our Revolution and our allies are going to keep mobilizing to pressure
every elected official to defend public media and the free press. We
refuse to allow the silencing of independent voices and the dismantling of
journalistic integrity.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22529?t=1014&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]SIGN THE PETITION

★ ★ ★

Speaking of free speech, Progressives are condemning the detention of
Palestinian activist and U.S. green card-holder Mahmoud Khalil, who led
campus protests at Columbia University last year to demand the U.S. end
its support for the Israeli war machine.

As the Trump Regime weaponizes the government against its enemies, Our
Revolution is calling on Democrats to unite in denouncing this chilling
crack-down on free speech.

“This is about the right to protest and to dissent,” Our Revolution leader
Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22530?t=1015&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]The Hill. “Trump is testing the limits of the
law, but also of the opposition.”

★ ★ ★

ON CAPITOL HILL: STOP THE CUTS!

This week, Our Revolution’s volunteer-led Citizen Action Team conducted
lobby visits on Capitol Hill to deliver postcards from progressive voters
to Senators, including John Fetterman (PA), Elissa Slotkin (MI) and
others.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22531?t=1016&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]WATCH VIDEO HERE!

Our Message: Stand-up to Trump & Musk and Protect our Benefits! Here are
examples of a few of the constituent postcards we delivered to AZ Senators
Mark Kelly and Ruben Gallego:

"I'm worried about my Social Security. I also have cancer and can't afford
to lose Medicare," said Michelle in Coolidge, AZ.

Glenda in Phoenix said she will be impacted by "Medicaid cuts and fears
the freezing of income driven payment plans for student loans."

"I’m a veteran who utilizes the VA for my healthcare. I'm scared," said
Rebecca in Mesa, AZ.

★ ★ ★

SAVE THE EPA!

On Friday, Our Revolution activists rallied with allies outside the
Environmental Protection Agency to protest Trump’s war on our climate.

Trump's new EPA head Lee Zeldin just issued 31 "reconsiderations" of EPA
rules that protect our air, water, and climate, calling it “the greatest
day of deregulation our nation has seen,” and adding, "We are driving a
dagger straight into the heart of the climate change religion.”

We know that this is a top priority for our members, and we are taking
action with a powerful coalition of groups to protect people and the
planet under this regime.

Our Revolution hosted our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21530?t=1017&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]LIVE Climate Town Hall with Sunrise Movement,
Public Citizen, Friends of the Earth and others to hone in on
opportunities we can leverage to block the worst of Trump and the Oil
Oligarchs’ agenda.

We also [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21532?t=1018&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]Rallied on Capitol Hill with Bernie Sanders, Ilhan Omar and our
Coalition to End Polluter Handouts to launch a fight to stop our tax
dollars from funding climate destruction. This is where Elon Musk should
make cuts!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21444?t=1019&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]If you can, chip in a donation of any amount to help fund our climate
fightback against Trump and the Oil Oligarchs. Thank you!

★ ★ ★

STOPPING TRUMP’S WAR ON WORKERS

Our Revolution Organizing Call Recap: The Fight for Workers’ Rights
Intensifies

On our latest organizing call, we heard from powerful voices on the
frontlines of the fight against corporate greed and attacks on labor
rights.

Former NLRB General Counsel Jennifer Abruzzo - who Trump fired - laid out
how we’re battling on all fronts, including against Elon Musk’s claims
that the NLRB is unconstitutional.

As Our Revolution Board Chair and former CWA President Larry Cohen put it,
“We’ll be fighting in the courts, in the streets, and in Congress.”

Mark Dimondstein, President of the American Postal Workers Union, warned
about the growing threat of privatization, pointing out that Musk recently
told investors that “everything should be privatized,” including the U.S.
Postal Service.

“Privatization is a mathematical equation—shifting public money to Wall
Street investors for maximum profit, not service,” Dimondstein said. The
administration’s corporate coup is hollowing out essential services,
paving the way for billionaires to cash in while degrading workers'
rights.

Former Secretary of the Department of Labor Julie Su underscored that this
isn’t just about budget cuts — it’s an all-out war on working people. “If
they want to wage a war on workers, we’re built for that fight,” she
declared.

U.S. Rep. Rosa DeLauro (CT-3) reminded us of the stakes, warning that
Trump and Musk aim to roll back key labor protections, from wage theft
enforcement to OSHA oversight, while dismantling the Department of Labor
entirely. “We have to keep raising the temperature,” she urged. “Congress
reacts to external pressure — your advocacy is critical.”

With the administration pushing executive orders to seize institutions and
slash protections, the fight has never been more urgent. But we have
power, and will not sit this out.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22532?t=1020&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]TELL CONGRESS: FIGHT FOR WORKERS

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

WISCONSIN SUPREME COURT RACE

All eyes are on the Wisconsin Supreme Court race, where Elon Musk is
spending millions thinking he can just buy this crucial seat.

We’re going all out to elect Susan Crawford as the court majority hangs in
the balance — which will decide cases on free and fair elections, voting
rights, abortion rights, corporate power, and more.

It’s all hands on deck — Bernie rallied our movement in Wisconsin last
weekend and Our Revolution is ramping up our Get Out the Vote by April
1st. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22533?t=1021&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]Pitch in a donation to help fund our voter turnout operation!

If we don’t stop Musk in Wisconsin, he’ll think he’s free to steamroll our
elections. Musk has already announced that he’ll give Trump’s political
operation ANOTHER $100 million.

Musk may have money, but this race can be won on people power. Our
Revolution has 60,000 voter contacts in Wisconsin, and our teams are
calling, texting, and emailing each of them to get to the polls.

Early voting starts on Tuesday, so it's time to get to work! Sign up to
make some calls with our phonebank force, and help defeat Musk and prevent
a far-right majority on the WI Supreme Court.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22534?t=1022&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]WISCONSIN PHONE BANKS

★ ★ ★

ST. LOUIS ELECTION

Now’s our chance to build on the progressive governing majority our
movement has helped elect in St. Louis in recent cycles! Early voting
starts March 25 and runs through Election Day April 8th.

We’re endorsing Anne Schweitzer for Board of Alders Ward 1. Since her
election in 2021, Anne has been a champion for raising wages, clean water,
better housing, safety and more.

With her background in environmental studies and non-profit work, we know
she will work hard to deliver for people and the planet — and the City of
St. Louis!

As Anne said: “St. Louis is a great city, not ‘was’ but ‘is,’ and it’s our
job to make it even better.”

We’re also excited to support Rebecca McCloud for St. Louis Board (Ward
11). Rebecca beat out the competition in the primary last month as a
fighter for poor and working people.

With her focus on economic development, mental health, and better food
systems, Rebecca will be a great partner in the effort to deliver for the
people of St. Louis.

And, Our Revolution is endorsing Alisha Sonnier for St. Louis Board (Ward
7). Alisha has been a true fighter for working people in the city,
championing youth and family empowerment, equitable development, and
housing as a human right.

Our progressive bloc in St. Louis - led by Board of Alders President and
Our Revolution Board Member Megan Green - have already successfully pushed
initiatives for labor, wages, direct democracy, universal basic income and
more. Let’s keep it going!

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution is backing Teri Castillo in the City Council race in San
Antonio, Texas.

Teri is a community organizer running a people-powered campaign to
represent District 5 and ensure that public money works for the people of
San Antonio.

Since taking office, Castillo has brought historic investment to the
people of District 5 and prioritized preserving and building affordable
housing, while moving with urgency to meet the city’s climate goals.

★ ★ ★

Congrats to Aisha Braveboy on her primary win in the race for Prince
George County in Maryland!

Aisha is a champion for higher wages, criminal justice reform, and
preserving our environment — and we need fighters like her at every level
of government.

It's local leaders like Aisha who will help make our communities more
resilient under Trump.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22535?t=1023&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]DONATE TO FUND OUR ELECTION WORK

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

We surveyed more than 3,000 Our Revolution members, and 28% say they’re
already being impacted by Trump’s actions. Another 60% expect to be
affected as Trump targets Medicaid, SNAP, and other programs.

90% said the response of Democratic leadership has been weak,
disappointing, or unacceptable. Just 3% are very confident Dem leaders
will do what’s necessary to fight back against Trump's dangerous policies
effectively.

So many are being hurt in real time — we can’t afford for Democrats to
“play dead” and wait for Trump to fail — as consultants like James
Carville suggest.

That’s why Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team of 57,000+ activists
nationwide is pushing back. We’re delivering your responses directly to
the members of Congress who need to hear what folks in their districts are
experiencing.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22536?t=1024&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]TAKE THE SURVEY

★ ★ ★

With our impact on the direction of new DNC leadership, we now have a
foothold to push for real change in the party.

So far, more than 10,000 grassroots volunteers, donors and local leaders
have signed on demanding these necessary reforms. It’s time for the
Democratic Party to reject corporate money, increase transparency and
rebuild a multiracial, working-class base.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21147?t=1025&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]SIGN THE PETITION

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is 57,000 activists strong and
growing, and they’re taking action in the streets and in the halls of
power to fight the worst of the Trump regime.

Our grassroots army is mobilizing and mounting pressure campaigns to
protect Medicaid, public media, the right to dissent, the EPA, worker
rights, and much more.

We need every person of conscience to get involved. There's something
everyone can do to help, big or small. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20584?t=1026&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]Sign up to be part of the
Citizen Action Team, and we’ll loop you in on our next meeting!

★ ★ ★

On Thursday, March 20th, we’ll be taking action with the American Postal
Workers Union to defend the US Postal Service, which is under attack.

The Trump Admin wants to privatize this critical public service and
handover the reins to for-profit corporations like FedEx or UPS. We’ll be
joining members of the American Postal Workers Union for a nationwide Day
of Action to Tell Trump: The US Mail is NOT for Sale!

If you’re in the Washington, D.C. area, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22537?t=1027&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]RSVP here to join us on March
20th to Protect the Post Office!

And, here’s the national map for folks to join the actions happening
around the country: [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22538?t=1028&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]apwu.org/day-of-action

★ ★ ★

As Bernie draws massive crowds in his Fight Oligarchy Tour through the
Midwest, our Citizen Action Team is organizing thousands of activists in
D.C. and across the country.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/19903?t=1029&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]When you pick up this new sticker and other great merch in the Our
Revolution store, you’re helping to power actions and pressure campaigns
to block the worst of the Trump agenda. Thank you.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17429?t=1030&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=revreport._Ro8z9&t=1007&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=revreport.T4WXik&t=1008&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=revreport.Wps0N4&t=1009&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=revreport.HCFlph&t=1010&akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=7852%2E5885482%2E4OVU0F

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

I'm scared," said Rebecca in Mesa, AZ. ★ ★ ★ SAVE THE EPA! On Friday, Our Revolution activists rallied with allies outside the Environmental Protection Agency to protest Trump’s war on our climate. Trump's new EPA head Lee Zeldin just issued 31 "reconsiderations" of EPA rules that protect our air, water, and climate, calling it “the greatest day of deregulation our nation has seen,” and adding, "We are driving a dagger straight into the heart of the climate change religion.” We know that this is a top priority for our members, and we are taking action with a powerful coalition of groups to protect people and the planet under this regime. Our Revolution hosted our [ ]LIVE Climate Town Hall with Sunrise Movement, Public Citizen, Friends of the Earth and others to hone in on opportunities we can leverage to block the worst of Trump and the Oil Oligarchs’ agenda. We also [ ]Rallied on Capitol Hill with Bernie Sanders, Ilhan Omar and our Coalition to End Polluter Handouts to launch a fight to stop our tax dollars from funding climate destruction. This is where Elon Musk should make cuts! [ ]If you can, chip in a donation of any amount to help fund our climate fightback against Trump and the Oil Oligarchs. Thank you! ★ ★ ★ STOPPING TRUMP’S WAR ON WORKERS Our Revolution Organizing Call Recap: The Fight for Workers’ Rights Intensifies On our latest organizing call, we heard from powerful voices on the frontlines of the fight against corporate greed and attacks on labor rights. Former NLRB General Counsel Jennifer Abruzzo - who Trump fired - laid out how we’re battling on all fronts, including against Elon Musk’s claims that the NLRB is unconstitutional. As Our Revolution Board Chair and former CWA President Larry Cohen put it, “We’ll be fighting in the courts, in the streets, and in Congress.” Mark Dimondstein, President of the American Postal Workers Union, warned about the growing threat of privatization, pointing out that Musk recently told investors that “everything should be privatized,” including the U.S. Postal Service. “Privatization is a mathematical equation—shifting public money to Wall Street investors for maximum profit, not service,” Dimondstein said. The administration’s corporate coup is hollowing out essential services, paving the way for billionaires to cash in while degrading workers' rights. Former Secretary of the Department of Labor Julie Su underscored that this isn’t just about budget cuts — it’s an all-out war on working people. “If they want to wage a war on workers, we’re built for that fight,” she declared. U.S. Rep. Rosa DeLauro (CT-3) reminded us of the stakes, warning that Trump and Musk aim to roll back key labor protections, from wage theft enforcement to OSHA oversight, while dismantling the Department of Labor entirely. “We have to keep raising the temperature,” she urged. “Congress reacts to external pressure — your advocacy is critical.” With the administration pushing executive orders to seize institutions and slash protections, the fight has never been more urgent. But we have power, and will not sit this out. [ ]TELL CONGRESS: FIGHT FOR WORKERS ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ WISCONSIN SUPREME COURT RACE All eyes are on the Wisconsin Supreme Court race, where Elon Musk is spending millions thinking he can just buy this crucial seat. We’re going all out to elect Susan Crawford as the court majority hangs in the balance — which will decide cases on free and fair elections, voting rights, abortion rights, corporate power, and more. It’s all hands on deck — Bernie rallied our movement in Wisconsin last weekend and Our Revolution is ramping up our Get Out the Vote by April 1st. [ ]Pitch in a donation to help fund our voter turnout operation! If we don’t stop Musk in Wisconsin, he’ll think he’s free to steamroll our elections. Musk has already announced that he’ll give Trump’s political operation ANOTHER $100 million. Musk may have money, but this race can be won on people power. Our Revolution has 60,000 voter contacts in Wisconsin, and our teams are calling, texting, and emailing each of them to get to the polls. Early voting starts on Tuesday, so it's time to get to work! Sign up to make some calls with our phonebank force, and help defeat Musk and prevent a far-right majority on the WI Supreme Court. [ ]WISCONSIN PHONE BANKS ★ ★ ★ ST. LOUIS ELECTION Now’s our chance to build on the progressive governing majority our movement has helped elect in St. Louis in recent cycles! Early voting starts March 25 and runs through Election Day April 8th. We’re endorsing Anne Schweitzer for Board of Alders Ward 1. Since her election in 2021, Anne has been a champion for raising wages, clean water, better housing, safety and more. With her background in environmental studies and non-profit work, we know she will work hard to deliver for people and the planet — and the City of St. Louis! As Anne said: “St. Louis is a great city, not ‘was’ but ‘is,’ and it’s our job to make it even better.” We’re also excited to support Rebecca McCloud for St. Louis Board (Ward 11). Rebecca beat out the competition in the primary last month as a fighter for poor and working people. With her focus on economic development, mental health, and better food systems, Rebecca will be a great partner in the effort to deliver for the people of St. Louis. And, Our Revolution is endorsing Alisha Sonnier for St. Louis Board (Ward 7). Alisha has been a true fighter for working people in the city, championing youth and family empowerment, equitable development, and housing as a human right. Our progressive bloc in St. Louis - led by Board of Alders President and Our Revolution Board Member Megan Green - have already successfully pushed initiatives for labor, wages, direct democracy, universal basic income and more. Let’s keep it going! ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution is backing Teri Castillo in the City Council race in San Antonio, Texas. Teri is a community organizer running a people-powered campaign to represent District 5 and ensure that public money works for the people of San Antonio. Since taking office, Castillo has brought historic investment to the people of District 5 and prioritized preserving and building affordable housing, while moving with urgency to meet the city’s climate goals. ★ ★ ★ Congrats to Aisha Braveboy on her primary win in the race for Prince George County in Maryland! Aisha is a champion for higher wages, criminal justice reform, and preserving our environment — and we need fighters like her at every level of government. It's local leaders like Aisha who will help make our communities more resilient under Trump. [ ]DONATE TO FUND OUR ELECTION WORK ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ We surveyed more than 3,000 Our Revolution members, and 28% say they’re already being impacted by Trump’s actions. Another 60% expect to be affected as Trump targets Medicaid, SNAP, and other programs. 90% said the response of Democratic leadership has been weak, disappointing, or unacceptable. Just 3% are very confident Dem leaders will do what’s necessary to fight back against Trump's dangerous policies effectively. So many are being hurt in real time — we can’t afford for Democrats to “play dead” and wait for Trump to fail — as consultants like James Carville suggest. That’s why Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team of 57,000+ activists nationwide is pushing back. We’re delivering your responses directly to the members of Congress who need to hear what folks in their districts are experiencing. [ ]TAKE THE SURVEY ★ ★ ★ With our impact on the direction of new DNC leadership, we now have a foothold to push for real change in the party. So far, more than 10,000 grassroots volunteers, donors and local leaders have signed on demanding these necessary reforms. It’s time for the Democratic Party to reject corporate money, increase transparency and rebuild a multiracial, working-class base. [ ]SIGN THE PETITION ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is 57,000 activists strong and growing, and they’re taking action in the streets and in the halls of power to fight the worst of the Trump regime. Our grassroots army is mobilizing and mounting pressure campaigns to protect Medicaid, public media, the right to dissent, the EPA, worker rights, and much more. We need every person of conscience to get involved. There's something everyone can do to help, big or small. [ ]Sign up to be part of the Citizen Action Team, and we’ll loop you in on our next meeting! ★ ★ ★ On Thursday, March 20th, we’ll be taking action with the American Postal Workers Union to defend the US Postal Service, which is under attack. The Trump Admin wants to privatize this critical public service and handover the reins to for-profit corporations like FedEx or UPS. We’ll be joining members of the American Postal Workers Union for a nationwide Day of Action to Tell Trump: The US Mail is NOT for Sale! If you’re in the Washington, D.C. area, [ ]RSVP here to join us on March 20th to Protect the Post Office! And, here’s the national map for folks to join the actions happening around the country: [ ]apwu.org/day-of-action ★ ★ ★ As Bernie draws massive crowds in his Fight Oligarchy Tour through the Midwest, our Citizen Action Team is organizing thousands of activists in D.C. and across the country. [ ]When you pick up this new sticker and other great merch in the Our Revolution store, you’re helping to power actions and pressure campaigns to block the worst of the Trump agenda. Thank you. ★ ★ ★ [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! [ ]GIVE MONTHLY [ ]GIVE ONCE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

It feels like being a canary in the coal mine. We’re facing unprecedented threats like never before.
* For the first time in 20 years, registered Republicans are gaining in voter registration numbers over Democrats.
* Our most recent races in Nevada have been won on razor-thin margins. It’s getting too close for comfort.
* An emboldened Elon Musk and other far-right billionaires are going to throw hundreds of millions into upcoming elections to hold control. I just know they have their sights set on Nevada.

**[_This cannot wait. We have to hit our fundraising goals to fund our organizing programs _right now_ and we have a HUGE deadline ahead of us. Please, friend — chip in to NV Dems before it’s too late._](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTbtcn8ul2k_5rrmCv1cLH1A-s4mvbf335n0eizg1v-1hy7RteFnY1ObH0T3UEUIhLtGdYONa6xXRBeTUcd2tszLZRvAC25-06K1zjxozSYPMxfwKKTS3dOuH7x4V7a9JXbPwDrOlN9U3Ded4CeTiya9KC1GwMCKNuiRKZfVF5hD69xVxvL9q6JziQx1T7_x6faETAGaj7YOEPyaGR62GXB9i70HC3ODVt4xeL6oIDtThSW1gDzHoAtPC5FgKuYEzzs4RrGGVJJyCyBaG0jto6WiwRwerP0S2cHXMa_T3N1KF6sGLjViDL47esghXGoRcL/4et/_09smwClQaiJdsaoQoOfJQ/h6/h001.BUIsufIXzVMYwvQx-RFE3ulaXgMBSEZPiv1xWL6PI9M)**

— Hilary

| **About the Republican Party of Florida**
* * *
The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.

We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America.

Members of the Republican Party of Florida will be united by these principles and will work to elect Floridians with integrity who will work to enact such solutions. We will seek to be the most effective state party in the nation and serve as a model for other party organizations.

Members of the Republican Party of Florida will be united by these principles and will work to elect Floridians with integrity who will work to enact such solutions. We will seek to be the most effective state party in the nation and serve as a model for other party organizations. | PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF FLORIDA. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. name: Josh Harder
subject: I’m very frustrated
body:
My thoughts on yesterday’s budget vote

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103920193/533680999/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDMzMmNlMGItYzIwMS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=x4g87yx5MZ2rEYJUkvv9UqYVSf3Vgb5zjBkqTPjjsm4=) | Peter, I’ll be honest, this week I’ve been incredibly frustrated with Democrats in D.C. We are facing historically large challenges with Trump in the White House, **and yet this week Chuck Schumer folded.** I don’t often call specific colleagues out and that’s intentional. My goal is to get things done, not be a flame thrower. However right now as I write this, I genuinely can’t believe Democrats messed this budget fight up so badly. I voted NO on the budget because I cannot in good conscience vote for a bill that gives Trump even MORE power. What are we doing here folks?? As the minority party, we Democrats don’t have many opportunities to legislatively push back against the damage Trump is causing. THIS was the time to take a stand. To call their bluff. To actually fight back with the power we DO have! I’m begging my fellow democrats: please get organized, get unified, and get louder! Thanks for listening. We have to do better to fight back. Josh
---
* * *
You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene. subject: How we can keep pace with our organizing plans

body:
#
As an organization that relies on grassroots donations, some months we’re reaching fundraising goals early on, and other months we’re working to catch up. In full transparency, we’re working on catching up right now.
But through it all, we’re proud to be powered by real people who believe in the work we’re doing.
Our average donation this year so far is just $18.88. Here’s a screenshot right from our ActBlue account:
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250315.UwPsDq&refcode=ema20250315-240030&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=240030%2E444211%2EDDbt5p)

Together,

name: Indiana Democrats
subject: BREAKING: Meet our new leadership team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, Our State Central Committee just finished meeting today in Indianapolis, and **Former State Senator Karen Tallian** was elected to lead the Indiana Democratic Party as Chair for the next four years. **[Would you rush a donation to our rebuilding fund to help our new Chair hit the ground running?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103920204/533681068/1764064610?refcode=250315tallian&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjViMmQ3Ny1jMjAxLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oMvEyS2aorKoJGDoXi2AVP6wBzc_3xkAOI5dXZAo2iU=)** **Here is the full leadership team that our SCC elected today:
Chair: Karen Tallian
Vice Chair: Alex Nyirendah
Secretary: Erin Retif
Treasurer: Michael Griffin** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103920205/533681069/1764064610?refcode=250315tallian&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjViMmQ3Ny1jMjAxLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oMvEyS2aorKoJGDoXi2AVP6wBzc_3xkAOI5dXZAo2iU=) **This is an exciting moment for the future of our party.** We now have the team that will lead us into a crucial election year in 2026 where we will have the chance to make significant gains in our state legislature, defeat Diego Morales, and retake the U.S. House of Representatives. We know Hoosiers deserve so much better than what 20-straight years of Republican rule has brought to our state. **[That’s why it’s so important this new team has the resources needed to go to every corner of our state and spread our message of better healthcare, stronger public schools, and transparency in state government. Your monetary support today will help make this vision a reality.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103920206/533681070/1764064610?refcode=250315tallian&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjViMmQ3Ny1jMjAxLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oMvEyS2aorKoJGDoXi2AVP6wBzc_3xkAOI5dXZAo2iU=)** Thanks for your continued support,

body:

Last Congress, Sen. Schumer introduced a stunning bill that would have reigned in Donald Trump’s power and held him accountable for his many crimes.

But, it hasn’t been reintroduced yet... so we need to show OVERWHELMING support for Congress re-introducing this bill to add in more checks and balances for Donald Trump.

**On this week 's recap**--why your support matters to me, the Qasim Rashid Show Episode 162, ICE abducts and disappears Mahmoud Khalil, Netanyahu violates ceasefire and continues to bomb Gaza, we ask whether America needs a new Democratic Party or a new third party, Meta increases censorship to protect fascism, and why Chuck Schumer must resign.
**Let 's dive into our weekly recap of **_**Let 's Address This with Qasim Rashid**_**.**
**If you 're enjoying the value Let's Address This provides, please consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..XChTS1NI31BTDCefOPvQJ_ikmzkQUbLKN2WZEfB9aXA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=158877416)
* * *
## Call to Action - PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS
The House is set to vote on the deceptively named "SAVE ACT." Deceptively named because it will gut voting rights, and could restrict more than 21 million American citizens from voting. We need at least 1000 emails to Congress from the Let's Address This network. Take 20 seconds, click below, and Demand Congress Reject the SAVE Act.
[DEMAND CONGRESS REJECT SAVE ACT](https://substack.com/redirect/85c1cd50-6529-4dbd-a61d-a070a62e67fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Once you've sent your email, please share the above link with your network, and ask them to raise their voice too. Let's protect voting rights for all citizens in this country.
* * *
## This Week's Articles and Podcasts
* **Sunday:**[Why Your Support Matters To Me](https://substack.com/redirect/b4319efe-ed65-41fc-90b9-7cfbab40377a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): My sincere ask of you to complete one, two, or all three calls to action I list here (but hopefully at least one CTA)
* **Monday:**[The Qasim Rashid Show Episode 162](https://substack.com/redirect/c4d54b03-a3e5-443a-ba2f-4cbf490c4500?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Women's history, how men have (and continue to) oppress women's equality, and the groundwork for war crimes
* **Monday:** [ICE Abducts & Disappears Mahmoud Khalil](https://substack.com/redirect/32e17ddf-0a1d-4113-b87b-aa2c3f7eface?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Here's the latest and the petition to demand the release of US Green Card holder Mahmoud Khalil
* **Tuesday:** [Despite Ceasefire, Netanyahu Continues to Bomb & Starve Gaza](https://substack.com/redirect/92c38f4a-1f45-4f96-9170-fed7e5ee0449?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): How you can help provide meaningful support Palestinian civilians in dire need
* **Wednesday:** [America Needs A New Democratic Party or a Third Party?](https://substack.com/redirect/34548201-4f40-4a1e-b932-01e890887fe8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Former Rep Marie Newman & I explore a question too many seem too afraid to ask
* **Thursday:**[Meta Increases Censorship to Protect Fascism](https://substack.com/redirect/b778d7cb-958d-4a0d-8de6-9a248e62004d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): As billionaires submit to right wing ideology, we need new media strategies to stay informed
* **Friday:**[Chuck Schumer Must Resign & Dems Must Change or Be Abandoned](https://substack.com/redirect/2879c962-43f5-49ec-9a22-fbf3d5d1e598?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): The current Democratic Party is not built to fight fascism--we cannot sit idly by
* **BONUS CONTENT**
* [Live with former Congresswoman Marie Newman on do we need a third party?](https://substack.com/redirect/1d52c493-21f2-4e13-b695-5fe93f1287b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [Live with Poverty Lawyer Salaam Bhatti on the collapse of our Republic](https://substack.com/redirect/31978909-973e-452f-9de9-0f403c13af25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I’m accountable to the people, not billionaires and their lobbyists.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I’m so grateful that I can count on grassroots supporters like you to power this campaign.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250315-4853-footer&t=1&akid=4853%2E420207%2EiI3NO6)
Hi Peter, it's Pramila.
Tonight at midnight is our campaign’s mid-month fundraising deadline, and we’re about $3,400 away from the $10,000 goal we set. [**Can you make a $3 donation at this link to help us close the gap?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250315?refcode=em20250315-4853&amount=3&refcode2=4853_420207_iI3NO6&akid=4853%2E420207%2EiI3NO6)
**The poll numbers are starting to shift against Republicans, and we need to keep the pressure on.**
Since all of our fundraising numbers will become public after the end of March, it’s important that we have as strong a report as possible to show the enduring strength of our movement. And that’s where your donations come in.
I’m proud to have been one of the first members of Congress to refuse corporate PAC money, and I’m so grateful that I can count on grassroots supporters like you to power this campaign instead.
It means I’m accountable to the people — not billionaires and their lobbyists.
[**So Peter, if you want to help send a message to Trump, Elon, and every Republican in Congress, please pitch in $3 or whatever you can before midnight to help us reach our goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250315?refcode=em20250315-4853&amount=3&refcode2=4853_420207_iI3NO6&akid=4853%2E420207%2EiI3NO6)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250315?amount=3&refcode=em20250315-4853&refcode2=4853_420207_iI3NO6&akid=4853%2E420207%2EiI3NO6)**
Together,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250315-4853-footer&t=2&refcode2=4853_420207_iI3NO6&akid=4853%2E420207%2EiI3NO6)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4853%2E420207%2EiI3NO6)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4853%2E420207%2EiI3NO6)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Team McBride
subject: Reminder about our big FEC deadline ⏰
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Everyone will be looking to these numbers as a signal for how voters are feeling right now.
#
Happy Saturday!
We’re just reaching out to remind you about the big FEC deadline we’re facing at the end of this month. After March is over, Sarah and every other member of Congress will publicly report their fundraising numbers for the first time since Trump and his crew of billionaire buddies took office. ⏰
**_Everyone_ will be looking to those numbers as a signal for how voters are feeling right now — including Republicans who have the power to sink Trump’s agenda.**
But Sarah doesn’t need convincing. From the chaotic tariff situation to DOGE’s effort to gut the federal government so billionaires can get a tax break, she knows how dangerous and unpopular this administration’s actions are.
In order to prove it, though, we’ve set a big fundraising goal for the first quarter. And to stay on track to meet it, **we need to raise another $2,000 by midnight tonight.**
[**If you want to show MAGA Republicans just how unpopular their agenda is, will you pitch in $5 right now to help us reach this goal and keep Sarah focused on fighting for Delawareans in Congress?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250315-1?refcode=em20250315-1822&amount=5&refcode2=1822_21716_QDykgL&akid=1822%2E21716%2EQDykgL)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250315-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250315-1822&refcode2=1822_21716_QDykgL&akid=1822%2E21716%2EQDykgL)**
Thank you for your support,
Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250315-1&t=1&refcode2=1822_21716_QDykgL&akid=1822%2E21716%2EQDykgL)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1822%2E21716%2EQDykgL)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1822%2E21716%2EQDykgL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1822%2E21716%2EQDykgL)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

clean_body: We’re counting on you to help us reach this goal. | Hi Peter, we’ll keep this email short. Our team has a mid-month fundraising deadline in a few hours, and we’re counting on you to help us reach this goal. The money we raise before our mid-month deadline will go directly toward advancing our collective work of building a stronger Oregon. When you chip in $5, $10, or $50, we can get just a bit more accomplished. Even if it’s just connecting with ONE more Oregonian, it makes an incredible impact. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks! — Tina for Oregon Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

[Can you chip in $10 right now to help us make up the difference? I can’t emphasize enough the importance of hitting every single financial benchmark right now. With Donald Trump and Republicans ramping up their attacks on everyday Americans, I need to make sure Team Ruiz has the resources we need to keep this movement at full speed.
I know you’re probably wondering why it’s so critical we have your support in March of an off-year, but now is when we lay the groundwork to flip the House blue next year so Dr. Ruiz can continue to deliver on the kitchen-table issues affecting you and your family every single day.
Republicans made HUGE gains in CA-25 last year, and they already have their eyes set on flipping Dr. Ruiz’s seat in 2026. When our numbers go public for the first time in two weeks, we need to send a message to Donald Trump that we have what it takes to go toe-to-toe with him and his MAGA megadonors.
[Dr. Ruiz is ready to keep fighting tooth and nail for you on the House floor, but he can't do it alone. The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

When our numbers go public for the first time in two weeks, we need to send a message to Donald Trump that we have what it takes to go toe-to-toe with him and his MAGA megadonors. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Caroline Finance Director, Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. Peter, Now is not the time for appeasement. National Republicans are forcing a spending bill that cuts the lifeblood of IL-17 with nothing in return but tax cuts for Elon Musk. I have and will continue to hold strong, on behalf of protecting services and shielding Illinoisans from reckless, dangerous cuts. And now, the Republicans’ campaign arm is trying to use my support of workers as an attack ad, filled with blatant lies. The only people I’m “costing” are the billionaires trying to shred our government for a massive heist of everyday Americans. I stand ready and united to vote with my House colleagues for a four-week funding extension that stops harmful cuts, keeps the government open, and allows Congress to work across the aisle for agreement. But that isn’t the headline that the NRCC wants. In fact, a huge piece of their strategy includes a _near-constant_ barrage of negative attacks in the media. I'm not surprised by these smears, and frankly, this changes absolutely nothing about my commitment to protecting working families. However, it’s clear they're using manipulation to try and pull the wool over the eyes of the American people, and attacks like these can’t go unchecked: [**We can't allow the GOP to control the narrative. **This is what happens when you enforce the law.** And now, Florida is going even further. In February, Governor DeSantis signed landmark legislation making Florida the model state for helping the Trump Administration combat illegal immigration. All of our state law enforcement agencies have entered 287(g) agreements with ICE to help our federal partners enforce immigration laws, including all 67 county sheriffs. name: Survey Dept. [Heritage Action]
subject: What government agency do you want to cut waste, fraud, and abuse from next?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l9eqhd0v66oytohxe2vk6atutt76wbidwa046b8buw5fr71c3gkbndu5bjyjs55t5ipxre29pf84xn4m5v&__stmp=st6fco&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st6fco&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dfsckfatk84tmdk1ehx3vvxr4clrjwjvecb6okldj8toj1wm6qrf70ik6p78zejcxljw70kua5hv9l4w9g6rw9iig09is3z1pemckto84cxevicte3ymoe1gjcpx7ou8elz3q3bov640ylte0apv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st6fco&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st6fco&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st6fco&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st6fco&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dfsckfatk84tmdk1ehx3vvxrqq1i5ohqwziy25pr3x37dom7iy2lpwpsoimk4qoetili7wqpcfbgy2gr2lmn6i6zuj2hp1k1mv5xelogt6zmggrag0bilda4yzzua61f59os6wooq7fc4ax2kofr&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st6fco&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st6fco&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
Can I count on your support?
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T84acb893-c1e9-4767-b1bb-01109dda643d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| Hi Peter, My name is Josh Harder - I’m a husband, a dad to Karina and Lillian, and a Democrat representing one of the most competitive seats in the country. My district was just named a “frontline” race in the upcoming election! [Here’s why I need you to split a donation between me and Blue Amp today:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T829dcfa5-e10e-49f9-88c8-069ed226dee7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
1. I’m one of only 13 Democrats representing a district that voted for Donald Trump in the last election! In fact, my district saw one of the largest swings from Biden to Trump in the entire country.

2. I have been extremely outspoken against MAGA extremism but that has made me one of their top targets. I expect Elon Musk to spend millions of dollars on attack ads against me this cycle.

3. My seat will determine whether Democrats can take back the House and put a legislative check on Trump. We need to end this chaos.

[I don’t take corporate PAC money, so I’m counting on the generosity of supporters like you to help fund our grassroots campaign. Will you consider splitting a donation between me and Blue Amp today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbee520dd-ba70-4c34-87fe-d9b2e695d4a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| | | | | It would mean the world to have your support in this competitive district. \- Josh

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T39781328-d429-4478-b2e0-6d009285a874/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

For example, he has: ✅ **Fought Trump’s unlawful attempts to redefine citizenship using executive orders**. He even co-sponsored the Born in the USA Act, which seeks to prevent any government funds from being used to enforce such an unconstitutional order. ✅ **Defended social programs** , including by opposing Trump’s budget proposal that threatens Medicaid to fund tax cuts for billionaires. ✅ **Demanded accountability for the Trump Administration’s wasteful release of water from California’s Central Valley dams** — a move that had no real impact on firefighting ability in Los Angeles and put communities at risk. ✅ Introduced an amendment to the Fair Labor Standards Amendment which seeks to **allow truckers to earn fair overtime wages.** _And this is just all in the last two months._ We know that the chaos of the Trump Administration is demoralizing and disheartening. We feel it too. But our California Strong leaders will never, **_ever_** stop fighting for us — both here in California and in Washington DC. **[This year we sent an expanded Democratic delegation to Congress because supporters like you invested in our always-on, Forever Organizing program. clean_body: More on being “California Strong” | = | Hey there, We know that the first weeks of the Trump Administration have been deeply demoralizing. But one of the big things keeping us inspired are the bold actions of our California Strong leaders like Senator Alex Padilla. = = = Senator Padilla is fighting for us in Washington, showing up for workers and standing up to Donald Trump’s oligarchical administration. For example, he has: ✅ Fought Trump’s unlawful attempts to redefine citizenship using executive orders. He even co-sponsored the Born in the USA Act, which seeks to prevent any government funds from being used to enforce such an unconstitutional order. ✅ Defended social programs , including by opposing Trump’s budget proposal that threatens Medicaid to fund tax cuts for billionaires. ✅ Demanded accountability for the Trump Administration’s wasteful release of water from California’s Central Valley dams — a move that had no real impact on firefighting ability in Los Angeles and put communities at risk. ✅ Introduced an amendment to the Fair Labor Standards Amendment which seeks to allow truckers to earn fair overtime wages. And this is just all in the last two months. We know that the chaos of the Trump Administration is demoralizing and disheartening. We feel it too. But our California Strong leaders will never, ever stop fighting for us — both here in California and in Washington DC. = = = = = = Thank you, \- The Democratic Party of California | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. clean_body: President Trump, Don Jr., & JD Vance have been trying to reach you. | | | | | Friend, are your notifications turned off? FIRST, Donald Trump Jr. reached out to you to take the Official MAGA Census, but you never responded. NEXT, JD Vance followed up, but you still haven’t responded. NOW, President Trump requested that we make a final email request because he loves you so much! Friend, this is your last chance to take the Official MAGA Census before we SHUT IT DOWN to finalize our internal records. There’s a reason we’re reaching out to you over anyone else in your hometown. Reaching out directly to grassroots leaders is expensive, so we can only afford to reach out to President Trump’s most reliable supporters. name: Becca Balint
subject: It’s time to take this “zombie law” off the books.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
Americans want the freedom to make decisions about their own bodies, and they want these freedoms guaranteed. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103924243/533692200/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250315_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzRhNGE5Yi1jYjAxLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-efq64fVi52d2Ax9BPECGgseq-qHk51An_qr9l46HrY=)
---
Peter, No matter how much Trump and other Republicans pretend their views are moderate, their actions tell us everything we need to know. Overturning Roe v. Wade was just the beginning. Now, Republicans are unearthing a decades-old law to further restrict and erode our reproductive rights. **The Comstock Act** — _passed more than 150 years ago_ — was the result of one man’s crusade against everything he deemed to be obscene, including “any article or thing designed or intended for the prevention of conception or procuring an abortion.” Project 2025 has been their outline for all the unconstitutional action they’ve taken since Trump returned to the White House. And Project 2025 outlines how they could misuse this outdated law to impose a nationwide ban on abortion and target providers and distributors of abortion medication. Republicans know that voters don’t support their crusade against abortion rights, so reviving this “zombie law” is the easiest path to get their way. It’s time we take immediate action to stop Republicans from abusing the Comstock Act to erode our reproductive rights. **That’s why I introduced the Stop Comstock Act, which would overturn this outdated and unconstitutional law and take it off the books.** **[Please sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of the Stop Comstock Act today to show my colleagues that voters support this bill and reproductive freedom.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103924244/533692201/-802146294?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250315_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzRhNGE5Yi1jYjAxLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-efq64fVi52d2Ax9BPECGgseq-qHk51An_qr9l46HrY=&emci=c74a4a9b-cb01-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d34a4a9b-cb01-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=43402272)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103924245/533692202/-802146294?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250315_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzRhNGE5Yi1jYjAxLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-efq64fVi52d2Ax9BPECGgseq-qHk51An_qr9l46HrY=&emci=c74a4a9b-cb01-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d34a4a9b-cb01-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=43402272)
---
This zombie bill is the right’s biggest weapon against reproductive rights, and your support for this bill will help us disarm them at a critical time.
Thank you,
— Becca
**[beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com](mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com)** | **Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
P.O. Box 291
Burlington, VT 05402
---

name: Tim Kaine
subject: How we can energize Democrats ahead of 2026 →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Friends,
This November, Virginians have the chance to send a powerful message.
We’re fighting to flip all three statewide offices blue — electing a Democratic governor, lieutenant governor, and attorney general — and to hold our slim majority in the House of Delegates.
The stakes couldn’t be higher.
Republican leadership in Virginia has mirrored the worst of the national GOP in recent years — attacks on reproductive rights, voting rights, public education, and more. We cannot afford to let them continue down this path.
Winning in Virginia is about more than just our state — it’s also about setting the tone for the 2026 midterms and beyond.
A big Democratic win here will show the country that voters are rejecting MAGA extremism and Trump-Musk lawlessness and standing up for democracy. It will energize our movement heading into the next critical election cycle, which we urgently need.
I’m committed to making sure we have the resources to win, but I need your help. If you can, chip in to support our efforts and help elect strong Democrats in Virginia. Every dollar we raise now helps us organize, mobilize, and get voters to the polls. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=500]
OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Virginia’s motto is “ Sic semper tyrannis ” — directly translated as “thus always to tyrants,” and a centuries-old rallying cry against tyranny and abuse of power.
Let’s send a loud and clear message in that spirit!
Thank you,
Tim Kaine

name: Gay Valimont
subject: Under Trump, the U.S. is an International Menace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
For decades, the United States has been the cornerstone of global democracy, a steadfast ally to Europe, and a leader in international security. But under Donald Trump’s leadership, that reputation is crumbling.
| For decades, the United States has been the cornerstone of global democracy, a steadfast ally to Europe, and a leader in international security. **But under Donald Trump’s leadership, that reputation is crumbling.**

Following Germany’s recent elections, Friedrich Merz, the leader of the Christian Democrats, made a shocking statement: _Europe must begin distancing itself from the U.S. because the Trump administration “mostly doesn’t care” about Europe’s fate._ He also compared Trump’s interference in German elections—through endorsements by Vice President JD Vance and Elon Musk—to the influence operations we’ve seen from Moscow.

**Help me keep the U.S. at the pinnacle of diplomacy and leadership.**
---
[](https://fight4progress.org/valimont?t=5A0FWypIdwB1&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-15_1&amount=25)
__One of our closest allies is now actively discussing plans to reduce reliance on the United States._ _**Let that sink in.** This is what happens when an American president treats diplomacy like a business deal, insults our allies, and emboldens autocrats like Putin. Our standing in the world matters. When we abandon our allies, we weaken democracy everywhere. We must fight to restore America’s credibility, strengthen NATO, and ensure that the U.S. remains a trusted leader on the world stage. **We cannot afford to turn our backs on our allies.**

[_**Help me re-secure our allies' support. Will you split a donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress so we can push our message out, get into Congress, and put America back on track to being #1, the right way.**_](https://fight4progress.org/valimont?t=3rDkOdRswW3m&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-15_1&amount=25)
| | | [CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://fight4progress.org/valimont?t=mokbMWmXNQQQ&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-15_1&amount=5)
---

---

---

---

---

Join us against this administration's actions and work towards meaningful change.

Warm regards,
Gay Valimont
Democratic Candidate for Florida's 1st Congressional District

name: TESLA Dealership
subject: Billionaires Don’t Care About You. I DO.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Donald Trump and Elon Musk are having a field day—cozying up at the White House, making backroom deals, and throwing the stock market into chaos.
Meanwhile, working-class Floridians are struggling to keep up with rent, groceries, and gas prices. Instead of tackling the real issues, Trump is prioritizing his billionaire buddies.
What if I told you there is another duo that can fight them off: You and I. We need to hit our end-of-week fundraising goal to take this fight straight to them. We only have 17 days left in this campaign to make this happen.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/667A78376C344A4A2F643045437873557279505534467A52776259527272465971637176627958333377314B6A3973506E4F686F48557056355A58344D324A4A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-03-15%20at%202.42.58%E2%80%AFPM.png]
Let’s be clear: I’m running for Congress to fight for Americans , not them.
While Trump is too busy going back on his word, endorsing Tesla, and turning the White House into a car dealership, I am boots on the ground working hard to figure out what my district needs. While Elon cozies up to Trump to ensure policy that benefits him , I am fighting for:
✅ Lowering costs for Florida families
✅ Expanding access to good-paying jobs
✅ Holding corporations accountable when they price-gouge hardworking Americans
The GOP wants to protect the ultra-wealthy at your expense. I want to protect you .
Can you chip in today to push the campaign that fights for everyday Floridians into D.C.? $10 is all it takes to keep us going! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]

clean_body: [] Donald Trump and Elon Musk are having a field day—cozying up at the White House, making backroom deals, and throwing the stock market into chaos. Meanwhile, working-class Floridians are struggling to keep up with rent, groceries, and gas prices. Instead of tackling the real issues, Trump is prioritizing his billionaire buddies. What if I told you there is another duo that can fight them off: You and I. We need to hit our end-of-week fundraising goal to take this fight straight to them. We only have 17 days left in this campaign to make this happen. [] Let’s be clear: I’m running for Congress to fight for Americans , not them. While Trump is too busy going back on his word, endorsing Tesla, and turning the White House into a car dealership, I am boots on the ground working hard to figure out what my district needs. While Elon cozies up to Trump to ensure policy that benefits him , I am fighting for: ✅ Lowering costs for Florida families ✅ Expanding access to good-paying jobs ✅ Holding corporations accountable when they price-gouge hardworking Americans The GOP wants to protect the ultra-wealthy at your expense. I want to protect you . Can you chip in today to push the campaign that fights for everyday Floridians into D.C.? $10 is all it takes to keep us going! As Kansas’ only Democrat in Washington, Sharice has used her voice to strongly oppose extreme legislation pushed by National Republicans, including their plan to cut billions from Medicaid. But here’s the thing: That voice makes her a target. In a competitive district like KS-03, National Republicans are working year-round to mislead voters about Sharice’s record, all in an effort to replace her with a politician who will toe the GOP party line. We need to fight back against these attacks, and that means assembling the resources to get the message out about who Sharice is, what she stands for, and what she’s delivered for our district. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you so much for being one of Sharice’s top supporters. subject: They not like us

body:
At a time when we need to be tackling our biggest challenges – creating good-paying jobs, strengthening public education, and rebuilding our communities – we’ve got these clowns dragging us backward.
#
_You are receiving this email because of your past support for Democrats in competitive races. If you would like to unsubscribe,[please click here to opt out.](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee?t=1&akid=8825%2E614464%2E3zanRd)_

**Peter, let’s be real.**
Donald Trump and Elon Musk?
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87079?refcode=em20250315-8825&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8825%2E614464%2E3zanRd)
These guys... they’re not like us, y’all. Not even close.
At a time when we need to be tackling our biggest challenges – creating good-paying jobs, strengthening public education, and rebuilding our communities – **we’ve got these clowns dragging us backward.**
**[I’m running for Governor of Michigan because I can’t sit on the sidelines and let them undo all the progress we’ve made. If you’re with me, please split a donation between me and State Democrats Committee to become a Founding Donor of our campaign today→](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87079?refcode=em20250315-8825&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8825%2E614464%2E3zanRd)**

Here’s the thing: we’ve beaten them before, and we can do it again.
In Michigan, we’ve proven that when we put in the work and show up to the polls, we win. We’ve protected fundamental rights, grown small businesses, fixed the damn roads, and moved this state forward.
Now, with Trump and Musk selling off our democracy piece by piece and pushing their extremist, anti-worker agenda – we need to fight back harder than ever.
Michigan – and America – need to know: we might be down, but we’re not out. And we’re coming back stronger than ever.
**🚨 We’re building a people-powered campaign to fight back, and we need to raise $50,000 this week to show we’re ready to take them on.**
**[Can you split a donation of $35, $15, or even $5 between me and State Democrats Committee right now to help us build a winning campaign? subject: This is shameful, Peter

body:
We’re building a better party – and country – together.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250315-1&t=1&akid=1859%2E587540%2EMZGBvH)
Peter, did you hear that Republican leadership has told their members to avoid holding town halls with their constituents?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250315-1?refcode=em20250315-1859&amount=5&refcode2=1859_587540_MZGBvH&akid=1859%2E587540%2EMZGBvH)
**_Why?_ They know that their policies are unpopular,** and they’re afraid to face the people that elected them in the first place.
**It’s shameful.** This is a perfect opportunity for Democrats to step in and show voters that we are ready and willing to deliver real results.
We’re building a better party — _and country_ — by electing energetic, responsive young leaders who will deliver for their constituents, but we need your help.
We don’t have billionaires lining up to fund our movement. We have you — and we’re counting on you to chip in now.
**[Help us build this movement by pitching in $5 today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250315-1?refcode=em20250315-1859&amount=5&refcode2=1859_587540_MZGBvH&akid=1859%2E587540%2EMZGBvH)**

I appreciate your support. Thank you.
David Hogg

This is all part of this Project 2025 agenda, by defunding public broadcasting they would be able to censor and silence all criticism of Trump’s administration.

That’s why it’s more important than ever that Democrats band together to protect media watchdogs to ensure they don’t get away with their attacks on democracy.

**[We’re relying on grassroots Democrats like you to help defend our right to a free press. Will you stand with us by signing our Support Public Broadcasting petition now? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103926010/533696593/-664544464?refcode=NDCAF_20250314_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTA0NTNiMi1jZjAxLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zf9bCdoCMZ4_4QNtB0wAPdcyhy9vV3K3JoeH2BT-ypM=&emci=750ade5a-e100-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=290453b2-cf01-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=48524772)**
