name: Eric Swalwell
subject: What I told DOGE I’m working on:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
My five bullet points on last week’s accomplishments
| Friend,

Fighting back against Trump’s MAGA agenda is my top priority. It’s why I call out the corruption and chaos of Republican extremists. And it’s why I sent this email when Trump’s handpicked, Twitter-poisoned tech bro, Elon, asked federal employees to justify their jobs: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87937?t=6&akid=19247%2E878179%2ESAhqXo) That’s the mission. Because Trump’s goons are coming for everything — from our democracy to the federal workforce who provide your taxpayer-paid benefits to basic human rights. **Right now, they’re firing people department by department, gutting agencies that hold the powerful accountable, and making loyalty to Trump — not competence — the only job requirement.**

**They want a government that works for them. We need a government that works for us. That’s why I need you in this fight.** [_Chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help me and the Voter Protection Project stop Trump’s MAGA wrecking crew from dismantling our democracy._](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87937?t=7&akid=19247%2E878179%2ESAhqXo) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Eric Swalwell and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87938?t=8&akid=19247%2E878179%2ESAhqXo)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87939?t=9&akid=19247%2E878179%2ESAhqXo)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87940?t=10&akid=19247%2E878179%2ESAhqXo)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87941?t=11&akid=19247%2E878179%2ESAhqXo)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87942?t=12&akid=19247%2E878179%2ESAhqXo)
The truth is, Trump and his yes-men don’t want the government to work. Because when it works, people have rights. There are checks and balances to power. The law applies to everyone.

Trump can’t have that. So his unelected Chief Troll Officer is slashing jobs, silencing experts, and replacing them with right-wing influencers and crypto bros.

We can stop them — **but only if we fight back.** [_Split a donation of whatever you can to fuel the Voter Protection Project and I’s fight to stop Trump, expose his cronies, and protect democracy._](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87937?t=13&akid=19247%2E878179%2ESAhqXo)
[DONATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87937?t=14&akid=19247%2E878179%2ESAhqXo)
---
Thanks for standing with me,

Eric
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19247%2E878179%2ESAhqXo). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19247%2E878179%2ESAhqXo).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19247%2E878179%2ESAhqXo) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=19247%2E878179%2ESAhqXo). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19247%2E878179%2ESAhqXo)

name: Josh W.
subject: Less Than 3 Weeks to Make History (Every Moment Counts!)
body:
| |
---
My opponent's track record aligns with the most extreme elements of the MAGA agenda... | [View in browser](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ4OTY2MTc0NzM0OTQzOTY5LFwiclwiOjE0ODk2NjI2MzUxMjYzMTA2M30iLCJzIjoiMzkxMTA0NTQ0M2FmODA0MSJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ4OTY2MTc0NzM5MTM4Mjc0LFwiclwiOjE0ODk2NjI2MzUxMjYzMTA2M30iLCJzIjoiYTkxNzBlMzI5MWM3OWNkYiJ9)
---
|
---
Friend,

We are officially in the final stretch with less than THREE WEEKS until Election Day.

That means we have only a short window of time to flip this seat, send a Democrat to Congress, and take a critical step toward ending MAGA control.

**This is our chance to change the course of our country, but we cannot take anything for granted.

** We have a real opportunity to win, but the truth is that it will take an enormous effort in these final weeks to push us over the finish line. We can flip this seat, but it will not happen unless we reach every last undecided voter and make sure our supporters turn out to cast their ballots.

That is why our campaign is making an aggressive final push to expand our voter outreach program. Our path to victory depends on an advanced and highly targeted field operation. We need to mobilize volunteers, reach swing voters, and make direct voter contact through door knocking, phone calls, and community outreach. **The conversations we have in the next three weeks could make the difference in this race.**

But none of this happens without resources. Field operations are one of the most effective tools in any campaign, but they are also expensive. We need to print campaign literature, fund digital outreach, and ensure our volunteers have everything they need to reach as many voters as possible.

|
---
**[Can you make a contribution of $25 dollars or whatever you can afford to help us fund our field operation? Every donation helps us reach more voters, and with time running out, every moment matters.](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ4OTY2MTc0NzQzMzMyNTc5LFwiclwiOjE0ODk2NjI2MzUxMjYzMTA2M30iLCJzIjoiZmY2ZDQzNTY3ZDU1MWY0NSJ9)**
|
---
| | [ Donate To Help Us Reach Voters
](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ4OTY2MTc0NzQ3NTI2ODg0LFwiclwiOjE0ODk2NjI2MzUxMjYzMTA2M30iLCJzIjoiZjY2ZjAxM2RjZTMxNGU2MiJ9)
---
|
---
**[_Or multiply your impact through our final month with a weekly contribution_](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ4OTY2MTc0NzUwNjcyNjEzLFwiclwiOjE0ODk2NjI2MzUxMjYzMTA2M30iLCJzIjoiNDc2MDQ5NzY5ZjE1ZTU5NSJ9)**
|
---
MAGA Extremists donors and outside groups are pouring millions into this race. They are flooding the airwaves with attack ads and misinformation because they know this seat is competitive. But they do not have what we do. They do not have a movement of grassroots supporters who are ready to fight for change.

**If we stand together, we can overcome their money and their attacks.** We can run the strongest voter contact program this district has ever seen. We can reach the undecided voters who will decide this election and bring new leadership to Congress. But we need to act now.
[
Please chip in today and help us make history on April 1st.](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ4OTY2MTc0NzUzODE4MzQyLFwiclwiOjE0ODk2NjI2MzUxMjYzMTA2M30iLCJzIjoiYjkwOWUwNjhhN2M3ZTYwZCJ9)

|
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE
](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ4OTY2MTc0NzU2OTY0MDcxLFwiclwiOjE0ODk2NjI2MzUxMjYzMTA2M30iLCJzIjoiNzc4MTllYjgwMDQ0OWYzMCJ9)
---
|
---
Gratefully,

Josh Weil
Democrat for Florida's 6th

name: store.dlcc.org
subject: 💐 Out with the old and in with the new
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
There’s no better time to shop your favorite DLCC apparel – we have a slew of upcoming special elections, and your purchase will help elect state Democrats in key battleground states. | | |
---
| |
---|---

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Are you furious about last night’s vote to potentially hand Trump more spending power?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
You don't stop a bully by handing over your lunch money, and you don't stop a tyrant by handing him more power.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103926689/533698853/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTQ1ZjkxMy1kMTAxLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jNmNXTZq6LN6UGBLPfAjTA8ruNmlphOBAA4C5GImRSM=&emci=6b3f5894-ce01-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8945f913-d101-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Are you furious about last night's vote to potentially hand Trump more spending power? I am. Some were worried about the impacts of a shutdown and about Trump and the press blaming Democrats for starting one. The first point was fair. Yes, a shutdown under Trump could be bad. But the worse a shutdown is, the bigger the reaction against Trump and the more pressure on the Republican majority to end the shutdown. Remember that Trump was scorched by public opinion in his 2019 shutdown. And Trump and Vance both lobbied House Republicans last week to pass the CR because a shutdown would likely shut down DOGE. The second point was absurd. The Republicans control the House, Senate, and Oval Office. The Republicans would have had to repeatedly block the Democrat's plan to keep the government open for 30 days to negotiate a bipartisan spending bill. Recent polling showed that Independents already assumed Republicans were responsible for a potential shutdown by a 29% margin! **Here is the most important point: You don't stop a bully by handing over your lunch money, and you don't stop a tyrant by handing him more power.** If you are furious like me, here are three things you can do. First: Get off the sofa. You can't help save our nation while curled up in a fetal position. Second: Hold your elected officials accountable. Go to their town halls. Peacefully protest outside their offices. Third: Join a group that shares your values. Protesting alone is depressing. Joining with others is energizing. Join the fight. Join the resistance. Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

clean_body: You don't stop a bully by handing over your lunch money, and you don't stop a tyrant by handing him more power. | | | | Are you furious about last night's vote to potentially hand Trump more spending power? I am. Some were worried about the impacts of a shutdown and about Trump and the press blaming Democrats for starting one. The first point was fair. Yes, a shutdown under Trump could be bad. But the worse a shutdown is, the bigger the reaction against Trump and the more pressure on the Republican majority to end the shutdown. Remember that Trump was scorched by public opinion in his 2019 shutdown. And Trump and Vance both lobbied House Republicans last week to pass the CR because a shutdown would likely shut down DOGE. The second point was absurd. The Republicans control the House, Senate, and Oval Office. The Republicans would have had to repeatedly block the Democrat's plan to keep the government open for 30 days to negotiate a bipartisan spending bill. Recent polling showed that Independents already assumed Republicans were responsible for a potential shutdown by a 29% margin! Here is the most important point: You don't stop a bully by handing over your lunch money, and you don't stop a tyrant by handing him more power. If you are furious like me, here are three things you can do. First: Get off the sofa. You can't help save our nation while curled up in a fetal position. Second: Hold your elected officials accountable. Go to their town halls. Peacefully protest outside their offices. Third: Join a group that shares your values. Protesting alone is depressing. Joining with others is energizing. Join the fight. Join the resistance. Onward! name: Gay Valimont
subject: Trump says it’s ILLEGAL to not buy Tesla?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Folks,

I wish I were making this up.

Donald Trump just said it should be ILLEGAL to boycott Tesla.

Why? Because his puppet-master Elon Musk is mad that more Americans are choosing other cars.

This is the MAGA movement in 2025 – a government that works for billionaires and cronies while everyday people are left behind.

Trump and his allies want to control every aspect of our lives – from the books we read to the cars we drive. And my opponent? He would be another loyal foot soldier for this insanity.

This is why I am running. To put an end to MAGA Madness once and for all.

But we’re running out of time. We have just three weeks left until Election Day, and this race will be decided by the slimmest of margins. We can’t afford to let another MAGA extremist take this seat.

Can you rush a donation today -- split with Seth Moulton -- to help us fight back? Every dollar you give will go straight to defeating the right-wing machine trying to buy this election. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]This isn’t just about Tesla – this is about POWER.

Trump’s GOP thinks they can dictate your choices. They want to tell you:

❌ What books your kids can read
❌ What car you can drive
❌ Who you can love
❌ What you can do with your own body

This is what happens when MAGA extremists run our government. They don’t believe in freedom – they believe in controlling people like you while handing power to billionaires like Elon Musk.Enough is enough.

We can flip this seat and send a message that MAGA’s stranglehold on our democracy is ending. But it won’t happen without YOU.

Click here to chip in -- split with Seth Moulton -- whatever you can today. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

We’re going all in. I need you with me.

– Gay Valimont

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

This is why I am running. To put an end to MAGA Madness once and for all. But we’re running out of time. We have just three weeks left until Election Day, and this race will be decided by the slimmest of margins. We can’t afford to let another MAGA extremist take this seat. Can you rush a donation today -- split with Seth Moulton -- to help us fight back? Every dollar you give will go straight to defeating the right-wing machine trying to buy this election. [] Donate [ isn’t just about Tesla – this is about POWER. Trump’s GOP thinks they can dictate your choices. They want to tell you: ❌ What books your kids can read ❌ What car you can drive ❌ Who you can love ❌ What you can do with your own body This is what happens when MAGA extremists run our government. They don’t believe in freedom – they believe in controlling people like you while handing power to billionaires like Elon Musk.Enough is enough. We can flip this seat and send a message that MAGA’s stranglehold on our democracy is ending. But it won’t happen without YOU. Click here to chip in -- split with Seth Moulton -- whatever you can today. [] We’re going all in. I need you with me. – Gay Valimont [] [content goes here] unsubscribe: Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress Contributions to Seth Moulton For Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. An individual or federal PAC may contribute up to $3,300 per election; $6,600 per cycle. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal government contractors, and foreign nationals (non-citizens without “green cards”) are prohibited. Federal law requires our best efforts to obtain and report the name, address,occupation, and employer of individual contributors.

Special Adviser for the U.S. Agency for Global Media (USAGM) Kari Lake

name: Johnny O
subject: Let's turn our anger into action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Johnny O for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP47/1/105827/images/-Johnny%20O.png]

I’m angry as I write to you today.
I’m angry that extreme conservatives have forced into law a hyper-partisan budget that turns its back on America’s veterans and most vulnerable. I’m angry that it empowers President Trump to continue his relentless attack on our Democratic institutions.
And I’m angry that my colleagues walked away from the negotiating table when compromise was still possible.
I am angry, but not deterred. We need to speak up – on social media, in town halls, on the phones and in emails – against this assault. We especially need to support candidates like me who will keep pushing, loudly. Can I count on you to contribute to my reelection campaign today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]
Let’s turn our anger into action. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]

name: Congressman Troy Downing
subject: Hail Mary Moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I'm down to my last play

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._lLIeH8UvHORtk6A)
---
That’s it... I’m throwing my final Hail Mary pass.

Peter, it’s not looking good. **The March mid-month deadline is TONIGHT, and I’m down to my last play.**
---
I was counting on grassroots Patriots like you to help run defense, but I guess I’m out of luck.

I’ve sent texts, sent emails, made phone calls... and I’ve heard nothing. It’s been **RADIO SILENCE.**

**THIS. WON’T. DO.**
---
[ **CHIP IN TODAY**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._ucUzYAHk8QezLWwpN6Q)
---
_I’m**NOT** a quitter_ \- I will keep fighting, even when my back is against the wall.

It's Troy Downing. I’m just a guy from Montana taking a huge leap of faith.

Peter, I'm also a U.S. Air Force combat veteran. A God-fearing Christian, a husband, and a proud dad.

**I've taken my seat in Congress, and I couldn’t be more honored to serve you!**

But, I still need to make one thing clear to my new colleagues: the American people are demanding real change. To do that, I need your help to shatter my next goal.

I’m asking you, person to person, please **CHIP IN TODAY**. **[Whether it’s $5 or $100, EVERYTHING HELPS.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._E5lu-NqYVzlQ)**
---
[ **CHIP IN TODAY**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-tIdpV6j732-g)
---
[**You’re on deck, Peter. Will you help me crush this next goal?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-N_jNyaAAM6xZA)

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,

Congressman Troy Downing

---
---
|
---

---

name: Sarah Kline
subject: Join our Storytellers Workshop!
body:
How you can help us fight back against high utility bills...| | | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103928086/533702561/-790084089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1MzhjZDEzLWQ4MDEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2fzClqn7CJWeuf2SuL3Py4K3bAiMyTbvTJF6RIW-vfo=&emci=3b64e033-0401-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7538cd13-d801-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
Hi Peter, Climate change is here, and our communities are already feeling the impacts. On top of that, utility rate hikes in Oregon have gone too far, which makes us less resilient and safe. That’s why OLCV has joined [Building Resilience](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103928088/533702563/-1480106498?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1MzhjZDEzLWQ4MDEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2fzClqn7CJWeuf2SuL3Py4K3bAiMyTbvTJF6RIW-vfo=&emci=3b64e033-0401-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7538cd13-d801-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230), a statewide coalition of climate justice, public health, business, and labor organizations; and thousands of individual Oregonians advocating for legislative action to promote healthy resilient communities that run on affordable clean energy. The 2025 legislative session is in full swing, and that means the Building Resilience Coalition’s bills could be up for a public hearing any day now! Oregonians like you, as well as clean energy contractors and practitioners, can make a huge difference by sharing your clean energy and climate resilience stories. **We know that when it comes to skyrocketing utility costs, and climate resilience everyone has a story to share. ** We also know that finding your story, crafting it, and sharing it is a skill. That’s why we’re hosting a Storytelling Workshop! At this Building Resilience campaign training, you’ll learn the basics of storytelling, get some tips and tricks, and meet members of our team who are here to support you — [**JOIN US!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103928089/533702564/-790084089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1MzhjZDEzLWQ4MDEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2fzClqn7CJWeuf2SuL3Py4K3bAiMyTbvTJF6RIW-vfo=&emci=3b64e033-0401-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7538cd13-d801-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230) **Event:** Building Resilience Storytelling Workshop**When:** Tuesday, March 25th from 6:00 - 7:00 PM **Where:** Zoom (link provided to RSVPs)
---
[**RSVP here!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103928097/533702566/-790084089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1MzhjZDEzLWQ4MDEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2fzClqn7CJWeuf2SuL3Py4K3bAiMyTbvTJF6RIW-vfo=&emci=3b64e033-0401-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7538cd13-d801-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
This year, [Building Resilience has three priorities](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103928102/533702577/-401923353?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1MzhjZDEzLWQ4MDEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2fzClqn7CJWeuf2SuL3Py4K3bAiMyTbvTJF6RIW-vfo=&emci=3b64e033-0401-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7538cd13-d801-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230) to reduce energy costs and support Oregonians in making the energy efficiency and resilience upgrades they want.
* One Stop Shop 2.0 (HB 3081)
* Get the Junk Out of Rates (SB 88)
* Fully Funding Climate Resilience

Oregon’s legislature must take action in 2025 to give more Oregonians access to more resilient and safer homes and buildings. **[Join our Storytellers Workshop to craft and share your story and help pass much-needed relief for Oregon families and small businesses.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103928109/533702585/-790084089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1MzhjZDEzLWQ4MDEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2fzClqn7CJWeuf2SuL3Py4K3bAiMyTbvTJF6RIW-vfo=&emci=3b64e033-0401-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7538cd13-d801-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230) **
---
| | [**Join us**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103928111/533702590/-790084089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1MzhjZDEzLWQ4MDEtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2fzClqn7CJWeuf2SuL3Py4K3bAiMyTbvTJF6RIW-vfo=&emci=3b64e033-0401-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7538cd13-d801-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)

clean_body: How you can help us fight back against high utility bills...| | | Hi Peter, Climate change is here, and our communities are already feeling the impacts. On top of that, utility rate hikes in Oregon have gone too far, which makes us less resilient and safe. That’s why OLCV has joined , a statewide coalition of climate justice, public health, business, and labor organizations; and thousands of individual Oregonians advocating for legislative action to promote healthy resilient communities that run on affordable clean energy. The 2025 legislative session is in full swing, and that means the Building Resilience Coalition’s bills could be up for a public hearing any day now! Oregonians like you, as well as clean energy contractors and practitioners, can make a huge difference by sharing your clean energy and climate resilience stories. We know that when it comes to skyrocketing utility costs, and climate resilience everyone has a story to share. We also know that finding your story, crafting it, and sharing it is a skill. That’s why we’re hosting a Storytelling Workshop! At this Building Resilience campaign training, you’ll learn the basics of storytelling, get some tips and tricks, and meet members of our team who are here to support you — Event: Building Resilience Storytelling WorkshopWhen: Tuesday, March 25th from 6:00 - 7:00 PM Where: Zoom (link provided to RSVPs) This year, to reduce energy costs and support Oregonians in making the energy efficiency and resilience upgrades they want. One Stop Shop 2.0 (HB 3081) Get the Junk Out of Rates (SB 88) Fully Funding Climate Resilience Oregon’s legislature must take action in 2025 to give more Oregonians access to more resilient and safer homes and buildings. ** | | See you there! Sarah Kline (she/they) OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Marine Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Semper Fi.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I’ve lived a full, rewarding life – and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America.
I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely.
| |
---
| | | | | | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=92157633c044424f88f98152fd75e568&_e=ViZhrz0ft5LTLpg38vrxMGAFtq_TFR3QnIw-oBLybTbzca5cUpDVQTDEA-U9O_vpiLZ5wQtrzO3wC5kZN-1qwvQoMkVd3iy1hqCZfHMN2i7SVBbMzuvO-u5T4nbrUI0VWhv7HCg6DnSSFwn-l4xVwSLNm9Pr9Db9_dDvrQNFcVsAxPleTpJCdCH9NKDYgucH1wc-5TUtpl5Cu3hcyhTZaA7ilxl5Ru9PMEi9jjZq8_1y9nSCYefqVcwFNjpXTcJ1ZC8vwpHW9ScjDayDOtqHvY5ZIFRDkJLjz5t9m_-fnEWYYLDTkfKFguFQUX_qViR_YLpXXTQJ1XLXN2obU69eA2WNpoXSBU81Kk3FlmtPlEHfuccUkx9WYnEIAIBqvlxadI9ZwrDwaAYX9f44a7ltEQ%3D%3D)

**Semper Fi._Always faithful._** I often get asked, _" Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?"_
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=92157633c044424f88f98152fd75e568&_e=ViZhrz0ft5LTLpg38vrxMGAFtq_TFR3QnIw-oBLybTbzca5cUpDVQTDEA-U9O_vpiLZ5wQtrzO3wC5kZN-1qwvQoMkVd3iy1hqCZfHMN2i7SVBbMzuvO-u5T4nbrUI0VWhv7HCg6DnSSFwn-l4xVwSLNm9Pr9Db9_dDvrQNFcVsAxPleTpJCdCH9NKDYgucH1wc-5TUtpl5Cu3hcyhTZaA7ilxl5Ru9PMEi9jjZq8_1y9nSCYefqVcwFNjpXTcJ1UNHPqtGEyA7wUDBHMYE-gyfp67HIn9z35_9M6Yrgcrie07Ai1YoOL-GWIDPxmuBl2fQzP3VnlWKWJIwvfy6UIDblLkJR74-GajZnbcThel-Ft9yXCriBFvJxM7MFxwXsHXBXx9krn0iquXEguZVfAA%3D%3D)
---
And to that, I say **absolutely.** Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, **and I 'm not like the others who normally send you these messages:**-I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old.
-I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician.
-I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry.I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: _**my story is only possible in America.**_ And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope.

_But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. clean_body: I’ve lived a full, rewarding life – and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America. I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely. | | | | | | | | | Semper Fi.Always faithful. I often get asked, " Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely. Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, and I 'm not like the others who normally send you these messages:-I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old. -I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician. -I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry.I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America. And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope. But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children.Not on my watch. We have a long journey ahead of us, but we will be better off with you on our side. Thank you & God Bless, Winsome Earle-Sears Candidate for Governor of Virginia | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to all of us conservatives working together to win. | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments.

subject: Is this how Social Security dies??
body:

| | | | Team,
Trump and Elon Musk are deliberately wrecking our economy to enrich themselves.
And now they are actively working to plunge millions more Americans into poverty by first destroying Social Security, and then privatizing it.
Once they have eroded public confidence in programs like Social Security by gutting them internally, the path to selling it off to their billionaire buddies (and themselves) will be much smoother.

That's why winning this special election is so important: if we win, we can stop Musk and Trump from ruining our economy and save working families.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Saving the Easter Bunny
body:
It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l9eqjdj03m4752bz8jb7x3hcl59gnzli766sxm8w0c98hl9c4j6szb3ppp7vwdqbeprllw4uttbgttggxy&__stmp=st6maq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
| | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate...
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away. And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate... ...to Jesus. And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood... ...by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love. Here’s exactly what their strategy is... First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created _Saving the Easter Bunny_ , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic. In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin. Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible. And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "_Mouse in the House_ ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS! That's why step one of Brave Books' "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ big-time. **[And today I'm hoping you'll help them kick it into high gear before orders start pouring in by rushing back your best "Prepare the Way" gift.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st6maq&__onlt=h)** No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission... Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture. Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive. But I know we can do it. Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done:
---
>>> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries. >>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great. >>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ and a 17-city church tour.
---
And listen to this... **[**Your "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100 or more, not only helps fund this revival campaign that makes Jesus the reason for the Easter season once more...**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st6maq&__onlt=h)** Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools. AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you **[contribute $100 or more to the "Prepare the Way" revival](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st6maq&__onlt=h)** , Brave Books will send you _Saving the Easter Bunny_ absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep _Saving the Easter Bunny_ for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. **[**What's most important is that you rush back your best "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100, or more right away.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st6maq&__onlt=h)** Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America.
---
May God bless you this coming Easter season,
---
| | Kirk Cameron Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st6maq&__onlt=h)
---
| | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st6maq&__onlt=h)
---
**Kirk Cameron** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. Brave Books is focused on sparking historic revival this Easter! They've launched a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate -- to Jesus. **[**Please help us point families to the empty tomb this Easter with your gift of $35, $50, $100, or more.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st6maq&__onlt=h)** As a special thank you for your gift of $100 or more we'll send you your very own copy of Saving the Easter Bunny for your family. Thank you!
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st6maq&__onlt=h) [**DONATE** ](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st6maq&__onlt=h) [ ](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st6maq&__onlt=h)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | As we start the New Year, I have big news to share with you. But first, I want to say something about the victories you helped us accomplish in 2024.
---
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Brave Books.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l9eqjdj03m4752bz8jb7x3hcl59gnzli766sxm8w0c98hl9c4j6szb3ppp7vwdqbeprllw4uttbgttggxy&__stmp=st6maq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. [Unsubscribe from all communications](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l9eqjdj03m4752bz8jb7x3hcl59gnzli766sxm8w0c98hl9c4j6szb3ppp7vwdqbeprllw4uttbgttggxy&__stmp=st6maq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh).

[Privacy Policy](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=33g5tc4p3hf5b529epkqdv97lql8d69u807mhcxtr0233lj19e3p9bbkebwl26cvyopa1fxgupsnics6fxj45nzwc18mqswt29wtwksby6snx82lraoiok9engqotjfr8kkmyyehotflxnsrl5buxi&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st6maq&__onlt=h)

name: Tim Burchett
subject: The swamp thinks I’m a pain—let’s keep it that way!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
Less nonsense. More common sense.| | | |
---
| | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=acf14dd105214620a836179a1741b770&_e=2aPzX3nMLCEv4RrvzH3uTPn1GynwCg8k8fZZFrPT_1G3WbC4X46UmSwpPwLJYqqGgGvRGzkVZH9q1nmyy8eutSQdTAV_YIHnXSX3GQ5Ti6059PG_5OKkGnLSfeYn3mvUYCmQn97aPtZnMSpU6BIjT5dVKChub0ljCIr5HqCL8wzeVgqub8ca6IlRkbHyoDXjdWJ7P_wMRFp13QIURvlFjye3H7QHRA_oIFjPcVHgLCm0xjs1Tea7MHp4AVeSudA9DGYedrlQ3hYRoebFOI_qCry5lofUKIQL_KBvIZkGDNP5RO-lzAajphPSCmcKRzwgXqO8ScIooMWnJnkHjCipR-BRxCw_swiaoSlJU79em7FXxoNkJ3WcFn4o1wcUMkSJehVewVO03ZEwqi7EFdfVvg%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, If you’re looking for a slick-talking, poll-tested politician—well dadgum, keep looking—because that’s not me. I’m here to fight for commonsense folks like you, even if it means stepping on a few toes in Washington. (Trust me, some of those toes wear really expensive shoes.) But standing up to the nonsense means I’ve got a target on my back. The lobbyists and career politicians would love nothing more than to see me pack up my Carhartt jacket and head home. **_Not happening._** Listen, Republicans have had a rough go at fundraising lately. Meanwhile, the Liberal coastal elites are rolling in the cash like a hog on roller skates. I’m more of a no-frills kind of guy. So, here’s the deal: We have less than 48 hours until our mid-month deadline and WE’RE BEHIND. Could you do us a favor and chip in?
---

clean_body: Less nonsense. More common sense.| | | | | | | | Friend, If you’re looking for a slick-talking, poll-tested politician—well dadgum, keep looking—because that’s not me. I’m here to fight for commonsense folks like you, even if it means stepping on a few toes in Washington. (Trust me, some of those toes wear really expensive shoes.) But standing up to the nonsense means I’ve got a target on my back. The lobbyists and career politicians would love nothing more than to see me pack up my Carhartt jacket and head home. Not happening. Listen, Republicans have had a rough go at fundraising lately. Meanwhile, the Liberal coastal elites are rolling in the cash like a hog on roller skates. I’m more of a no-frills kind of guy. So, here’s the deal: We have less than 48 hours until our mid-month deadline and WE’RE BEHIND. Could you do us a favor and chip in? This may be pocket change for the Democrats, but my campaign is fueled by everyday Americans, like you and I. I’ll keep doing the job you sent me here to do—no fluff, no nonsense, just straight talk. Appreciate you, Tim Burchett | | Join the conservative movement! Chip in to help us pave the way for a solid Republican agenda. | | | Stay in Touch 👇 Paid for by Burchett for Congress | | | ---|---|---

For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

name: Kimberly Bretches
subject: The George Floyd riots continue to haunt my husband
body:
| | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job.
---
| |
---
Dear Peter, That's me and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches in the picture I've sent you...
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6061dfe692134c52bbe5876de708bada&_e=-WwJsrvwBtGdz6zZ6hAtzbdwvSnPmxJ4_9KroNG5-pjpMeYLHLKDE6JJAhLNa7u83dkAycKsp_yHAkEuY-xDmKKMOQZelvwuU45y7ufF7mBxnh_AwbZ-YkESR_lrC5eoV6T5PMXrIEEMkLsBJJwvIs2n8aKsMn7yHObFPZCW3ZC2jWNjQbObjpDVszGTggaJfmU3K72qTwevOAamZf6LCVclqssHljLJqBKY5I2AkSbVT9uxX5Z_VpKo4KiQaZ2Gqt0AIIJ8_sDOm_srVUVh8BeeXrOB-wFdc3YO2qMBuWoWQHgWxFR72siZEquGlTZk7Ml1d7ljs26R4VEaoX2GgSHwB_LHCkv9VMgp0MvSNb2NPuf81_eLwe3uk1aLaBZ5_YRskNuiZ68OyqFNGvKl9g%3D%3D)
---
...a picture we took on the day Chance received the Lifesaving Medal With Valor for rescuing a driver from a crashed car that had caught on fire. This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because in July, the same city that gave Chance this award... ...will try to lock him up for life for doing his job. I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were "mostly peaceful." It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars, and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn't restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same "beanbag guns" that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before it got out of hand. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. What I didn’t know then was that this nightmare wasn't over for us. Far from it. Unknown to Chance and the other officers on duty that night, an anti-police protestor was hit by one of my husband's non-lethal rounds. They claimed they were injured and lost part of their finger. And for that... ...the county prosecutor charged my husband with "aggravated assault by a public servant" -- a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, my emotions went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned that the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don't care if my husband is innocent. They'll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year police veteran. My husband is a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He's served on mission trips -- planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he's done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars and could be his "reward." Even if my husband's good name is cleared there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God's grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us -- the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policemen's best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes -- like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth -- without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they've agreed to help Chance. My friend, you've read my letter this far so I'm going to ask as boldly as I can: Will you help Chance, too? _**[Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have wrongly accused?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6061dfe692134c52bbe5876de708bada&_e=-WwJsrvwBtGdz6zZ6hAtzbdwvSnPmxJ4_9KroNG5-pjpMeYLHLKDE6JJAhLNa7u83dkAycKsp_yHAkEuY-xDmKKMOQZelvwuU45y7ufF7mBxnh_AwbZ-YkESR_lrC5eoV6T5PMXrIEEMkLsBJJwvIs2n8aKsMn7yHObFPZCW3ZC2jWNjQbObjpDVszGTggaJfmU3K72qTwevOAamZf6LCVclqssHljLJqBKY5I2AkSbVT9uxX5Z_VpKo4KiQaZ2GG0j2xkFd7iJYGPUTB7wcTTi4Lp1_7ru20QYgIeil6WGqmwsfd2lkkfFq6EX7Irj5ctpA01uXnt0JM8Dem8_aliXk-mFlO0fLsjhA-tFDtGDozAflEBwseBLWeLbz3EbVGKp_bWwvcCkyqRVc6Inlhw%3D%3D)**_** ** You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. _**[So with that in mind, please know that any contribution -- be it $35, $100, $500 or even $1,000 -- is tax-deductible.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6061dfe692134c52bbe5876de708bada&_e=-WwJsrvwBtGdz6zZ6hAtzbdwvSnPmxJ4_9KroNG5-pjpMeYLHLKDE6JJAhLNa7u83dkAycKsp_yHAkEuY-xDmKKMOQZelvwuU45y7ufF7mBxnh_AwbZ-YkESR_lrC5eoV6T5PMXrIEEMkLsBJJwvIs2n8aKsMn7yHObFPZCW3ZC2jWNjQbObjpDVszGTggaJfmU3K72qTwevOAamZf6LCVclqssHljLJqBKY5I2AkSbVT9uxX5Z_VpKo4KiQaZ2GKswbaMnKuwmb6TDuEGPWRaNSr8zjKkaEY43GoP1CzmQ-tNsOOjDvbpucH4ebAdh5xA0YMiWpjPwGr1U6H0ci37ppTEt1zCV6bGBL_n7WSoNoiOoaH-l5GtxG_dEq05j7HW_Y3A1LIyLMxocM98B3zA%3D%3D)**_ But whatever you feel led to give, please end it back quickly. Chance's trial starts on July 7th. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he'll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won't be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won't be able to walk our daughter down the aisle somebody... I can't bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. _**[So please, my friend, rush back your gift right away if possible.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6061dfe692134c52bbe5876de708bada&_e=-WwJsrvwBtGdz6zZ6hAtzbdwvSnPmxJ4_9KroNG5-pjpMeYLHLKDE6JJAhLNa7u83dkAycKsp_yHAkEuY-xDmKKMOQZelvwuU45y7ufF7mBxnh_AwbZ-YkESR_lrC5eoV6T5PMXrIEEMkLsBJJwvIs2n8aKsMn7yHObFPZCW3ZC2jWNjQbObjpDVszGTggaJfmU3K72qTwevOAamZf6LCVclqssHljLJqBKY5I2AkSbVT9uxX5Z_VpKo4KiQaZ2GsLzhHk6HUNyTVGxkna1__ML2MiX9IFnfvVkxHcpyCTvFkWLDLkSpQOZhYCnKLrTdoSMPFdWv0V0cdyg7FZj5Ic4C18Iy9MlDGDLp0-wU4r0nhxh9dVVqMn85a5GZp1eRJsz9i10TZPSnkIGpnjoVMg%3D%3D)**_ With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, _**[your gift of $35](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6061dfe692134c52bbe5876de708bada&_e=-WwJsrvwBtGdz6zZ6hAtzbdwvSnPmxJ4_9KroNG5-pjpMeYLHLKDE6JJAhLNa7u83dkAycKsp_yHAkEuY-xDmKKMOQZelvwuU45y7ufF7mBxnh_AwbZ-YkESR_lrC5eoV6T5PMXrIEEMkLsBJJwvIs2n8aKsMn7yHObFPZCW3ZC2jWNjQbObjpDVszGTggaJfmU3K72qTwevOAamZf6LCVclqssHljLJqBKY5I2AkSbVT9uxX5Z_VpKo4KiQaZ2GgExr24fzLdIqJegaVbEIU1049XtStoRHV_cSTlk3nbTTwDEToDpClZdbCYb04OblCyoLx9tzhhfsuWZVIJtHRgDNB6q-9rPMh8CYVZ-sI3kh2eSNDEfT46C7C-s3E1HUfQDZd6yGqUK0dhiPRQ6tgA%3D%3D)**_ \-- or any amount -- could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you -- in advance -- for helping my husband fight back.

With hope and thanks,

Kimberly Bretches

**By Wendy Kinney**
They don't just want to silence Elon Musk--they want to destroy him. The death threats. Firebombed Tesla dealerships. Media smear campaigns. Market manipulation. This isn't dissent--it's persecution. It's war. Not a war of ideas, but a war of elimination--a calculated takedown of a man who dared to expose corruption and walk away from their machine.
Elon Musk didn't change. He simply refused to obey. He chose principle over popularity, courage over compliance. While others bowed to protect their careers, Elon stood alone--and stood taller than ever. He's lost over $180 billion in personal wealth standing for what he believes. But they still don't understand him--because it was never about money. It was always about truth, integrity, and confronting the rot inside the system.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..2cYWjXRzvYqjrJf5mw0eFcwlzYAXbPrunEPsMekkquw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159134476)
Once the darling of the left--idolized by progressives who flaunted Teslas as eco-status symbols--he's now their second most hated man. But to millions of Americans, he's a hero: bold, unshaken, and respected. A man who dared to say what so many already know deep down--that we are being lied to, bled dry, and censored into silence.
The radical left, though no longer the majority, is consumed by hatred--and violence has become their operating manual. How terrifying that a nation once revered for spirited debate now echoes with calls for death simply because someone dares to disagree.

_**(Piece continued)**_
Elon stood for free speech. He didn't just challenge the system--he risked his fortune and reputation to preserve the last open forum in America. Buying Twitter--now X--wasn't a business decision--it was a rescue mission. He saved the digital town square not for profit, but out of principle. That one bold act shifted the cultural tide and forced other platforms to follow suit, proving that courage can still shape a nation.
Then he did something even more disruptive--he aligned with President Trump and backed something that shook the very foundation of the status quo: DOGE--the Department of Government Efficiency.
DOGE wasn't just a department--it was a declaration. A statement from We the People that government works for us and is accountable to us--not the other way around. It struck at the heart of the left's empire: secrecy, unchecked spending, and bureaucratic control.
Through DOGE.gov, Americans saw what we long suspected: our hard-earned dollars haven't served the people--they've padded the pockets of a political cartel hiding behind layers of bureaucracy and fake virtue.
That was the turning point.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..2cYWjXRzvYqjrJf5mw0eFcwlzYAXbPrunEPsMekkquw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159134476)
DOGE didn't just ruffle feathers--it blew the lid off Washington's dirtiest secret: the waste, fraud, and abuse that props up the left's political machine. The latest audit data exposed a staggering $89 billion in misallocated or outright missing federal funds. Want specifics? Try $3.2 million on redundant DEI workshops, $18 million in unused software licenses, and $1.6 billion in "consulting fees" with no deliverables and zero oversight. That's not inefficiency--it's corruption. A slush fund system masquerading as public service.
And for exposing it, Elon became their primary target.
The attacks haven't just been ideological--they've been violent. Dealerships vandalized. Cars torched. Walls tagged with threats like "Free Speech Kills" and "Traitor Tech." This is coordinated political violence. Law enforcement knows it. And while they look the other way, Tesla stock is being systematically targeted by a media ecosystem hellbent on manufacturing financial bloodshed. It's just another weapon in their arsenal of retribution.
The irony runs even deeper. This is the same party mandating electric vehicles, spending $7.5 billion in taxpayer funds for EV charging stations--and delivering only three. Three. And yet, they cheer when Teslas are burned in the streets. One man even bought a Tesla just to destroy it on camera--a performative tantrum that somehow passes for protest. Think about that: the same political class that forces Americans into EVs is now glorifying the destruction of the very symbol they once used to virtue-signal. It's not just hypocrisy--it's madness.
Even FBI Director Kash Patel has raised red flags, sharply criticizing the agency's failure to act on what should clearly be treated as federal crimes--arson, coordinated vandalism, and violent threats targeting Musk. As Patel put it: "If these attacks were targeting anyone on the left, the FBI would have launched a full-scale investigation by now." He's right--and every American should be asking why federal law enforcement has allowed this to continue unchecked. With Kash at the helm, I foresee the FBI launching a full investigation into this coordinated political violence--a campaign targeting not just Elon Musk, but the very principles of free speech and dissent. And let's be clear: torching cars, threatening lives, and targeting a private citizen for his beliefs isn't protest--it's domestic terrorism.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..2cYWjXRzvYqjrJf5mw0eFcwlzYAXbPrunEPsMekkquw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159134476)
And the media? The same media that once glorified Musk now treats these violent attacks with indifference--or veiled snark. Where are the front-page headlines? The breathless condemnations? Now, silence. But their silence isn't neutral--it's complicit. The media no longer informs the people--it shields the regime and suppresses dissent.
And what, exactly, do these pawns claim to oppose? Exposing federal waste? Cutting fraud? Returning money to taxpayers--assuming they actually pay taxes? That's the irony. They aren't fighting corruption--they're defending it.
They preach justice, yet torch cars. Claim tolerance, yet threaten lives. Scream about democracy, yet silence opposing voices. Cry about equity, while elites gorge on taxpayer funds. Demand accountability--until it's their side that's caught. Hypocrisy isn't the exception anymore--it's the uniform.
Elon Musk's real crime? Saying what others are too afraid to say. He didn't just build rockets and cars--he built a firewall against tyranny. He became a symbol of resistance in an age of submission. And in this upside-down world, truth is treason.
But this isn't just his fight anymore--it's ours. If they can do this to him, they can do it to anyone. And that's the point. That's the message.
This is a line-in-the-sand moment--not just for tech or politics, but for freedom itself. Whether you like Elon Musk or not doesn't matter. Whether you drive a Tesla or voted for Trump doesn't matter. What matters is whether we have the courage to stand when the mob comes to destroy those who speak the truth.
Stay silent now--and we may never get another chance.
And next time--it won't be Elon.
It'll be you.
* * *
**About the Author**
Wendy Kinney is a Christian, legal strategist, attorney, and entrepreneur who champions free speech, financial liberty, and the Constitution. As Founder & CEO of Revere Payments, she defends American businesses from financial censorship and government overreach. Her work is rooted in light, driven by principle, and fearless in defense of freedom.

body:
Here's what he had to say. . . Peter – We wanted to follow up because we’re still behind on our mid-month fundraising goal for March – and bluntly: we really can’t afford to fall short.

Look, Andy launched ITT to support leaders who put people first. _But right now, too many of our elected leaders are more focused on party loyalty than the folks they were elected to serve._

That’s exactly why we need to step up. If we want to elect and protect leaders who will fight for their communities – _not party bosses_ – we need to hit this goal. **Will you chip in any amount to help us close the gap? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/itt-q1-25-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103929925/533707794/-627450706?refcode=em25_250315_mm2_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250315_mm2_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a5011c0c-e601-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTUwMTFjMGMtZTYwMS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WR2OcmYqZVRwaCaxf3WStQ0gAiD1h_RIs3eLfC7zxIo=)**

From: Andy Beshear
Date: March 13, 2025
Subject: Party loyalty over people – who does that serve? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103929926/533707795/-627450706?refcode=em25_250315_mm2_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250315_mm2_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a5011c0c-e601-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTUwMTFjMGMtZTYwMS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WR2OcmYqZVRwaCaxf3WStQ0gAiD1h_RIs3eLfC7zxIo=) I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again: too many of our elected "leaders" are more focused on party loyalty than on delivering for the people they were elected to serve.

**That’s exactly why we launched In This Together PAC.**

We saw firsthand how the path to electing good, for-the-people leaders is to put aside political gamesmanship and focus every day on improving people’s lives – _not just in Kentucky, but across the country_.

Too many politicians are more interested in scoring political points or fueling division. When I ran for governor, I refused to play their game. I didn’t give in to anger politics. And I didn’t take the bait when my opponents tried to drag me into pointless, divisive debates.

Instead, I focused on what mattered most: fighting for good schools, good jobs, and good healthcare for Kentuckians. And we won – _twice_. We proved that when we put commonsense solutions over partisanship, we can win. When we focus on results over rhetoric, we can move our communities forward. And that’s exactly what ITT PAC is fighting for: leaders who care about service over spectacle and people over party.

We know what works. We know what’s possible. But we can’t do this alone. Our team is using the same winning strategy to elect and protect leaders who put their communities first – and we need your help to make it happen.**[Can I count on you to chip in before our mid-month fundraising deadline to help us elect leaders who will fight for the people, not political loyalty?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103929927/533707796/-627450706?refcode=em25_250315_mm2_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250315_mm2_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a5011c0c-e601-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTUwMTFjMGMtZTYwMS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WR2OcmYqZVRwaCaxf3WStQ0gAiD1h_RIs3eLfC7zxIo=)** body:
| Unlike Elon Musk, who uses his billions of dollars to support the candidates who will do and say exactly what he wants to hear, I’m counting on people like you.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4616%2E35263%2EMNDO0U)
Hi Peter, To withstand the attacks and lies from Elon Musk and MAGA megadonors and fight back against Trump’s radical agenda, I count on grassroots contributions of **$15.09.** Really! Our average online donation so far this year is **$15.09.** That’s a number I’m proud of. Every time someone chips in, whether it’s $5, $10, or $50, that contribution goes towards our important work to stand up for our rights, deliver for Wisconsin’s hard-working families, and prepare to flip the Senate from **red** to **blue**. Our average contribution amount sends a powerful message about the incredible grassroots movement we have built together — a movement built by supporters like you who chip in what you can, when you can to fuel our work because you believe in what we’re fighting for. _Unlike Elon Musk_ , who uses his billions of dollars to support the candidates who will do and say exactly what he wants to hear, I’m counting on people like you, Peter. **[If you are able, will you chip in $15.09 before our mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight? Your support now will help us fight back against the wealthiest man in the world.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4497?c0=stb-em-mar25.ylKjDN&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250315_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4616%2E35263%2EMNDO0U) ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $15.09 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4489?c0=stb-em-mar25.wk9uY-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250315_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4616%2E35263%2EMNDO0U)

name: Tobias Read
subject: March Updates from the Secretary of State’s Office 📸
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250315em-nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250315em-nl]
Hi folks, it’s Secretary of State Tobias Read, reporting back with another critical update about our work since the people of Oregon elected me last November.
Last week, I went on KOIN's Eye on Northwest Politics program and talked through Governor Kotek's decision to resume automatic voter registration after 1,600 unverified people were registered. You can watch my 8-minute conversation with host Ken Boddie here [https://www.koin.com/nwpolitics/oregon-secretary-of-state-tobias-read-talks-election-integrity-state-agency-audits/] .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250315em-nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250315em-nl]
The Secretary of State's office is committed to making sure we limit problems with automatic voter registration in the future, and I’ve worked with the DMV to build several new safeguards, including:
* Hiring an automatic voter registration specialist in the Secretary of State's office who will work with a counterpart official at the DMV to oversee regular inspections.

* At least once a year, send in a team from the Secretary of State’s office to review the controls and improvements agreed to by DMV

* Verifying and random sampling groups of newly registered voters to confirm eligibility.

* Continuing to look for ways to improve the security of automatic voter registration.
It's important that people trust our voting systems and choose to participate in our elections. Voting is the foundation of our democracy, and I am looking forward to making it even more secure and convenient moving forward.
This week, I was back on the road to visit more county clerks — this time in Southern Oregon where I visited Douglas, Jackson, and Josephine counties. These nonpartisan public officials devote so much time and energy to making sure our elections are run fairly and smoothly. Their knowledge on voter safety helps inform so much of the work we do.
Thanks for reading my newsletter and staying up to date on all that my office is doing on your behalf here in Salem and across Oregon. I’m grateful to have you on the team!
And remember, if you’d like to support my campaign and the work we do to strengthen and defend democracy, please donate here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250315em-nl]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250315em-nl]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250315em-nl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250315em-nl]

clean_body: | Hey team — Today is a big one for our team — and not just because of our upcoming mid-month deadline = Today is Jason’s birthday! We’re really proud of the work he’s been doing to fight back against the Trump administration. He’s rolling with the punches, handling the constant breaking news (most of which is bad for our country) with a resolve to fight and make a difference. From fighting to lower the costs of eggs (which we’ll need later to make his birthday cake!) to shoring up support for veterans programs, Jason is working hard every day to make a difference for Coloradans. It’s not always easy — but Jason’s not one to give up when the going gets tough. We want to surprise him on his birthday, and here’s how: To hit our fundraising goal for tonight, we need to raise another $3,674. If we raise that from this email, Jason can take a break from fundraising 😅. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you! We can’t wait to wish Jason a happy birthday and tell him the good news about our fundraising. — Team Crow Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. subject: Do you think kids should hear THIS in schools?
body:
The “educator” in the video tells young people: “It’s time to throw away the notion of losing your virginity.”

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/edMZdYLMXacUFHH0DLJLUSQm73uvCjxXyogJKcq65CryFlktSJlZU_tFQ5F93OjoNTlt2NCvWtzBmpHs9doXgd3L9aHyrYe8aYzXTC9Zyqi5Tc34iUoqzamHlD3E54PeFYcNgl7rFc20rWrIWOSeTvKXBK6eTt9kyKLDjIBrcdadcDOgULKo2BcZ/YUfxUdwZBGRWnzK2RmjDRRFj0X0Kg9YI/7)_
---
[ ](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/qUb14L1m9BjJO5tZPvic43B2pvqMoCCZQJ80Hlw7oXvetKYE9Rgy-DJc5y6pzdQTX9hL-TXeN5OBgChH4WVyQ-Qn9wo5waMLi3nWDY7w3VJ6BEdp1j_BAe03Pc8UIeHQf08OpsU2OB6mw3lXYzFn2VljuVk1F3_H2nKCQZQ7w0T6xs288MbzR7r89g57icvKwe5Tv5C6Qf9ImHh4p2fNo20ljzT7Qq5PYTbDYfaLQ3nzl2NzJvh3lGXZZKXVRjf_gPbmxdRRXiiAxceg1YcDgaamBOuS1ZDLp0LAAodo9L1T5yOQyzAfzRUf69B5Ov4XNXE8QzAXpIiqwyu1OlktRvlP4ht-nQsoGAnr7kdbQZdUi3hHpLeVR2hN-h6dahpXfKSIhEL1sqV7uADCOlsPvEmdFAF4tfzuFsm3/QVmv89A80NXVz4R-KmeDldWuIEgaZ19E/7)
#
Friend of Life,

Planned Parenthood just came out with a new video that calls virginity "made up" and a "social construct."

The "educator" in the video tells young people: "It's time to throw away the notion of losing your virginity."

Instead of seeing it as "losing something," Planned Parenthood encourages impressionable teens to experiment sexually because "all of these myths around sex and virginity can be so hurtful and overwhelming."

Planned Parenthood is grooming the next generation for abortion. Promoting risky sexual practices to young people ultimately leads them to broken relationships and more children killed in the womb.

**Will you help fight back against Planned Parenthood 's anti-family, pro-death agenda? I'm asking 50 people to step forward today with a $50 gift to help us put our life-saving videos into classrooms nationwide**. **[https://give.liveaction.org/stop-planned-parenthood-mms/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/W4ztRU0E4nwPA1lzJtEVFktQluPRBkYC0ILSPWTQVFeG-arzlGtcvTfu2Bk_Pm-7g2WpRcWslZny4htn3q8MbVC-HOqacAS5KghKv_PcajDWOmog357HXiLUYUlO31fgP-derdkow-GwJ3xivqoeS285ESCnb_nV41gwLSHiIwm4NhzWchVtx1EgY-JirMX0yVVpVKVN3cB6tHiLvz54Ijv565RdlNK-2jeWYxviYnlJm8kdvNRom1hpUsYVsaWBtsdejBYBGheJL1_Y1QGmEmn49bzyl6IVkq0FzbKUgbgnFZVYjGViUVJvwHZ7jMnr-fqe6192X5-Mo3vEALeqt0P9OVLR8n0DfnIDzxhmd8wSsA5iodAMSw3vH3hd51cwIEMI0ADrchX9cwjfNHi9tXAHZjx_EEeze9U4/ou02T8Ca_obRacPJGP30Wvdx1AFYDHuK/7)**

Planned Parenthood has continuously pushed egregious and pornographic materials in schools to young kids and teens -- and what do they "teach" these impressionable kids about sex? That disturbing practices are "normal" and "healthy."

In classic Planned Parenthood fashion, irrefutable definitions are warped, and morality is thrown out the window.

Planned Parenthood is the largest provider of sex education in America -- and they teach kids that gender is fluid, deviant sexual practices are normal and healthy, and anything goes, as long as it's consensual.

**We need to protect our children against Planned Parenthood 's deception. This deadly organization should not be the educator of our children. **

Friend of Life, this is why we at Live Action have been creating - and are about to release! - wholesome sex-ed video series for schools across the country to use instead of Planned Parenthood's damaging materials.

We need to spread the truth about loving relationships between men and women and the beauty of procreation before the next generation of parents is convinced by Planned Parenthood's disturbing agenda that leads to abortion.

**But we can 't complete this critical initiative without your support. Your gift of $50 will help us complete the videos and get them into schools across the country. Use this secure link to make your gift and kick Planned Parenthood out of the classroom! [https://give.liveaction.org/stop-planned-parenthood-mms/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/0HG6Z3CK2P_XiZAj13_ghuVrf6DALixlL32bG8HwInz7sWQUhlrLlXEmLibsKioamY7zDVHPhyrQcgo2WS1xqmK180gvxt4ltGoy0tRrhmMEl_EyAWdnKmZTQjFfCzlULCRIHg9qHD9W2VdeDtiChKJeDIJAjpKzbiswiF6fj1jnRzvJYxY3DY497sDjd0IiNcogwsRsXzEoFDfzgy-B7zmu9d_M24jDtnz8LH5iEI_IxVcfL2Ddj7E6W0CnLgjwA4Aje6krDBVP1LH36AAEUtMtzaCevdxzuty7PcBhlwt2PGpbeZVnO9M6jm5T1sgGthXhUJbtnHEljJv3DcVwn-Lh9sEohrPH4daV83r5eJZNI3sXqhsK401Mucuh96r5_VJsd_JG-mP9fdsBLnVampNZbh_Qnlp8yqCV/UixdHgwcPzXw-7tX7kQgyNCoF5Os-v7l/7)
**
Your partnership gives me so much hope. I can't wait to share the impact your activism will have in months to come. Our children - and grandchildren - depend on it.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/X24B-Slurd0hRWZSL2QwoJeUP9wRmZk33UXPmcpfqc9gEYC0uLiCuYl0sqcX1dwMy1fPPi3cMNKa_PtNRb7eFwLGOo_qY1P3fEMh5HUQR7Q2EhzHghZ97W0YyL1auehdBrepR8tsZppvkwYsvVK-cs_-kM3P8c-zwPwdhLzuiu1QgYRXLuo4CSbv7OTNzIZqqESzr-ZIPaA8TJs-0PDT2oR4D8zp2rfN2AFV8FWSGMyBvD9EYTmB2_2W1tivZtBx2k11lpyQ46IxlBimOpD9K6HtvY7DGn7uT5WeoNlYQohE5khLJpi2Ijie6ZFHqmTFYhFONFmKysukHkddrndR7u1sw59oqcz1DVC9RWJY9HnePeor9Wcf56nA1MNLGaCfmHacmBPBQHI18e0k07J5SjMVOw9CvOAUOh3o/PgpewWZimCJXGZMaFMEKb2dCX-sPmERk/7)

clean_body: The “educator” in the video tells young people: “It’s time to throw away the notion of losing your virginity.” | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Friend of Life, Planned Parenthood just came out with a new video that calls virginity "made up" and a "social construct." The "educator" in the video tells young people: "It's time to throw away the notion of losing your virginity." Instead of seeing it as "losing something," Planned Parenthood encourages impressionable teens to experiment sexually because "all of these myths around sex and virginity can be so hurtful and overwhelming." Planned Parenthood is grooming the next generation for abortion. Promoting risky sexual practices to young people ultimately leads them to broken relationships and more children killed in the womb. Will you help fight back against Planned Parenthood 's anti-family, pro-death agenda? I'm asking 50 people to step forward today with a $50 gift to help us put our life-saving videos into classrooms nationwide. Planned Parenthood has continuously pushed egregious and pornographic materials in schools to young kids and teens -- and what do they "teach" these impressionable kids about sex? That disturbing practices are "normal" and "healthy." In classic Planned Parenthood fashion, irrefutable definitions are warped, and morality is thrown out the window. Planned Parenthood is the largest provider of sex education in America -- and they teach kids that gender is fluid, deviant sexual practices are normal and healthy, and anything goes, as long as it's consensual. We need to protect our children against Planned Parenthood 's deception. This deadly organization should not be the educator of our children. Friend of Life, this is why we at Live Action have been creating - and are about to release! - wholesome sex-ed video series for schools across the country to use instead of Planned Parenthood's damaging materials. We need to spread the truth about loving relationships between men and women and the beauty of procreation before the next generation of parents is convinced by Planned Parenthood's disturbing agenda that leads to abortion. But we can 't complete this critical initiative without your support. Your gift of $50 will help us complete the videos and get them into schools across the country. Use this secure link to make your gift and kick Planned Parenthood out of the classroom! Your partnership gives me so much hope. I can't wait to share the impact your activism will have in months to come. Our children - and grandchildren - depend on it. For Life, Lila Rose President and Founder 2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201 .

Derek Tran and I will always stand on the side of the American people, even when it means confronting those who threaten our progress. We need Derek to be reelected so Democrats can take back the majority and put a much-needed check on this extreme, unpopular agenda.
