Extreme MAGA Republicans are crashing the economy in real time.

They plan to take a chainsaw to Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, veterans’ benefits and public schools – all while preparing to give massive tax cuts to their billionaire donors and wealthy corporations.

House Democrats will not be complicit.

Derek Tran and I will always stand on the side of the American people, even when it means confronting those who threaten our progress.

We need Derek to be reelected so Democrats can take back the majority and put a much-needed check on this extreme, unpopular agenda.

[**This is an all-hands-on-deck moment. I’m asking every grassroots Democrat reading this to help prove that we have the foundation we need to take back the House. But right now, MAGA Republicans are already preparing their attacks on our most vulnerable Democrats. Can you chip in $10 or anything you can afford to Derek Tran today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103930896/533711341/1435289434?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.03.15_b1_hj_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjVmNmU4ZmUtZWQwMS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6754C93J9Fk4VraoC6waIWGwEYfEOG37O_VLFoolxKw=)

Let me pull back the curtain and reveal what’s going on behind the scenes:

House Republicans fled town after taking a vote that will gut Medicaid and imperil Social Security.

They are ready to unleash havoc on everyday Americans, giving the president and unelected MAGA billionaires even more power to continue dismantling our democracy.

House Democrats will always stand on the side of the American people.

I need to know you’re standing with us as we prepare to defeat extreme MAGA Republicans and win back the majority.

[**I’m counting on you. Will you rush $10 to Derek before it’s too late to hand the far right extremists a stunning rebuke in 2026? Team -- Amid Donald Trump and Elon Musk's calls to demolish vital news sources like MSNBC, PBS, and NPR, Justice Sonia Sotomayor has a _dire warning:_ **Unless we stand up for a free press and independent media, "we're going to lose our democracy."**

Justice Sotomayor is 100% correct. Without reliable sources of truthful information, our country could suffer _unimaginable harm._ But that's exactly what Trump and Musk want!

We can't sit idly by as Trump's attacks on our media expand, so **we've launched an URGENT Rapid Response Petition to show that Democrats support PBS, MSNBC, NPR, and the independent journalism that's vital to our nation.** But as of 6:10 P.M., we're still waiting for your signature, and the petition closes at midnight! **Please, sign on now:**

**[Add your signature IMMEDIATELY to stand with PBS, NPR, MSNBC, and freedom of the press>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21309?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250315-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250315-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&akid=19794%2E9716520%2EZD_rZy)**

Team DSCC

With Democrats in the minority, getting things done is not going to be easy. I want to take a moment to remind you who I work for: _**you, Peter**_.

The people of WA-08 elected me to be their representative, _and it’s a job I take seriously_.

That means listening to your concerns, fighting for our shared values, and making sure your voice is heard in Congress.

I have a track record of delivering, no matter who’s been in the majority, and no matter who’s been in the White House. But this time feels different. Delivering for you is going to be a lot more challenging, and that’s exactly why we’re dead serious about making sure Republicans know we are all fighting to keep me in this seat, to flip the House, and to make sure I’m delivering for you.

March is the first month our fundraising numbers will go public under this new administration. It’s our chance to prove just how serious we are about keeping a representative who cares, listens, and delivers in WA-08. **[Right now, our fundraising is tracking behind, and my team and I set a $10,000 mid-month goal to get back on track. clean_body: With Democrats in the minority, getting things done is not going to be easy. I want to take a moment to remind you who I work for: you, Peter. The people of WA-08 elected me to be their representative, and it’s a job I take seriously. That means listening to your concerns, fighting for our shared values, and making sure your voice is heard in Congress. I have a track record of delivering, no matter who’s been in the majority, and no matter who’s been in the White House. But this time feels different. Delivering for you is going to be a lot more challenging, and that’s exactly why we’re dead serious about making sure Republicans know we are all fighting to keep me in this seat, to flip the House, and to make sure I’m delivering for you. March is the first month our fundraising numbers will go public under this new administration. It’s our chance to prove just how serious we are about keeping a representative who cares, listens, and delivers in WA-08. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being in this with me, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Five years ago, Trump failed us. Now, he's at it again.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email2082025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email2082025&amount=25]
Peter —
Five years ago this month, the COVID pandemic sent the world into chaos, and we were thrown into a time of fear, loss, and profound uncertainty. It was a global crisis—but here at home, it was made exponentially worse by one man: Donald Trump.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3142025&amount=10]
Trump ignored the experts. He mocked basic safety measures. He pushed conspiracy theories instead of facts. He played politics with people's lives, and Americans died because of it.
Now, we're in a new period of instability. But this time, it's not a virus—it's a man-made crisis. And once again, the man at the center of it is Donald Trump.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3142025&amount=10]
This time, he's not just putting lives at risk. He's putting our entire country itself on the chopping block.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3142025&amount=10]
He's dismantling critical government programs, installing unqualified loyalists in vital positions, and making it clear that his administration will not be constrained by laws, norms, or even reality. This isn't a theoretical concern—it's unfolding rapidly, with profound implications for our nation's economy and safety.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3142025&amount=10]
At GOTV PAC, we don't just watch these threats unfold—we fight back. We mobilize voters. We counter disinformation. We organize to defeat Trump Republicans who want to hand him the keys to the country again.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3142025&amount=10]
But we need you in this fight.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3142025&amount=10]
Can you donate $20 today to help us stop Trump from driving this country off a cliff? Five years ago, we saw the devastation when he was left unchecked. Now, he’s back—and we can’t afford to stand on the sidelines. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3152025&amount=20]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3142025&amount=10]
At GOTV PAC, we’re mobilizing voters where it matters most, starting with Wisconsin’s April 1st Supreme Court election—our first major chance to push back against Trump, the MAGA agenda, and Elon Musk’s growing influence over our democracy. This fight is already here, and we need all hands on deck. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3142025&amount=10]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

OTHER AMOUNT → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3152025]
There is no sitting this one out.
—GOTV PAC

Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.

name: Team DNC
subject: Here’s what’s happening in Florida:
body:
Republicans' narrow majority in Congress means the upcoming Florida special elections are that much more important.
---
Derek, In a few short weeks, two critical special elections in Florida will determine the control of two previously Republican-held House seats. **Republicans' narrow majority in Congress means these elections are that much more important.** [**That’s why we have to ask: Will you split a contribution between the DNC and the Florida Democratic Party to help Democrats reach as many undecided voters as possible in the final weeks before Election Day?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-fl-split-march-2025?amount=10&refcode=em_20250315_2972_fr&refcode2=2972_22930333_zRSyQk&akid=2972%2E22930333%2EzRSyQk) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the Florida Democratic Party and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-fl-split-march-2025?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_20250315_2972_fr&refcode2=2972_22930333_zRSyQk&akid=2972%2E22930333%2EzRSyQk)**

---
Winning a special election is hard. Winning _two_ in a state Trump won is even more challenging. But since last November's elections, Democrats have over-performed in special elections across this country as voters reject MAGA extremism.
This is an all-hands-on-deck moment. Florida Democrats will need as many resources as possible to counter Republicans’ spending, scale up their on-the-ground organizing efforts, and make sure as many voters as possible have a plan to cast their ballots.
[**Anything you can chip in today will help fund this work. You can use this link to make a split contribution.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-fl-split-march-2025?amount=10&refcode=em_20250315_2972_fr&refcode2=2972_22930333_zRSyQk&akid=2972%2E22930333%2EzRSyQk)
Thank you again for everything,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Zoe Lofgren!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Friend --

My friend Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is an unsung hero for our Democracy and the Constitution.

Zoe served as a Trump impeachment manager and wrote bills to protect voting rights and curtail big money in politics.

After the insurrection, Zoe served with me on the January 6th Committee to find the truth and to hold Trump and his enablers accountable.

As we know, in Trumpworld no good deed goes unpunished.

The attacks on Zoe were relentless with false accusations and fake news to damage her name, her record, and her character.

Zoe had to spend most of her campaign funds to defend herself. Now, she needs our help – and we need Zoe in Congress to protect and secure the future of our democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q12025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-03-15_ADK_ZOL_ES-19384_RS&amount=25&nvep=&hmac=]

Help Zoe Defend Democracy >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q12025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-03-12_J6C_ZOL_ES-19319&amount=25]

We all learned how fragile our democracy is on January 6th. Let's not take any chances.

I hope I can count on you to join me to stand up for Zoe and for our democracy now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q12025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-03-15_ADK_ZOL_ES-19384_RS&amount=25&nvep=&hmac=]

Country First,

Adam

Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help.
Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q12025?refcode=emfooter&amount=25]
Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
Lofgren for Congress

San Jose, CA 95113
United States

---
Peter, my campaign is just hours away from our final mid-month deadline of the quarter, and I want you to know why your support is so important.

Public education is the bedrock of our country. But right now, Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and Republicans in Congress are working to strip away federal funding and abolish the Department of Education entirely.

I was proud to co-sponsor the Department of Education Protection Act because we owe it to the millions of students in North Carolina — and nationwide — to fight for their future. [Will you join me in that fight by chipping in $10 before my mid-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103931310/533712774/1072845075?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_031525_MM_4_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODAzZTE1NS1mMTAxLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qYykW5g6HzwAmEnq_rkC1TmfF4F9CirS264zpjM7w4k=)

When I think about the effects this will have on our communities, I think about what public education did for me growing up. Despite the inequities and imperfections that existed, it was the teachers, friends, and faculty from those schools who supported me that led me to serve as your Congresswoman today.

Cutting funds to our education system will impact everyone, but not equally. Low income, students of color, and students with disabilities will no longer have the support they need to get the education they deserve.

And all of this to pay for a tax cut for the wealthiest among us? It’s not just senseless and irresponsible – it’s cruel. And I won’t rest until our Department of Education is secured for generations to come. [Will you help me stand up for our nation’s students by making a donation of $10 now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103931315/533712786/1072845075?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_031525_MM_4_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODAzZTE1NS1mMTAxLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qYykW5g6HzwAmEnq_rkC1TmfF4F9CirS264zpjM7w4k=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, my campaign is just hours away from our final mid-month deadline of the quarter, and I want you to know why your support is so important. Public education is the bedrock of our country. But right now, Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and Republicans in Congress are working to strip away federal funding and abolish the Department of Education entirely. I was proud to co-sponsor the Department of Education Protection Act because we owe it to the millions of students in North Carolina — and nationwide — to fight for their future. = When I think about the effects this will have on our communities, I think about what public education did for me growing up. Despite the inequities and imperfections that existed, it was the teachers, friends, and faculty from those schools who supported me that led me to serve as your Congresswoman today. Cutting funds to our education system will impact everyone, but not equally. Low income, students of color, and students with disabilities will no longer have the support they need to get the education they deserve. And all of this to pay for a tax cut for the wealthiest among us? It’s not just senseless and irresponsible – it’s cruel. And I won’t rest until our Department of Education is secured for generations to come. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Your donation right now will help protect Democrat Valerie Foushee by giving us a jumpstart on the next cycle. | = = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe, You can also =.

#

You can make a difference in our work to fight back against the Trump administration — no question about it, Peter. Our voices are stronger when we use them together — so speak out against Trump’s work to roll back our progress. When he cuts federal funding, we need to fight back. When he gives Elon Musk access to private data, we need to fight back. And when he comes after our rights and freedoms, _we need to fight back._ There’s more: With control of the Senate majority up for grabs next year, our work to flip the chamber starts _now_. We know what you’re thinking — with the stakes this high, it’s easy to feel powerless. It’s easy to ask yourself: _“Can I really make a difference?”_ **We’re here to tell you today that yes, you absolutely can!** Because here’s how we win: You, Peter, chip in $5 or $10. Then another person donates, and another, and so on. And that adds up to create something special. Don’t just take our word for it — our grassroots power helped us win the Senate majority in 2020, and _expand_ it in 2022. We can do it again — but only if you step up. **[Now that you know how powerful this grassroots team can be, will you pitch in $5, $10, or any amount to help us keep this momentum going ahead of tonight’s mid-month fundraising deadline? In Pennsylvania, our one-seat House majority is on the line – if Republicans flip a seat on March 25th, they’ll hold full legislative control in the commonwealth. | | |
---
| |
---|---

| Democrats are gearing up for must-win special elections this month.

**In Pennsylvania** , our one-seat House majority is on the line – if Republicans flip a seat on March 25th, they’ll hold full legislative control in the commonwealth.

**We need to have the resources in place to compete against last-minute Republican spending in elections like these.**

---
If we fall behind, we’d have to scale back our investments in the states and could leave our candidates vulnerable to attacks from GOP mega-donors like Elon Musk.

**That’s why we’re reaching out to you...**
---

clean_body: In Pennsylvania, our one-seat House majority is on the line – if Republicans flip a seat on March 25th, they’ll hold full legislative control in the commonwealth. | | | | | ---|--- | Democrats are gearing up for must-win special elections this month. In Pennsylvania , our one-seat House majority is on the line – if Republicans flip a seat on March 25th, they’ll hold full legislative control in the commonwealth. We need to have the resources in place to compete against last-minute Republican spending in elections like these. If we fall behind, we’d have to scale back our investments in the states and could leave our candidates vulnerable to attacks from GOP mega-donors like Elon Musk. That’s why we’re reaching out to you... body:
The Department of Veterans Affairs is now facing massive cuts at the direction of the Trump Administration’s DOGE.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103931688/533714223/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-03-15_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTZlYzkxYjYtZjMwMS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NCv_OCZ92IAvH7wTULjGKKivk8o2oPNPn5zRtLGXuao=)

Peter,

The Department of Veterans Affairs is now facing massive cuts at the direction of the Trump Administration’s DOGE.

Not only is Virginia home to dedicated VA nurses, physicians, and case managers who provide care to our nation’s veterans, but Virginia is home to generations of veterans who rely on care at the VA. These cuts would jeopardize access to healthcare, mental health services, and essential resources for the brave men and women who have put their lives on the line to defend America.

**While Virginia’s Republican leadership continues to stand by Trump and DOGE's harmful cuts, I will always speak out and stand up for Virginia’s veterans.[_Please consider making a contribution today to make sure we flip this Governor’s seat in November:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103931689/533714224/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-03-15_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTZlYzkxYjYtZjMwMS1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NCv_OCZ92IAvH7wTULjGKKivk8o2oPNPn5zRtLGXuao=)**

clean_body: The Department of Veterans Affairs is now facing massive cuts at the direction of the Trump Administration’s DOGE. | = Peter, The Department of Veterans Affairs is now facing massive cuts at the direction of the Trump Administration’s DOGE. Not only is Virginia home to dedicated VA nurses, physicians, and case managers who provide care to our nation’s veterans, but Virginia is home to generations of veterans who rely on care at the VA. These cuts would jeopardize access to healthcare, mental health services, and essential resources for the brave men and women who have put their lives on the line to defend America. While Virginia’s Republican leadership continues to stand by Trump and DOGE's harmful cuts, I will always speak out and stand up for Virginia’s veterans.= | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: Team Spanberger
subject: Abigail’s opponent just launched an attack ad against her
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
